name: Jon Tester
subject: this can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hey folks,

I hate to reach out on the weekend, but this couldn’t wait.

Republicans are already attacking me on TV—a full six months earlier than the last election. **That means we need even more resources at this moment to respond.**

We’re proudly funded by tens of thousands of grassroots supporters chipping in a few bucks when they can. We immediately put these dollars to work mobilizing supporters, registering Montanans to vote, and fighting back against Mitch McConnell’s misleading attacks. If we want to keep pace in this ultra-competitive race, we have to catch up now.

**Asking for money is my least favorite part of the job, just ask my team. But I know it’s essential to winning this race and continuing to work on the issues that really matter. So I hope you’ll bear with me when I ask:**

[**Can you chip in any amount that feels right to you today to help us hit our goal? Your donation will be split between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project. It truly does make a difference in a people-powered campaign like ours.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57383?t=6&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57384?t=7&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57385?t=8&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57386?t=9&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57387?t=10&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57388?t=11&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy)
Thanks so much. I’ll let you get back to enjoying your Sunday.

—Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11851%2E878179%2ExmRfRy)
---

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: the experts were right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I just got news
| | |
---
Friend, I'm running to defeat Rick Scott — and the results of this election could determine which party controls the Senate. Here's what you need to know about my race:
**_First,_** election analysts from _CNN , FiveThirtyEight_, and _Roll Call_ ranked Rick Scott as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024.
**_Then_****,** a new poll showed that the experts were right — this race is already a statistical tie! Floridians are sick and tired of Rick Scott threatening to take away their rights, raising their costs, and trying to end the Social Security and Medicare benefits they’ve worked hard for.
**_Now,_** with grassroots momentum on our side, experts are calling this race Democrats' best chance to expand the Senate majority and stop Mitch McConnell from retaking power. **But I just got news that we're $5,723 short of our FINAL weekly goal before we head into end-of-month.**
If we fall short here, it'll be a massive setback. **And Rick Scott, Mitch McConnell, and all their megadonors will undoubtedly weaponize that setback against me.**

Hello,
Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert.
I am once again running to defeat Boebert. In 2022, the race between us went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short.

Hey Peter – Patty Murray here. It's Sunday evening, so I'll keep this short.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74033221/440386115/254407035?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk179-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODgxODRmMC1iZThjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lNZKBcNxBsktMcWwoOrhXkvBZXv734ZalB9VF8TyzfU=)
Look, it's not going to be easy to defend our razor-thin Senate majority this cycle. And, with Sen. Joe Manchin not running for reelection, we're going to have to work _even harder _to elect Democrats in other swing states.
**So I'm asking everyone reading this email to chip in now and help me reach my goal before midnight. ****[Can I count on you to donate $5 now to help me keep fighting for reproductive rights, child care, and the rest of our Democratic agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74033222/440386116/254407035?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk179-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODgxODRmMC1iZThjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lNZKBcNxBsktMcWwoOrhXkvBZXv734ZalB9VF8TyzfU=)**
Thanks for your help,

Patty Murray

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=14abc05704254d0a8ced8cb6f7558b7b&_e=RcuFcvVNKQFIVgYy8a29DI_aPKVUaO5yaRUV0xlVbScNbqwsraGkJd8QDrFovveUUcIJyVDbjZZAwzp_Sh_qp7AL35k8ygfLgIPtKcjK-EBIyZkCmcrdZDjm3kgdmklq9VKQp6r7z42Xs6XP954cL3Oh9pVY8Ds1AP3iZI_ZYcunsLgZsKih0rEHWT9dbOf1D_rmC2oaQZ7ueXWuvpVPpoA_ga3MwX_RK1Tq0tgJBcB-P4SpXQUaW2aAJjwbyhX5rTfAwUY2UpTJRcjtLuV2m0SOxMSbOHew99ll_wqgnH-WEKaskVwA5cG5quWj31sOtbWmhll_XhNprnvncXyb6CH8bswxhazz5wKk4WdVdnug_4msuVyyaUWJFrOhH4bb)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=14abc05704254d0a8ced8cb6f7558b7b&_e=RcuFcvVNKQFIVgYy8a29DI_aPKVUaO5yaRUV0xlVbScNbqwsraGkJd8QDrFovveUUcIJyVDbjZZAwzp_Sh_qp7AL35k8ygfLgIPtKcjK-EBIyZkCmcrdZDjm3kgdmklq9VKQp6r7z42Xs6XP954cL3Oh9pVY8Ds1AP3iZI_ZYcunsLgZsKih0rEHWT9dbOf1D_rmC2oaQZ7ueXWuvpVPpoA_ga3MwX_RK1Tq0tgJBcCuW6YiDQc1zw3ZnAG8jfPDiPgxcAad1N3L4F89d0WbBsO4o5sQ3RLCC-BkikEDGSklrZUWDXJAraAtjwxEJe6HVhYByTZ_hUhyMj0ZQcaWWO3FVQPGjuNXlztGLEK-G97GGG7to7J8_Amk7e-bOuv2)

clean_body: Friend... | . Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | - Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

– _Attorney General Eric Holder_

❌ In states like **Ohio** and **Wisconsin** , GOP lawmakers are working desperately to protect gerrymandered maps.

clean_body: | Team, when Attorney General Eric Holder appeared on All in with Chris Hayes on MSNBC to talk about the 2024 election, he didn’t mince words: | “Unless we are as strong as we can be and we should be in the defense of our democracy, we can lose it.” – Attorney General Eric Holder = A.G. Holder is right. Across the country, we’re seeing Republicans ramp up their efforts to undermine our democracy so they can hold on to unearned power: ❌ In states like Texas and North Carolina , Republicans are forcing through new voter suppression laws ahead of the 2024 election. ❌ In states like Ohio and Wisconsin , GOP lawmakers are working desperately to protect gerrymandered maps. ❌ And at the national level, the new Speaker of the House Mike Johnson is a MAGA extremist and election-denier who played a key role in trying to overturn the 2020 election! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Here’s the good news, team: Across the country, we’re seeing significant victories in our fight to protect and strengthen democracy. ✅ In Ohio , voters rejected the GOP’s scheme to change the rules to make it harder to protect abortion rights, and they voted to enshrine the right to reproductive freedom in the state constitution. ✅ The Supreme Court overturned manipulated maps in Alabama for illegally discriminating against Black voters. Now, Alabama will have new, fair maps for the 2024 Election. ✅ The fight for fair districts is still ongoing across the country – states like Louisiana , Georgia , Florida , and others could also have fair maps before the next election. = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. name: Tina Smith
subject: A new aspect of the mental health crisis I’m working on addressing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi friend, I have always been open about my struggles with mental health. When I was in college, I experienced my first battle with depression. As a young woman, it was hard to figure out what I needed, but I was fortunate enough to seek out and receive help. When my depression returned later as a young mom, it didn’t get any easier – thankfully, I had the resources to navigate my mental health struggles. **For too many people, however, those struggles are hard to address because of the lack of resources, awareness, and advocacy around mental health.** That is why I helped create the Bipartisan Mental Health Caucus, to destigmatize conversations around mental health and help those who are struggling — and why I introduced new legislation with my colleague, Chris Murphy, to tackle loneliness. After the pandemic, millions of Americans feel lonelier and more isolated, and we must include and center this issue in our conversations around mental health. We are ready to tackle this issue, and I am doing the work that is needed to help find solutions to the loneliness epidemic. That is why Chris Murphy and I have pioneered legislation to take loneliness seriously, and we will do everything we can to ensure those who need help can get it. Let these efforts be a reminder that you're not fighting this fight alone, that it’s okay to reach out for help, and that it never hurts to extend a smile or helping hand to someone — you never know when they might need it. – Tina | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74034098/440398421/-1565639837?refcode=AU_TSM_CL_GEN_NOA_AC60_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGY3Njk4Zi1jMzhjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3owg2zxzcOXsMEwfaF-rLSJRbo-L78o6-MOe9n4CxWI=)

Friend,
America is the greatest country in history.
What makes America great? Our Constitution, our history, our belief in liberty...
...But above all, I truly believe that it’s our _PEOPLE_ that make America great.
The truth is: Americans are the most courageous, resilient, innovative, and generous people on the planet.
That’s why the best part of my job is getting to meet the hardworking American patriots who are the backbone of our country.
And now, I’d love to meet **YOU** next, Friend.
**I’m hosting a reception in Hallandale Beach, Florida – a beautiful place – to close out the 2023 year, and I’m inviting one lucky winner to be my VIP for the big event!**
I’ll cover the flight and hotel for you (_and_ a guest of your choice), you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together at this reception so that you can always remember this special night.
_And all you have to do is enter to WIN!_

Our Constitution, our history, our belief in liberty... ...But above all, I truly believe that it’s our PEOPLE that make America great. The truth is: Americans are the most courageous, resilient, innovative, and generous people on the planet. That’s why the best part of my job is getting to meet the hardworking American patriots who are the backbone of our country. And now, I’d love to meet YOU next, Friend. I’m hosting a reception in Hallandale Beach, Florida – a beautiful place – to close out the 2023 year, and I’m inviting one lucky winner to be my VIP for the big event! I’ll cover the flight and hotel for you (and a guest of your choice), you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together at this reception so that you can always remember this special night. body:
| When Adam announced his campaign to be California’s next U.S. Senator, he knew it would be one of the most competitive, expensive elections in the country.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4571%2E5257348%2Eyq9fJ2)
Derek,
With just 4 days until our November end-of-month deadline, **[here are 4 reasons why our campaign is asking for your $4 contribution today:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3236?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.PG_V6M&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4571%2E5257348%2Eyq9fJ2)**
1. Adam has a wild campaign year with **FOUR** elections ahead of him.
2. **Californians begin early voting in 10 weeks.**
3. Donald Trump is personally scaling up his smear campaign against Adam — continuously bashing him on _Fox News_ and at rallies around the country.
4. The latest polls show Adam neck-and-neck with his opponents — with one-third of voters still undecided.

When Adam announced his campaign to be California’s next U.S. Senator, he knew it would be one of the most competitive, expensive elections in the country.
And with so much on the line for our democracy and very little time, we cannot give up.
****[With all of these reasons in mind, can we count on you to pitch in $4 or more to Adam’s campaign?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3236?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.PG_V6M&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4571%2E5257348%2Eyq9fJ2)**

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Our guiding principles
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=af0067d2c9404cd4a874837ca7e3ffad&_t=WuYmLTwvEwQkpSMLD-V8Stx1Dm63cRVw1l6cz28Q76w-eFSTXu74PAbFxEAfpLFN2DsW6mR4m49lfZMxnyxKh0_6JAXMAledApKPRQdqd74%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=af0067d2c9404cd4a874837ca7e3ffad&_t=WuYmLTwvEwQkpSMLD-V8Stx1Dm63cRVw1l6cz28Q76w-eFSTXu74PAbFxEAfpLFN2DsW6mR4m49lfZMxnyxKh0_6JAXMAledApKPRQdqd74%3D)
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=af0067d2c9404cd4a874837ca7e3ffad&_e=6XYCJ67nJ0ghbkabBOjE-K4qK6R7NQhOZeXUOAsb4cSSu4odjH3hFTN1LL2q7DEh3K0-WJk5NPM56ZJD1xROUhWx9rjUjE3DyNod1XY5DHD3rUnknpK_Uu_EOFej9psJw2gWyPaJ4bXBgV-unDqlqUnHQP-MCug85sv33lK_y66q9pi6VpN9FrVCB9lfylBBa0Th-q7qNkwu-YaMlX6dhpxNqdjfrqOHJFeLbRUznYTvM4OZT7CKmcQoijVJuyLBF6CTShuJRGVBruY2Hkcgkz5egkhHAQtGHAMtZJazIs5IXgSaVmmgGGFZhHh_mDafWqyWX61f3wiC5gIu_lkj9h9XRF5xvUedthv1d-IJc4PTwit5T7qKO5roXC_Xnt4H04q2v2W6Sr2XXBeVidFYOg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American -

While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, _the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before._

When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and [**called upon us to return to our nation’s founding principles and paint again with bold colors instead of pale pastels.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=af0067d2c9404cd4a874837ca7e3ffad&_e=6XYCJ67nJ0ghbkabBOjE-K4qK6R7NQhOZeXUOAsb4cSSu4odjH3hFTN1LL2q7DEh3K0-WJk5NPM56ZJD1xROUhWx9rjUjE3DyNod1XY5DHD3rUnknpK_Uu_EOFej9psJw2gWyPaJ4bXBgV-unDqlqUnHQP-MCug85sv33lK_y66q9pi6VpN9FrVCB9lfylBBa0Th-q7qNkwu-YaMlX6dhpxNqdjfrqOHJFeLbRUznYTvM4OZT7CKmcQoijVJuyLBCx3CpKyHvCti3qKCAoBAcqIl0fGN_M6jnBrTvVD6L33q7N9r_3X_V29FPlL-WWLXL5Oj0F45WMSX37Smo_vBA1hV-4P0UuIs1xhxUDJadVEhcx5sBda5twjeEBtIvvbNF4Ix0fhdcLXN6WFU5z28uQ%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICA > **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=af0067d2c9404cd4a874837ca7e3ffad&_e=6XYCJ67nJ0ghbkabBOjE-K4qK6R7NQhOZeXUOAsb4cSSu4odjH3hFTN1LL2q7DEh3K0-WJk5NPM56ZJD1xROUhWx9rjUjE3DyNod1XY5DHD3rUnknpK_Uu_EOFej9psJw2gWyPaJ4bXBgV-unDqlqUnHQP-MCug85sv33lK_y66q9pi6VpN9FrVCB9lfylBBa0Th-q7qNkwu-YaMlX6dhpxNqdjfrqOHJFeLbRUznYTvM4OZT7CKmcQoijVJuyLBjSF8Q2XahHDa0emIvwMMtds18HowHH8uhqkcdlmpVRXOvlXeRTNRCEx53VmI966R1so25Bdwuj_AJSaZkjoYEF3lekcVRxJ0QueEGpGAL1e_NBsH4D6RUdxrv65uR8WHOEDZOFQZydFcw1NuSNrNPw%3D%3D)
_Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction,_ and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom.

[**The principles that made America, and brought us back during the Reagan Revolution, must guide us still today:**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=af0067d2c9404cd4a874837ca7e3ffad&_e=6XYCJ67nJ0ghbkabBOjE-K4qK6R7NQhOZeXUOAsb4cSSu4odjH3hFTN1LL2q7DEh3K0-WJk5NPM56ZJD1xROUhWx9rjUjE3DyNod1XY5DHD3rUnknpK_Uu_EOFej9psJw2gWyPaJ4bXBgV-unDqlqUnHQP-MCug85sv33lK_y66q9pi6VpN9FrVCB9lfylBBa0Th-q7qNkwu-YaMlX6dhpxNqdjfrqOHJFeLbRUznYTvM4OZT7CKmcQoijVJuyLBgmDJWKKiKcNh8LWwl8BaHYHM2fl-5-_h73ip2VpG3xVDJMwwqaxvkbAC6UHI7h-3wgutCAj9_0p0TXjVzgXLjxml0mZL3lm5ERYGGadhK6RqBbDleC22-I-7YpLCoofebnGP6Pcjkwcjpsuup2XCGg%3D%3D)

* Individual freedom
* Limited government
* The rule of law
* Peace through strength
* Fiscal responsibility
* Free markets
* Human dignity
* The sanctity of human life

**I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise.** I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. clean_body: While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. | | Fellow American - While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction, and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. Individual freedom Limited government The rule of law Peace through strength Fiscal responsibility Free markets Human dignity The sanctity of human life I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise. I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr. in the news -- Thanksgiving week in review
body:
Polls show the results of your support...and much more.

| | |
#### Join Kennedy
---
---
* * *
---
### THE POLLS
# Favorability rises across demographics
**In case you missed it, the numbers show that it's now a three-way race.**
* A Quinnipiac poll shows Bobby WINNING 38% among registered voters 18-34, compared to Biden's 32% and Trump’s 27%.

* The Bloomberg News/Morning Consult poll of swing state voters found Bobby surging to 28% of Black voters.

* Yesterday’s Harvard CAPS-HARRIS survey shows Kennedy with a net favorability rating of 25 points, far outstripping Trump and Biden.

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/polls-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_update_11_26_4&n=1) **If you've been waiting to see how far our movement can go before you support the campaign,**[**now is the time!**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_update_11_26_4&n=2)
---
* * *
---
## Sign the petition to release the JFK Assassination Files
The 1992 Kennedy Records Assassination Act mandated the release of all records related to the JFK assassination by 2017. Trump refused to do it. Biden refused to do it. What is so embarrassing that they're afraid to show the American public 60 years later? Trust in government is at an all-time low. Releasing the unredacted historical records will help to restore that trust. [**Sign the petition**](https://jfkfiles.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_update_11_26_4&n=3) calling on President Biden to obey the 1992 act and release the Kennedy assassination documents to the public.
---
---
| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y1EkSG_cHbbQKJ-1BItYJ-vSTeU1PtkGjtjagy2lWn0r&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_update_11_26_4&n=4)
---
|
## RFK Jr.'s support among Black voters surges
Recent polls show that President Biden is losing Black votes to Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

MSNBC hosts, Al Sharpton and a Washington Post journalist, Alexi McCammond, discuss why African American resonate with RFK Jr.’s hopeful populist message, as well as his honest stance on issues like medical racism and civil rights. **[View on Instagram](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y1EkSG_cHbbQKJ-1BItYJ-vSTeU1PtkGjtjagy2lWn0r&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_update_11_26_4&n=5 "Black voters fleeing")**
---
* * *
---
|
## RFK Jr. describes his lifelong love of falconry
At a young age, RFK Jr. realized his dream of hunting with hawks and falcons. He explains why, today, the ancient sport remains his lifelong passion. **[View the video](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYQl3bPIDrj-pp1wRyQM8yM&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_update_11_26_4&n=6 "RFK Jr.'s love of falconry")**
---
|
## PBS host refutes RFK Jr. border statistics
A recent PBS interviewer questioned the validity of RFK Jr.'s claim that 7 million migrants have crossed into the United States illegally since 2021. Retired border patrol agent Chris Clem confirmed his numbers. **[Hear more](https://www.kennedy24.com/border-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_update_11_26_4&n=7)**

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Our guiding principles

Fellow American -

While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, _the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before._

When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and [**called upon us to return to our nation’s founding principles and paint again with bold colors instead of pale pastels.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=08fa8f3b1ea74735927f661380017209&_e=8HKNxVDbF3KEYfdDsR800HYHFQGEqSz6SZ5dgfmIycrsxMeMepe8df2G0X0DjrSwOV3nvKkfd_qgMdlO9w6KE_e38GT0f6hvypgXjr-gMeGVlitBkbwJT86vudv7O9eyXZZqCdpMrTXJ8vKRP3jgL8m-qkmiTtpgdCrw2lASBQEH0HL6wYszUvWnnCNa5eprbW_1Qvz2nBTg4fv2JQbbXiwFuOG7KTzASiY5hfomKjdpZGoujwUAXweUQZ6UzWscAWl0HfTN1e5Om0QNpWAPViGZa2S3sPh1g30aYnRsK0ahhRwBqa7d_Sw5p7nGs0qnAcEndMHr1vJPU5EjnxySAKX65dabJRWSayAuG1Ufp0bP3RrTwQyt-J6I6zU55hBeQp3Nim-V5c8kudmf92Ipww%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICA > **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=08fa8f3b1ea74735927f661380017209&_e=8HKNxVDbF3KEYfdDsR800HYHFQGEqSz6SZ5dgfmIycrsxMeMepe8df2G0X0DjrSwOV3nvKkfd_qgMdlO9w6KE_e38GT0f6hvypgXjr-gMeGVlitBkbwJT86vudv7O9eyXZZqCdpMrTXJ8vKRP3jgL8m-qkmiTtpgdCrw2lASBQEH0HL6wYszUvWnnCNa5eprbW_1Qvz2nBTg4fv2JQbbXiwFuOG7KTzASiY5hfomKjdpZGoujwUAXweUQZ6UzWsceNf3WXrjSMnI4NtBTu7XbKfXn9QbU8imTEaNuiXfsGdbiGHq5oXxoGYQvCE5YO0ObBSLAR2k4T0dnFJXODhUKolGAc1h5pmW8vhNOnfKrAPvSgB7lg2DeH4994ENeHjlfvI1-0Kz8WhKUKSLwEUyeA%3D%3D)
_Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction,_ and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom.

[**The principles that made America, and brought us back during the Reagan Revolution, must guide us still today:**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=08fa8f3b1ea74735927f661380017209&_e=8HKNxVDbF3KEYfdDsR800HYHFQGEqSz6SZ5dgfmIycrsxMeMepe8df2G0X0DjrSwOV3nvKkfd_qgMdlO9w6KE_e38GT0f6hvypgXjr-gMeGVlitBkbwJT86vudv7O9eyXZZqCdpMrTXJ8vKRP3jgL8m-qkmiTtpgdCrw2lASBQEH0HL6wYszUvWnnCNa5eprbW_1Qvz2nBTg4fv2JQbbXiwFuOG7KTzASiY5hfomKjdpZGoujwUAXweUQZ6UzWsc4Rso31iZCVAjg-2C1S9Pap_6PZSAWEgiJsaNHFv2ZqDl_Bit3-c276pFkA-fsfwkE7yT5CGJSfIff37O-AL4UX8jLUefxXYdBBnCkauiLmUSnL7HjxI0VK6GmNdoe7ewQnlb-QihC9CNyzlIxAszcQ%3D%3D)

* Individual freedom
* Limited government
* The rule of law
* Peace through strength
* Fiscal responsibility
* Free markets
* Human dignity
* The sanctity of human life

**I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise.** I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. [**Are you with me?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=08fa8f3b1ea74735927f661380017209&_e=8HKNxVDbF3KEYfdDsR800HYHFQGEqSz6SZ5dgfmIycrsxMeMepe8df2G0X0DjrSwOV3nvKkfd_qgMdlO9w6KE_e38GT0f6hvypgXjr-gMeGVlitBkbwJT86vudv7O9eyXZZqCdpMrTXJ8vKRP3jgL8m-qkmiTtpgdCrw2lASBQEH0HL6wYszUvWnnCNa5eprbW_1Qvz2nBTg4fv2JQbbXiwFuOG7KTzASiY5hfomKjdpZGoujwUAXweUQZ6UzWsc6GBLI-jiiXAZh3Bl3d4muR8kPl1m9uWGIYYOOlnBJHqfvGn4V5vK_sJ64LN1ujjECV7r4xvoVKpMQa2Z2yqNDdFLYgnwkXoLgi2ZiVHJ8jMCDZk-XWEtZkiL3dg43fVq_Kxw8Ss0I9wDfCxzUxUNvA%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=08fa8f3b1ea74735927f661380017209&_e=8HKNxVDbF3KEYfdDsR800HYHFQGEqSz6SZ5dgfmIycrsxMeMepe8df2G0X0DjrSwOV3nvKkfd_qgMdlO9w6KE_e38GT0f6hvypgXjr-gMeGVlitBkbwJT86vudv7O9eyXZZqCdpMrTXJ8vKRP3jgL8m-qkmiTtpgdCrw2lASBQEH0HL6wYszUvWnnCNa5eprbW_1Qvz2nBTg4fv2JQbbXiwFuOG7KTzASiY5hfomKjdpZGoujwUAXweUQZ6UzWsc2ExGFgCPwCSQW5K_e5-DgtHaZ_g9IkK8HgZTVLfTa86__GKVFZwtEZs8ba0ngBLKiTH-Cz_u8-zqeG1wGPOwuH9hE-iHV57xVzJimJopg1o1_KwKxyUf68SIKfvBsKGRJitnYfs1BKL8-Pz78eutrQ%3D%3D)
As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, [**I need to know I can count on you.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=08fa8f3b1ea74735927f661380017209&_e=8HKNxVDbF3KEYfdDsR800HYHFQGEqSz6SZ5dgfmIycrsxMeMepe8df2G0X0DjrSwOV3nvKkfd_qgMdlO9w6KE_e38GT0f6hvypgXjr-gMeGVlitBkbwJT86vudv7O9eyXZZqCdpMrTXJ8vKRP3jgL8m-qkmiTtpgdCrw2lASBQEH0HL6wYszUvWnnCNa5eprbW_1Qvz2nBTg4fv2JQbbXiwFuOG7KTzASiY5hfomKjdpZGoujwUAXweUQZ6UzWscHDtOluEeeWL_SKEyTeHkJ2BFRiNhlVAfMrzuu54FEl7ANYGJo3YN0-Xu-qqKnI51hxOMk7I7hnuKcYjyAShL14WLD67F6NWEtcBkBm9QLJ19i8bFJPMVaK_midOHOhSsB4ft7be1dmaMfWHnoHu5tA%3D%3D)

We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must act before it’s too late.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=08fa8f3b1ea74735927f661380017209&_e=8HKNxVDbF3KEYfdDsR800HYHFQGEqSz6SZ5dgfmIycrsxMeMepe8df2G0X0DjrSwOV3nvKkfd_qgMdlO9w6KE_e38GT0f6hvypgXjr-gMeGVlitBkbwJT86vudv7O9eyXZZqCdpMrTXJ8vKRP3jgL8m-qkmiTtpgdCrw2lASBQEH0HL6wYszUvWnnCNa5eprbW_1Qvz2nBTg4fv2JQbbXiwFuOG7KTzASiY5hfomKjdpZGoujwUAXweUQZ6UzWsc2EeCbIa7kdPLKGcNYHWjw9cfXgVnzcfiUNN_YjM-YcFFx8yGHth__4T0lt1IyzPUjlSD68A2cvfl_KxzefXuCPjv4F9asaqUMiK6zaSDOX0Thp5daP1fP4rRYA6eS9vZvydlS1kqwPQzBCkTyyWPuw%3D%3D)

[**Join me.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=08fa8f3b1ea74735927f661380017209&_e=8HKNxVDbF3KEYfdDsR800HYHFQGEqSz6SZ5dgfmIycrsxMeMepe8df2G0X0DjrSwOV3nvKkfd_qgMdlO9w6KE_e38GT0f6hvypgXjr-gMeGVlitBkbwJT86vudv7O9eyXZZqCdpMrTXJ8vKRP3jgL8m-qkmiTtpgdCrw2lASBQEH0HL6wYszUvWnnCNa5eprbW_1Qvz2nBTg4fv2JQbbXiwFuOG7KTzASiY5hfomKjdpZGoujwUAXweUQZ6UzWsc-TY5bcYkfKU5LdktNTbXdZ_pDb388URgPxcNMVEdcyJriiiD878iji-WZYP_yJgw_KIYBAuzcTnhS5jN_Xqm3K5mDbULZ-eWhExiT0arx9IBsfpPGBMhE9RmwZFcvnVoEylI6lhTiXo-GxTZqwwurQ%3D%3D)

For America,

As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=08fa8f3b1ea74735927f661380017209&_e=8HKNxVDbF3KEYfdDsR800Iq7LRvxeYi0NDan8taIa89ZDGbDRozti1NxY25r3blzntkuqMHs_txHkyhdiLKoiN_hBT6ZHHaPNgULD9FIrABJSmzl8oAAwTymebDsXn1jCTnYxavyXHNCWsqZMshRH4ltZ2tXwriPsMwqpzUGS7F0B3wvjVnlEVWeHKGDv3Pg2cHsm1XLiYf6OMTZ4X-8f0GRhmHNlSZ27XMn8CLsD5KFUBbnu3k5AhBQ2wcpdA0uK553Iu8VC2zWNcApH_vnsV6HV-v6HOCewRDOpm4bEeUhdS8IpK6m9swYPftTCTEUAqNuc2LlvzYBIqTaFiNNiSikgQCWRyd9Bb9djlnKU7twoZCnhUmrcwUmdJOXmRXa22itwkgtrRf4R_liBczwuvNBp1UtXn7-LWxsW2yFurMEeyfXjAihofX1PjFQu-PeqDPoL_SGHU4rpaHNlAvkZeDnJlMjFCOVS-X8p0GEMor4p50-9ltr-ucQokUTNIYl0-S3aJyhRhKrpw3yaYekepyenrpLqjaJ0DupSwrS0k-Wm4Qvl6DcluYw7zL-Y-Cc1lyowcoAG3ZVScPIQkqwhw%3D%3D) today?

* * *

name: THANK JAMIE RASKIN (protectvoting.org)
subject: What Jamie Raskin just said >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Only a few signature spots left!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57314?t=6&akid=11840%2E878179%2ENYHdSN) From standing up to Donald Trump to averting the disastrous GOP shutdown to demanding Republicans get back to work for the American people, **Rep. Jamie Raskin is a HERO!**

[**As one of our top supporters, we’re giving you an exclusive chance to sign our letter thanking Rep. Jamie Raskin for his amazing work! SPOTS DWINDLING QUICKLY: Add your name before midnight! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57314?t=7&akid=11840%2E878179%2ENYHdSN) | [88 SIGNATURE SPOTS REMAINING: Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57314?t=8&akid=11840%2E878179%2ENYHdSN)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

First, your heroic work on the January 6th Committee EXPOSED Donald Trump and the MAGA mob’s deadly insurrection!

Then, you stood up to the GOP’s selfish government shutdown plot, averting a TOTAL disaster for the American people!

**And now, you’re REFUSING to put up with MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson and his chaotic caucus, demanding they get back to work!**

[**I know Republicans are plotting their revenge by placing a HUGE target on your seat. So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to put the MAGA mob in their place and keep electing amazing Democrats like you! » **](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57314?t=9&akid=11840%2E878179%2ENYHdSN) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57314?t=10&akid=11840%2E878179%2ENYHdSN)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11840%2E878179%2ENYHdSN). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11840%2E878179%2ENYHdSN).**

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
Time is of the essence, and so is your support. With just 4 days until our November deadline , we’re calling on you to help us reach working moms, parents, and families across California.
As we prepare for 2024, your contribution is key. We need to spread the word about leaders like Katie Porter, who are steadfast in their support for working families – a voice we desperately need in the Senate.
Every donation, large or small, can create real impact. Will you join us in this important mission today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Thank you! Together, we can create a brighter future for families in California.
Best regards,
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Notes from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Glimpses of each week on the road to the White House

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_trail_4&n=1)
---
* * *
# Notes from the Campaign Trail
Edition #1 from Campaign Director, Amaryllis Kennedy
* * *
* * *
Peter -- Back when I was a college kid studying in England, I fell in love with a radio broadcast called "Letters from America," narrated by Alistair Cooke. Stories of everyday existence back in my beloved country made me feel less alone, somehow, in my wistfulness for America, my devotion to all that she is, and my hope for all that she might yet become. In these last weeks since taking the helm of this campaign, I've come to recognize that same sense of homesickness in our movement. Only the home we all long for is a future America -- one of health and wealth, of fellowship and freedom, of truthfulness and promise. We all know that this home exists just as surely as I knew mine lay across the proverbial pond, back when I was a lonely student in that chilly, British dorm. And so I figured that perhaps we should take a lesson from that old radio broadcast and share some weekly letters from across our national movement, to keep us all connected as, together, we walk home. This first note is going to be a long one, so make a cup of tea and settle in... There's much exciting progress to report -- ballot access plans and poll numbers, grassroots events and media awakenings, finance committees and mobile apps to fuel the historic work ahead. But before I get into all that, on this thanksgiving weekend, I want to start with the prayers. Almost every day, sometimes several times a day, one of you writes to tell me that you are praying for Bobby, praying for our campaign, praying for our country. These notes mean more to me than I could ever say. I believe that Bobby was prepared by Providence for this moment and that every one of us, in our small way, has also been led through a series of lessons and experiences in this life that have equipped us with the unique fingerprint of insights and skills that we each need to play our supporting roles in the forces of light. Back in those undergrad Oxford days, I served as the sacristan of my college, Pembroke, and prepared communion in our beautiful chapel each Sunday morning, as many of my friends slept off their late Saturday nights. I was often a little groggy myself, truth be told, but there was something profound about that quiet morning crispness as I walked across Christ Church Meadows, where Tolkien is said to have opened C.S. Lewis' mind to the existence of a higher power on an overnight stroll. The early sun would begin to clear the mist from the river as I made my way toward the dreaming spires of town, punctuated just as I arrived by dozens of hand-rung church bells from each of the colleges, beginning moments apart, like the singing rounds my grandma used to lead us in as kids. I have the same sense of breaking dawn about this moment. Bobby is leading us into the sun and the daylight is burning off the mists. It reminds me of wise old Ben Franklin’s quote at the end of the Constitutional Convention. Having mulled the half-sun carved on the back of George Washington’s chair all those hot, muggy Philadelphia months, he said as the last signature was added to our highest law, “I see now that it is a rising and not a setting sun.” For the first time in my lifetime, Bobby is proving Ben Franklin right. And it is the highest privilege (and heaviest responsibility) I have ever known to lead this campaign beneath him. I do so as the steward of every American who yearns for the country they know lies just beyond the darkness of corruption and the mists of government lies. The country of our hearts. Each of you has been prepared for your role here, just as I have. Looking back on your life's experiences, you may notice that you have seen and done things that make you uniquely qualified for your particular work supporting this campaign. A connecting of the dots. Seemingly random opportunities seized or challenges overcome or career moves made that now, years later, make sense as a sort of curriculum that delivered you to this very moment. Take my life, for example. Three unusual professional phases that each taught me core lessons I needed for this work. First, my years at CIA, born of the desire to talk with our adversaries face-to-face, to understand them as humans rather than media cartoons, to see if maybe there wasn't some different path to peace. I joined after 9/11, fresh on the heels of my twin degrees in international law and theology, trying to make sense of the goodness of people in the context of such violence and pain. The Agency was pitched to me as a secret version of the diplomatic service, building relationships with those adversaries too hostile for normal embassies and black-tie parties. I hadn't yet read The Devil's Chessboard or researched the full extent of our nation's egregious intelligence crimes, but I knew that daylight was the best disinfectant and I pressed back in my interviews on the potential for abuse when work is undertaken in the shadows. "Oh, but the Church Commission!" I was assured and, naively perhaps, I reasoned that the best way to guard against future abuses was for good people to flood out the bad. Talking with enemies beats bombing them, after all, and I felt sure that my moral true north would keep the darkness at bay. What I didn't yet know, in those young years, is that corrupt structures are designed to isolate lone lanterns in the basement -- that only a removal of the roof up top can truly flood the entire house with light. Almost as soon as they hired me, I began flagging potential crimes and sending complaints up the command chain, making myself such a thorn in the side of the corrupt seventh floor that they shipped me out to the field in isolation, exiled from Agency offices and charged with safe-guarding those adversaries who put their own lives on the line to offer warnings before bombings that they privately feared would take too many civilian lives. Side-lined though I was, I don't regret the years I spent in that service. It gave me a lifelong understanding of the humanity of our enemies, to eat in their homes and play with their children. My job was never to lie to them -- they knew who I worked for and that by sharing information with me, they were preventing this or that attack. Many of them had gotten themselves into something they had first believed was righteous and now wanted a way out. Wanted to preserve life instead of taking it. Often, I sensed that we were all just trying to escape the same darkness above us, the leaders on all sides of that endless war -- and every war -- who profit from the violence that tears the rest of us apart. When word of the CIA's abhorrent torture program began to emerge, I knew my little lantern in the proverbial basement wasn't making any difference and I left in disgust. I took with me an unshakable devotion to ending the imperialistic impulses that I had seen claim so many innocent lives, to dismantling the heinous tentacles of our security services, and to lifting the shroud of secrecy that hides these abuses from the tax-payers who fund them. For six years after that, I learned a different set of skills that I would some day need for this campaign -- this time in the realm of business and tech. Unable to share my first-hand criticisms of the forever wars until my cover had been rolled back, I looked for another way to help make a difference while I waited. A friend of mine was blogging back then and explained that she paid her bills with affiliate links -- the small commissions she received when a reader clicked on one of her product links to make a purchase. That seemed like a lot of spare change rolling around the internet that could add up to something good. So I hooked up with an engineering pal and built a little startup that used natural language processing to identify product mentions and make them shoppable, with the proceeds benefitting the charity of the readers' choice. Born in a literal garage, our baby technology ended up being used by big publishers like Hearst and Conde Nast. We took venture funding, built a team of several dozen and raised over a million dollars for soup kitchens and animal rescue groups, hurricane relief and just about every other community cause you can imagine. I never liked the tech world very much, but it taught me an enormous amount about managing organizations and leveraging nationwide networks to do some real good. I took those skills to Twitter, where I ran product for their Consumer Commerce Division with an even bigger team, and got a first-hand look at the power and peril of Silicon Valley giants run amok. Finally, in 2015, word came from on high that my old cover had been rolled back. My third professional chapter taught me the most, perhaps, in preparation for this campaign. It began the moment I could talk about all that I'd seen: the horrors of war and the Washington corruption that drives them. I left the tech world behind me and sat down to write a book. It talked about how young people get dragged into the illusion of battle in their blind desire to do something righteous. It talked about how if we stop to listen to our adversaries, we'll find that they are ensnared in the very same trap. It talked about the corruption of our leaders and the profits that fuel the whole murderous system. And when I published it, the government went on the offense. They flooded the media with attacks and the Amazon reviews with trolls, just like they'd warned me they would. They even surveilled my emails, as I discovered from an anodyne notification that Google sent me three years after they had stopped. But truth, as we know in this campaign, resonates at a different frequency from propaganda. Readers around the world reached out to tell me how my message of dialogue moved them, how they too felt it was time to dismantle the security state and break free of our leaders' endless cycles of war. God cleared the way, then, for speaking truth to power. I made a Netflix series about the US Government's militarization of the developing world. I wrote about the role of the spooks in the assassinations of the 60s. I investigated Lockerbie and Iran Contra and tied them together -- the perfect example of blowback, when our country's crimes contribute to costing our citizens their lives. I spoke all over the nation about a different path, a more human way forward. Eventually, I keynoted the midterm Libertarian convention, calling for an end to our war machine the same week I got married in 2018. And the man I married turned out to have a father who was fighting for these same things as well. My mother says that coincidences are God talking. I hear those stories of synchronicity every day on this campaign. In my case, the synchronicities began with this winding road I've just described, a path guided by instinct and grace, equipping me with just the right quiver of arrows to play my small role in this revolution of peace. From CIA, I received my detailed knowledge of the corrupt forces we come to vanquish and the human suffering that will continue to result if we fail. From those days in business and tech, I received my gifts at building nationwide networks of people and organizing millions of small actions into large-scale impacts. And from my years publicly challenging our national warmongers, I received my rock-solid conviction that the lies of a corrupt few will never silence opposition voiced by the righteous rest. Truthfully, when Bobby asked me to take over leadership of his campaign, every selfish part of me wanted to stay firmly planted in the wings. I'd been co-managing our efforts since the beginning and I felt confidant about the tasks ahead, vast and vital as they were. But I knew that official leadership would bring with it all sorts of other psychic assaults -- the media attacks and opposition smears that come with any visible role in the battle against tyranny. I have three cubs and worried about the effect on them. And I knew, too, that many in our movement would feel anxious about turning over the reigns to a person who once worked at the very agency that has stamped out so many lives, encroached on so many liberties, and played what I believe to be an incontrovertible role in the assassinations of Bobby's uncle and father. As I have shared on social media, I deeply understand and appreciate this fear. If I didn’t know me, I would have it too. But alongside that understanding is my certainty that the only solution is for us to run a winning campaign, so that a Kennedy Administration can finally bring an end to the very abuses and lies that rightfully make our community suspicious of government sabotage in this and all peaceful movements for change. As counterintuitive as it may seem, many of the fiercest activists for ending our military imperialism and the hideous crimes of our intelligence apparatus are military and IC veterans who witnessed abuses while serving. Dan Ellsberg. Ed Snowden. Chelsea Manning. Ray McGovern. The presidents who have warned us most presciently about the dangers of the defense industrial complex and the CIA — Ike and JFK — were themselves both veterans. General Smedley Butler, who foiled the Wall Street Bankers’ Coup to overthrow our government in 1933, was a three-decade veteran of the Marine Corps and forward-deployed arm of the CIA’s horrors in Latin America. This experience allowed him to speak truth to power and safeguard our republic against the very forces that he had once served. I attach his remarks below, as true today as they were then, and I draw inspiration from those before me, who have metabolized the crimes they witnessed into an indefatigable drive to rid our nation of such mortal dangers and set us back on the path to freedom, transparency, and peace. Their example helped guide me, when Bobby asked me to take over. I would guess that, one time or another, many of you have found yourselves faced with a similar quandary. Do I speak out for the truth? Do I put my head above the parapet? Or do I protect myself against the attacks that such vulnerability may unleash in the hopes that someone equally qualified will do it in my place? But the thing is -- there is nobody equally qualified as you. Each of you, like me, has lead a life of unique lessons. And each of you is irreplaceable in this fight. As I was reminded recently by a wise man, the book of Esther asks us: "Who knows if perhaps you were made for just such a time as this?" I believe that you were. I believe that I was. Above all, I believe that Bobby was. And so I said yes. On this thanksgiving weekend, and on every future day of our journey, I hope that you will ask yourself the same question that Mordecai asked Esther. And I hope that you, too, will say yes. Yes to hosting gatherings. Yes to wearing your Kennedy shirts. Yes to giving of your time and resources. Yes to showing up. Yes to whatever your heart is guiding you to do right now. Because that is how we stay in our magnificent power. That is how we link arms, across cities and pastures and mountains. That is how, together and at last, we prove Ben Franklin right. In the oncoming warmth of that rising sun, I send you each my love and respect. Until next week, Amaryllis Team Kennedy
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_trail_4&n=2)[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_trail_4&n=3)

Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_trail_4&n=5) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_trail_4&n=6) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=campaign_trail_4&n=7)

Almost as soon as they hired me, I began flagging potential crimes and sending complaints up the command chain, making myself such a thorn in the side of the corrupt seventh floor that they shipped me out to the field in isolation, exiled from Agency offices and charged with safe-guarding those adversaries who put their own lives on the line to offer warnings before bombings that they privately feared would take too many civilian lives. Side-lined though I was, I don't regret the years I spent in that service. It gave me a lifelong understanding of the humanity of our enemies, to eat in their homes and play with their children. My job was never to lie to them -- they knew who I worked for and that by sharing information with me, they were preventing this or that attack. Many of them had gotten themselves into something they had first believed was righteous and now wanted a way out. Wanted to preserve life instead of taking it. Often, I sensed that we were all just trying to escape the same darkness above us, the leaders on all sides of that endless war -- and every war -- who profit from the violence that tears the rest of us apart. When word of the CIA's abhorrent torture program began to emerge, I knew my little lantern in the proverbial basement wasn't making any difference and I left in disgust. I took with me an unshakable devotion to ending the imperialistic impulses that I had seen claim so many innocent lives, to dismantling the heinous tentacles of our security services, and to lifting the shroud of secrecy that hides these abuses from the tax-payers who fund them. For six years after that, I learned a different set of skills that I would some day need for this campaign -- this time in the realm of business and tech. Unable to share my first-hand criticisms of the forever wars until my cover had been rolled back, I looked for another way to help make a difference while I waited. A friend of mine was blogging back then and explained that she paid her bills with affiliate links -- the small commissions she received when a reader clicked on one of her product links to make a purchase. That seemed like a lot of spare change rolling around the internet that could add up to something good. So I hooked up with an engineering pal and built a little startup that used natural language processing to identify product mentions and make them shoppable, with the proceeds benefitting the charity of the readers' choice. Born in a literal garage, our baby technology ended up being used by big publishers like Hearst and Conde Nast. We took venture funding, built a team of several dozen and raised over a million dollars for soup kitchens and animal rescue groups, hurricane relief and just about every other community cause you can imagine. I never liked the tech world very much, but it taught me an enormous amount about managing organizations and leveraging nationwide networks to do some real good. I took those skills to Twitter, where I ran product for their Consumer Commerce Division with an even bigger team, and got a first-hand look at the power and peril of Silicon Valley giants run amok. Finally, in 2015, word came from on high that my old cover had been rolled back. My third professional chapter taught me the most, perhaps, in preparation for this campaign. It began the moment I could talk about all that I'd seen: the horrors of war and the Washington corruption that drives them. I left the tech world behind me and sat down to write a book. It talked about how young people get dragged into the illusion of battle in their blind desire to do something righteous. It talked about how if we stop to listen to our adversaries, we'll find that they are ensnared in the very same trap. It talked about the corruption of our leaders and the profits that fuel the whole murderous system. And when I published it, the government went on the offense. They flooded the media with attacks and the Amazon reviews with trolls, just like they'd warned me they would. They even surveilled my emails, as I discovered from an anodyne notification that Google sent me three years after they had stopped. But truth, as we know in this campaign, resonates at a different frequency from propaganda. Readers around the world reached out to tell me how my message of dialogue moved them, how they too felt it was time to dismantle the security state and break free of our leaders' endless cycles of war. God cleared the way, then, for speaking truth to power. I made a Netflix series about the US Government's militarization of the developing world. I wrote about the role of the spooks in the assassinations of the 60s. I investigated Lockerbie and Iran Contra and tied them together -- the perfect example of blowback, when our country's crimes contribute to costing our citizens their lives. I spoke all over the nation about a different path, a more human way forward. Eventually, I keynoted the midterm Libertarian convention, calling for an end to our war machine the same week I got married in 2018. And the man I married turned out to have a father who was fighting for these same things as well. My mother says that coincidences are God talking. I hear those stories of synchronicity every day on this campaign. In my case, the synchronicities began with this winding road I've just described, a path guided by instinct and grace, equipping me with just the right quiver of arrows to play my small role in this revolution of peace. From CIA, I received my detailed knowledge of the corrupt forces we come to vanquish and the human suffering that will continue to result if we fail. From those days in business and tech, I received my gifts at building nationwide networks of people and organizing millions of small actions into large-scale impacts. And from my years publicly challenging our national warmongers, I received my rock-solid conviction that the lies of a corrupt few will never silence opposition voiced by the righteous rest. Truthfully, when Bobby asked me to take over leadership of his campaign, every selfish part of me wanted to stay firmly planted in the wings. I'd been co-managing our efforts since the beginning and I felt confidant about the tasks ahead, vast and vital as they were. But I knew that official leadership would bring with it all sorts of other psychic assaults -- the media attacks and opposition smears that come with any visible role in the battle against tyranny. I have three cubs and worried about the effect on them. And I knew, too, that many in our movement would feel anxious about turning over the reigns to a person who once worked at the very agency that has stamped out so many lives, encroached on so many liberties, and played what I believe to be an incontrovertible role in the assassinations of Bobby's uncle and father. As I have shared on social media, I deeply understand and appreciate this fear. If I didn’t know me, I would have it too. But alongside that understanding is my certainty that the only solution is for us to run a winning campaign, so that a Kennedy Administration can finally bring an end to the very abuses and lies that rightfully make our community suspicious of government sabotage in this and all peaceful movements for change. As counterintuitive as it may seem, many of the fiercest activists for ending our military imperialism and the hideous crimes of our intelligence apparatus are military and IC veterans who witnessed abuses while serving. Dan Ellsberg. Ed Snowden. Chelsea Manning. Ray McGovern. The presidents who have warned us most presciently about the dangers of the defense industrial complex and the CIA — Ike and JFK — were themselves both veterans. General Smedley Butler, who foiled the Wall Street Bankers’ Coup to overthrow our government in 1933, was a three-decade veteran of the Marine Corps and forward-deployed arm of the CIA’s horrors in Latin America. This experience allowed him to speak truth to power and safeguard our republic against the very forces that he had once served. I attach his remarks below, as true today as they were then, and I draw inspiration from those before me, who have metabolized the crimes they witnessed into an indefatigable drive to rid our nation of such mortal dangers and set us back on the path to freedom, transparency, and peace. Their example helped guide me, when Bobby asked me to take over. I would guess that, one time or another, many of you have found yourselves faced with a similar quandary. Do I speak out for the truth? Do I put my head above the parapet? Or do I protect myself against the attacks that such vulnerability may unleash in the hopes that someone equally qualified will do it in my place? But the thing is -- there is nobody equally qualified as you. Each of you, like me, has lead a life of unique lessons. And each of you is irreplaceable in this fight. As I was reminded recently by a wise man, the book of Esther asks us: "Who knows if perhaps you were made for just such a time as this?" I believe that you were. I believe that I was. Above all, I believe that Bobby was. And so I said yes. On this thanksgiving weekend, and on every future day of our journey, I hope that you will ask yourself the same question that Mordecai asked Esther. And I hope that you, too, will say yes. Yes to hosting gatherings. Yes to wearing your Kennedy shirts. Yes to giving of your time and resources. Yes to showing up. Yes to whatever your heart is guiding you to do right now. Because that is how we stay in our magnificent power. That is how we link arms, across cities and pastures and mountains. That is how, together and at last, we prove Ben Franklin right. In the oncoming warmth of that rising sun, I send you each my love and respect. Until next week, Amaryllis Team Kennedy to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

# Abortion in Nevada
Pro-Choice and Supporting Mark Robertson for U.S. Congress in Nevada D-1 By Beth Weddle, Communications Director, Robertson for U.S. Congress
---
When I met Mark Robertson three years ago, I was a 22-year resident of Nevada and a registered Independent. I re-registered as a Republican to back Mark in the 2022 Primary election. I have been firmly Pro-Choice since the '70s, believing the decision whether to have an abortion is made between a woman and her doctor. However, like most women, I have struggled with the viability issue, particularly at what point a pregnancy is too far before an abortion can be reasonably legislated. Or even if it can be legislated. According to all the polls, the vast majority of Americans oppose allowing full-term abortions. Democrats, including Titus, have indeed gone too far by supporting third-trimester partial-birth abortions and wanting to enshrine that in the Nevada Constitution. I am not going to explain what a partial-birth abortion is here because it so upsetting. Suffice it to say it is infanticide and frankly, murder. I urge you to take the time to do an internet search of exactly what a partial-birth abortion is. Or reply to this message, and I will send you the definition. It is beyond belief that Democrats are supporting such an initiative. Having said that, let's look at what Mark says on the abortion issue and why I can support him rather than his opponent, Dina Titus. Mark supports the Supreme Court's decision in 2022 to overturn Roe v. Wade because he believes it is the correct legal decision. It is consistent in protecting the reasonable abortion rights in Nevad, which has been our state law for more than 30 years. Mark has said: "Nevada does have a statute giving women the right to an abortion. In fact, it was passed by a referendum of the people. This means the Governor or the legislature cannot overturn the law. Only the people of Nevada can change it. Nevada is a pro-choice State." Mark will not support any federal legislation on abortion that goes against the will of the people of Nevada, and I trust him on that. Take the time to investigate exactly the evil that partial-birth abortion is. Understand why Titus stammers like Porky Pig when challenged to explain and defend it. Then, join me in voting for Mark Robertson for U.S. Congress in Nevada's First Congressional District. Beth Weddle is the Communications Director for the Robertson For Congress Campaign. She volunteers her time, talents, and support to the campaign. She believes we need a person of honor and integrity to represent us in Congress.

---
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.

It is beyond belief that Democrats are supporting such an initiative. Having said that, let's look at what Mark says on the abortion issue and why I can support him rather than his opponent, Dina Titus. Mark supports the Supreme Court's decision in 2022 to overturn Roe v. Wade because he believes it is the correct legal decision. It is consistent in protecting the reasonable abortion rights in Nevad, which has been our state law for more than 30 years. Mark has said: "Nevada does have a statute giving women the right to an abortion. In fact, it was passed by a referendum of the people. This means the Governor or the legislature cannot overturn the law. Only the people of Nevada can change it. Nevada is a pro-choice State." Mark will not support any federal legislation on abortion that goes against the will of the people of Nevada, and I trust him on that. Take the time to investigate exactly the evil that partial-birth abortion is. Understand why Titus stammers like Porky Pig when challenged to explain and defend it. Then, join me in voting for Mark Robertson for U.S. Congress in Nevada's First Congressional District. Beth Weddle is the Communications Director for the Robertson For Congress Campaign. She volunteers her time, talents, and support to the campaign. She believes we need a person of honor and integrity to represent us in Congress. Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question. | == | == | == *Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Military.* | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: [EARLY ACCESS] Don’t waste this Giving Tuesday MATCH opportunity >>
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144944?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Friend, you're one of our most dedicated members, so I wanted to reach out to you first. I have a huge opportunity to share with you. **Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday. And you could make an impact that will keep up our fights for endangered species, people, and our planet.** Friends of the Earth is fighting to protect our planet -- and our futures -- from the greatest threats we've ever known. We're taking on reckless and destructive corporations that have vast resources to get their way. And we’re pressuring our leaders to take the urgent action we need in this moment of crisis. But none of our work would be possible without supporters like you. That’s why tomorrow is such a big deal. **In fact, a generous group of donors is matching every gift we receive through MIDNIGHT tomorrow, up to our $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal.** But before we make our general announcement to the whole community, we're reaching out to top supporters like you. We know that you are as committed to this fight as _every member_ of our core team. The truth is, our planet is at a tipping point. We know you recognize how high the stakes are, Friend. And your support is needed now more than ever. So we've created a custom Giving Tuesday link specifically for you. **Will you give $27 or more now and have your gift MATCHED to help reach our must-hit goal and continue the fight to save our only Earth? Here is your personalized link: ** | [SPECIAL MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144945?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
I know that this fight can seem overwhelming. But supporters like you are powering our efforts to stop the worst impact of the climate crisis, transition to a just and sustainable food system, protect our oceans and waterways, and protect precious species from extinction. **And your efforts are working.** You helped Friends of the Earth to:
* Work with legislators to draft and introduce the New York Tropical Deforestation-Free Procurement Act and pass it through both houses of the State Legislature. When it becomes law, this bill will help protect tropical forests and communities by ending state purchasing that drives deforestation and tropical primary forest degradation. Even more, it protects against rights abuses of Indigenous Peoples and local tropical communities.
* Support local Yuman-speaking tribes in their fight to gain National Monument designation for Avi Kwa Ame in Nevada. The designation means winning protections for this culturally and ecologically important area.

Those are just a few of the fights we've won together. So we simply can't slow our efforts now. With your support, we are building vital momentum to hold Big Polluters accountable and win the crucial fights we have ahead. **We know that we can count on you, Friend. So please: Will you make an early membership donation today to help reach our must-hit $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal? Every dollar you give right now will be DOUBLED! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Donate $27 immediately ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144946?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144947?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144948?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144949?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**None of this work is possible without you. Thank you,
Erich Pica
President,
Friends of the Earth **
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D273323&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---
##### Connect:
[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)

body:
Black Friday shoppers spent a record $9.8 billion in U.S. online sales, up 7.5% from last year. Analysts said more than half of that came from mobile shopping, indicating the significance of impulse shopping.

## Black Friday Sales Hit Record High
Black Friday shoppers spent a [record $9.8 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHSpCAQhJ8Gs7EYUNHA4BKzvfRCC2FcuUOggF1r3_7Kjf9sqqb7667-81gf2nkXnr_1SXPd46pNdW9aEUEoEHLtGjvvRIJkQzMqjnySCvvmmNXea-wnhT23OAi-4cAtH8ZRKLl1amjcLLiQiEIhcs77FieBQycnuY0DmsmwjpN1Neb2b3ShHrT7T3xTbk08Gz8ftabC5C8mFiaW67paEzZzP5lYbjQTC-J990wsm9fmH-zZWf2BcsSUKBcoiUIFDZlMzBamdAeNsDnvXQzgArwKxOBdICjaU4FXAvVV9Ymyud17jid4XSp8SOf2qKdv8mzTdUPKoFjHn6d2_lu7_rzi_wAAAP__Wepy5Q) in U.S. online sales, up 7.5% from last year. Analysts said more than half of that came from mobile shopping, indicating the significance of impulse shopping. According to Shopify, the [top five categories](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v8yAURn8N3mxxgRgzMLyLt7xrR-uGj_i22FhA4-bfV8nc6dEjHelI5-O6XJES7ff_uAXbYl7QNXqEBaAXuhdyUZ23MQQRZBcsaA7cSA2XbrWjV3gxyniHWk1K-3HEaBR3ME1coOzICi4kgNAAnPPLAEbAqKSRt2kEZxxTPHhquQyfmfa2hpie-RHK4PLWJbu2dlQm_zExMzGf5znE_HP7rrSHWl8ME3MJDSkxMd8Suq8-FvL47Nec3lvXfBy03_sasOa9r63k12tYWlesP05KieqomeL3DSm9ze3vEL8BAAD__2c9YK0) were clothing, personal care, jewelry, shoes and decor. The average "shopping cart" price was roughly $120. Though most of the shopping was online, the National Retail Federation said stores had nearly [200 million visits](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOozAQBp_GdEa7axOgcHENXa69Ehl7HXwxGBknKG9_ytV_90mfNBrNn_t8tzHF_fHbbmxqyLN1Nb55RpTUS1KzbrwJzMSqYYM9IIyqx65ZjRoY3dIHF3DQQ0cdjMBBL0sACIF1Ew0BKUTqEQGga3EkvGk1qmW4oRud0MA-1lzavznudeWQPvnNpXV5a5JZaz1OoX4JmgRN13W1bl_c9xQ0ERAJmhC_exQ0nWs-Di6yvsqeX1WuscrCLhcvv0y5JOueMpTo7UdezE_evazFepaPkl-HPO3nbNe6paYYf1wxpXjeeqHhsdmY_jvVnxP9CwAA___2R2f_), up over last year. Unlike past years, there were no reports of mob scenes as people rushed for merchandise.
## Biden Poll Numbers Keep Falling
President Biden's poll numbers keep dropping, according to [an analysis by Politico](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFurDAQheGnMR3IMwaMCxe3odvbpkTYHu9OZDACZ628fUTqdKc40if9H4_lsXLi_fl_3ciWmJfVF37TAtCiblEtfRNsJEJSDVnQEqRRGobmZYfJTEhGa9-PKjrnyEHEYOTUr9FNoWGLEhUAagAp5dCBQRh7ZZSbRvDGi15S4JLP7jPzXl4U03d-09n5vDXJvko5LqH-CZwFzrXW7siJC_t8HwTOO9VL4HwrAmeAew8CZ8eB9vbIKV1tzedFbTm_tqOVEnAa1NicNhyVU-Jr1KKXz23l9IuWvxv8BAAA__-Km1pz). In a match-up with Donald Trump, Biden's position got worse in all but two of the latest surveys from 13 different pollsters. The survey analysis shows that Trump's vote share in national polling is higher than at any point in the past year. Polls show that Trump leads Biden among young voters as well. Democrats are publicly divided about how to respond to the barrage of weak polls. Some say it's too early to worry, but others have pushed the party to consider options. [Biden's 39% approval rating](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FugzAQgOGnMRvId3YgHjx0YUvXjsjgM1zkYGROVHn7qp27_9Kv7-sxPQJn3tfP8CIvqUxhEb5oAmhxaNFMtok-ESGZhjwMGrQzA9yazUcdncMZyNr7bOK8oDUmpFtvZoIUXcMeNRoAHAC01rcOHEJvjTPzvYfFLcpqiiylds_Cu2yU8rtcVLulvJrsN5HjVOZD4ahwPGp50iJnl_gi2bjKm3jd5DdWOM4caW_DcdRyhdzWILyvCsem-nh8c8589oOyen0Fzn8D-d_7EwAA__-86led) is lower now than Trump's was at the same time in his term.
## Three-Year World Cruise Strands Customers
A three-year-long sea cruise [has been canceled](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2SpCAUQOGn0exa_Ki0gcEmZr3phhbCRe8OQg-gjm8_1RNPfoKvzr_n_NTkKax_9Y5jcXHWptCJM-cgFAg5t7UdHaJAWePIFeNskIp39TYyxx7WDFYKVOaxqFYx1XdcOz5I6Tpd0yiYkJwLxTljrGv4IHjfykEuj56bwVQtQ0slpuZ_pFA2dP6OJ6bGxL3241bKK1fyTyWmSkzXdTUufi1HpoA5v5tKTJ4c5nJ7rMRUtoQIN-oEJh2UEYwOBj1auBA_MizoYkLIWzwprBCdA-0KJrjirgPk6C3ol05lx1DgbYIj0OeBcMZbr1in0b4u8p5yr6qWrbsm_4Mtv7_7DgAA__9HsXQ_) two weeks before the ship was to leave for the first leg of its long journey. Many of the passengers were already in Istanbul, ready to depart, when they found out there was no ship. The cruise company said investors pulled their money, and it couldn't afford the $50 million luxury liner required. The cruise charged $30,000 a year per passenger and would cover 130,000 miles, 375 ports, and 135 countries in three years. The company said it would refund the money in installments and pay for flights home. But some customers said they [no longer had homes to return to](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvgzAQBeBfYzbQ3dnBYfDQxVu6dkTGHMGVE0e2A-LfV7Rrtzd80nt6X7fx5kIMz_une7CpSxqdr2HjEbEl3ZIcVTObhZlYNmxQA8IgNV6a1Si9EDgnNXkACSgnnq4TXdgvoNwMTTAEJBFJIwLApcOBsFdykNO1Rz94oYDnUFPuvlN41pWXeKSNc-fTo4lmrfVVhPwQZAXZfd-7d3E1ze44gSBbasqHIFuz2zgKsj6_Q-EiyJ7NgizimdVp1szcHuxy-6da756eI8-CrMZ-kJquAFqQbbKZX3uIMZReCwX3hwvxd1P9_6KfAAAA__8O8WP-), expecting to be on the ship for three years. Enjoy reading The Flyover? [Click here](mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A) to share with your friends and family.

You've heard us talk about **RYSE** and their deal to launch in +100 Best Buys.
