Exits in the smart home industry have shown to yield **massive returns** for early investors (look at Ring and Nest's billion dollar acquisitions) and the Sharks think they've spotted a winner in **RYSE.**
[3 days left to invest alongside the sharks - learn more here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7tuszAYhq_G3oK-A8EwePj1V2zp2hE59ufgyuAILKrcfUXVsfN70PN83KabSzmtj3e3iK2xTM7XdMiEeCFzIZ5aHWwUIWEtFg0gDGzwqmfLsb_D4MTHHrqr9xIocADHhoA6iTpZAmJEMogAcG1wIOxaHvjed-gHr1qQkGrZms-S1jpLzK9yyNb4suhs51qfu-J_ikZFY1oP2WszS85le-1yls6Ex7q6RXbFb-dW0f9fdiDWmw3Pr5Rz2jujWngsLuWf9_q37HcAAAD__w1bU5E)

The latest AP football poll shows the Buckeyes dropping four spots to No. 6. clean_body: Black Friday shoppers spent a record $9.8 billion in U.S. online sales, up 7.5% from last year. Analysts said more than half of that came from mobile shopping, indicating the significance of impulse shopping. | | | | | | MONDAY, NOVEMBER 27, 2023 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1885, astronomer Ladislaus Weinek took the first photograph ever made of a streaking meteor during the Andromedids meteor shower. () Haven't signed up for The Flyover yet? You can take care of that . Want to keep up with us on Facebook? . Don't forget to check out today's sponsor, . | Black Friday Sales Hit Record High Black Friday shoppers spent a in U.S. online sales, up 7.5% from last year. Analysts said more than half of that came from mobile shopping, indicating the significance of impulse shopping. According to Shopify, the were clothing, personal care, jewelry, shoes and decor. The average "shopping cart" price was roughly $120. Though most of the shopping was online, the National Retail Federation said stores had nearly , up over last year. Unlike past years, there were no reports of mob scenes as people rushed for merchandise. Biden Poll Numbers Keep Falling President Biden's poll numbers keep dropping, according to . In a match-up with Donald Trump, Biden's position got worse in all but two of the latest surveys from 13 different pollsters. The survey analysis shows that Trump's vote share in national polling is higher than at any point in the past year. Polls show that Trump leads Biden among young voters as well. Democrats are publicly divided about how to respond to the barrage of weak polls. Some say it's too early to worry, but others have pushed the party to consider options. is lower now than Trump's was at the same time in his term. Three-Year World Cruise Strands Customers A three-year-long sea cruise two weeks before the ship was to leave for the first leg of its long journey. Many of the passengers were already in Istanbul, ready to depart, when they found out there was no ship. The cruise company said investors pulled their money, and it couldn't afford the $50 million luxury liner required. The cruise charged $30,000 a year per passenger and would cover 130,000 miles, 375 ports, and 135 countries in three years. The company said it would refund the money in installments and pay for flights home. But some customers said they -, expecting to be on the ship for three years. name: James Uthmeier
subject: Why I do it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=526f57467661d3bc73a6436fbf581517e708e49e2229c18cf2dccdf95f575b4fbc39a3cbfabd3444aa996293f071b0cf43fcdf6dbbff31c38f4039efd49876e5a7ce9286a4f2edb9cfc610cbe3144a28

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a5e9462b3f4a0e3c1c796f12e7cc7c7b0dd0e73c2dfb5d895e369c0ec57567b8cca68f6dc82cd1f69860abdb7bded2de411de80d7f575fc21aaf4a0af6234db

Hi Friend,

It's James, the campaign manager for our team. I've known Ron for years and I'd be remiss if I didn't take a second to share some of the reasons he means so much to me, our team, and the people he's served so well since taking office.

Just like Ron and Casey, I have young kids that mean the world to me. Lucky enough, they've gotten the chance to grow up in a state where their Governor cares about their future, their education, and their well-being so much that he's repeatedly gone to bat with every giant company that has tried to seep indoctrination and unhealthy mandates onto them.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a5e9462b3f4a0e3c1c796f12e7cc7c7b0dd0e73c2dfb5d895e369c0ec57567b8cca68f6dc82cd1f69860abdb7bded2de411de80d7f575fc21aaf4a0af6234db
It's time to bring this fight nationwide.

I've gotten the privilege to be a part of this fight, and I can tell you, nothing is more rewarding than stepping up to be a part of something bigger than yourself.When you support this team, when you join this fight, you get to go home to your family each night KNOWING you've made a direct impact on the future of our country.

It's the honor of my life to serve this team and fight for our cause. Ron DeSantis shares the values of faith, family, and freedom that we know our nation is crying out for, and he delivers results for those values day in and day out. As the head of our campaign, I can't express enough how big of a difference our grassroots team has made for our every effort. We know this fight is only intensifying, and I hope you'll help us keep up with all that Ron DeSantis plans to achieve. He doesn't slow down, and I am determined to make sure we have what it takes to back him.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a5e9462b3f4a0e3c1c796f12e7cc7c7b0dd0e73c2dfb5d895e369c0ec57567b8cca68f6dc82cd1f69860abdb7bded2de411de80d7f575fc21aaf4a0af6234db
Step up with us: Support our campaign!

We're going to win this race, Friend. We're seeing it, we're feeling it, we're fighting for it.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a5e9462b3f4a0e3c1c796f12e7cc7c7b0dd0e73c2dfb5d895e369c0ec57567b8cca68f6dc82cd1f69860abdb7bded2de411de80d7f575fc21aaf4a0af6234db
We need you fighting with us all the way to the finish line.

Fight the good fight. Keep the faith. Let's win.

All my best,

James Uthmeier

Campaign Manager

Ron DeSantis for President

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a5e9462b3f4a0e316b8faf4d78e3a04593c6e02b92697826ddd5f6739cb2dfd382a4f6c27502c378b8af5d5f3db03c0b2c41ac4482af3305bf248e52d2835cc

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a5e9462b3f4a0e306846285e0822714a1115a48f33e1d3d5e219e449b05701b8a89de8939929996d410cede8d671cee1c6466c277bac5a82f06171c14b5eeb3
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a5e9462b3f4a0e3c1c796f12e7cc7c7b0dd0e73c2dfb5d895e369c0ec57567b8cca68f6dc82cd1f69860abdb7bded2de411de80d7f575fc21aaf4a0af6234db

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9a5e9462b3f4a0e3c1c796f12e7cc7c7b0dd0e73c2dfb5d895e369c0ec57567b8cca68f6dc82cd1f69860abdb7bded2de411de80d7f575fc21aaf4a0af6234db

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Al Franken
subject: Screaming and crying, and poop:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3b62a63-d910-480a-b8f3-4e8c644ee24b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Running for office is tough. You have to ask a bunch of people for money (like this), and then the other side gets together and says lots of mean things about you. Having a baby is tough, too. There’s lots of screaming and crying, poop gets everywhere, and you don’t get any sleep. Now that I think about it, it’s a lot like running for office... Peter, I’m writing because my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is doing BOTH. First, I laughed and told him he was crazy. When I realized he wasn’t joking, I said I’d help! [Josh is running for Congress in NY-19, and his race could decide the House majority. Will you join me and split a contribution between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action today to help him win one of the most important races in the country.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8773d45-13ad-41d0-8e89-95a5d97ca43f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44ef3693-8f40-4967-88c4-79c465b5159c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta95d0e8f-4b86-4084-aea5-a11344b66e9f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(The really tall guy is Josh.) Josh is used to doing things the hard way. He grew up in the district in a working-class neighborhood in Endicott, NY. When the local factories closed, Josh saw his community struggle – but he worked to put himself through school and graduated from Harvard Law. In the Senate, Josh and I brought Republicans and Democrats together to actually get stuff done (yes, it really is possible)! The bills we worked on together expanded rights for survivors of domestic abuse and provided new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. It wasn’t easy, but Josh got them signed into law. Now, Josh is running for Congress without taking any corporate PAC money. He knows it’s not the easy route, but it’s the right thing to do. But that means he’s relying on folks like you and me chipping in. And with his time spread thin between the campaign, the new baby and, ya know, still having time to breathe, he’s relying on us now more than ever. [So if you can, please split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today. Josh’s race will be one of the most competitive in the entire country, and he’ll win it with our help.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65b95e34-5518-4748-a6dc-4bfda53a9d28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| Thanks, Al
P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. [If you read this far and haven’t donated already, what are you waiting for?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79b7d95f-b93c-4ebb-914e-02638d3dd22f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Keli Carender, Tea Party Patriots Foundation
subject: ICYMI: Coming up next week…
body:
| | |
---
I wanted to make sure you saw Jenny Beth’s email below. **[**Giving Tuesday**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-g)** is **tomorrow** , and it’s a day where people give to causes about which they are most passionate. I’ll give you a quick glimpse at our plans – we will use your Giving Tuesday gift to recruit and train honest Americans who love our country to work the elections as poll workers or in other types of election administration positions. None of us want a repeat of the 2020 election, where we didn’t have access to various polling locations after the polls closed. If you want to make sure that doesn’t happen again, please help us this **[**Giving Tuesday**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** with a tax-deductible gift to secure our election in 2024. Grateful for you, Keli Carender
---
|
---
From: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Foundation [jenny.beth@teapartypatriots.org]
Date: 11/27/2023 6:07 PM EST
Subject: **Coming up next week...**
---
Giving Tuesday is happening Tuesday, November 28th this year. It’s a day that has developed over the years as a day for people to support causes that are important to them. You don’t have to wait until Tuesday, however, to support Tea Party Patriots Action. You can **[**give right now**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** to support the work we are doing right now and will continue to do ahead of next year’s election. We are laser-focused on _securing_ the election. We are recruiting patriots to work as poll workers and other election administration positions, so that Americans can trust the election once again. **I’m inviting you to partner with us in this major effort.** **[Please consider a tax-deductible gift today, on Giving Tuesday, after next week, or even monthly.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._cjTw) ** **_We are only able to do what we do because of you, and I am so grateful for your patriotism and your support._** Thank you for all you do, Jenny Beth Martin
---
[GIVE NOW](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-Pw9rw)
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._jtAVCkBi7y0MHNIAgAjQ)
---
_Donations to Tea Party Patriots Foundation are tax-deductible as charitable contributions from federal income taxes._
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Early match access for dpwillis67@gmail.com
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2145952?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Friend, you're one of our most dedicated members, so I wanted to reach out to you first. I have a huge opportunity to share with you. **Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday. And you could make an impact that will keep up our fights for endangered species, people, and our planet.** Friends of the Earth is fighting to protect our planet -- and our futures -- from the greatest threats we've ever known. We're taking on reckless and destructive corporations that have vast resources to get their way. And we’re pressuring our leaders to take the urgent action we need in this moment of crisis. But none of our work would be possible without supporters like you. That’s why tomorrow is such a big deal. **In fact, a generous group of donors is matching every gift we receive through MIDNIGHT tomorrow, up to our $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal.** But before we make our general announcement to the whole community, we're reaching out to top supporters like you. We know that you are as committed to this fight as _every member_ of our core team. The truth is, our planet is at a tipping point. We know you recognize how high the stakes are, Friend. And your support is needed now more than ever. So we've created a custom Giving Tuesday link specifically for you. **Will you give $27 or more now and have your gift MATCHED to help reach our must-hit goal and continue the fight to save our only Earth? Here is your personalized link: ** | [SPECIAL MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2145953?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
I know that this fight can seem overwhelming. But supporters like you are powering our efforts to stop the worst impact of the climate crisis, transition to a just and sustainable food system, protect our oceans and waterways, and protect precious species from extinction. **And your efforts are working.** You helped Friends of the Earth to:
* Work with legislators to draft and introduce the New York Tropical Deforestation-Free Procurement Act and pass it through both houses of the State Legislature. When it becomes law, this bill will help protect tropical forests and communities by ending state purchasing that drives deforestation and tropical primary forest degradation. Even more, it protects against rights abuses of Indigenous Peoples and local tropical communities.
* Support local Yuman-speaking tribes in their fight to gain National Monument designation for Avi Kwa Ame in Nevada. The designation means winning protections for this culturally and ecologically important area.

Those are just a few of the fights we've won together. So we simply can't slow our efforts now. With your support, we are building vital momentum to hold Big Polluters accountable and win the crucial fights we have ahead. **We know that we can count on you,Friend. So please: Will you make an early membership donation today to help reach our must-hit $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal? Every dollar you give right now will be DOUBLED! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Donate $27 immediately ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2145954?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2145955?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2145956?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2145957?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**None of this work is possible without you. Thank you,
Erich Pica
President,
Friends of the Earth **
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: Shift WA
subject: Inslee is Jet-Setting for the Planet
body:
For our green governor, attention-getting climate change discussions require spending tens of thousands of taxpayer dollars and--oh, the irony--leaving behind an enormous carbon footprint. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62515610:WTUX_1i9N:m:1:2610672541:09697AC36C9ED0A8464FEE8806B41269:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

Earlier this month, Governor Jay Inslee took an international to Australia and Tasmania. Inslee led a delegation of 25 government officials and business leaders on this pricey trip. Their mission? Discussing climate change initiatives.

Yes, you read that right, because climate change issues, evidently, cannot be discussed over a Zoom call.

Evidently, for our dear governor and his entourage, attention-getting climate change discussions required spending tens of thousands of taxpayers dollars and--oh, the irony--leaving behind an enormous carbon footprint. According to Free Flight USA, one round-trip alone from Seattle to Sydney spews out 4.5 metric tons of CO2. Multiply that by 25, and congratulations, Inslee's posse gifted the atmosphere with a minimum of 112.5 metric tons of CO2. All so they can talk about how much they care about climate change.

To offset that colossal carbon footprint, one would have to be a vegetarian for 210 years or carpool exclusively for 110 years. But who needs facts when you've got virtue signaling, right?

Of course, this isn't Inslee's first tango with hypocrisy. Our green governor has a penchant for globe-trotting, all generously funded by us, the taxpayers. Maybe he's just racking up frequent flyer miles for the planet. Who knows?

But let's get real. The data shows that Gov. Inslee's environmental record is disastrous. Carbon emissions in our state have skyrocketed under his watch. His extreme green policies? Utter failures, unless you count the unsustainable tax burden they've slapped on working families.

Adding insult to injury, now that Inslee's time as governor is coming to an end, he is using his faux "green" image as a golden ticket for his next gig. And that's all while dipping into state resources for his little job tour.

The mainstream media won't hold Inslee accountable - you simply cannot count on them to challenge Inslee after a decade of ignoring his corruption.

We here at Shift WA are all too willing to call out the hypocrisy and hold Inslee accountable. _**[But with the month's end creeping in, we're still $1,300 short of our fundraising goal.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62515611:WTUX_1i9N:m:1:2610672541:09697AC36C9ED0A8464FEE8806B41269:r)**_

Can we count on your support? _**[Chip in $100, $50, or even $25 today to help us shed light of Inslee- and many of his fellow Democrats' - extreme climate hypocrisy.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62515611:WTUX_1i9N:m:1:2610672541:09697AC36C9ED0A8464FEE8806B41269:r)
**_
Thank you,

The Shift WA Team

| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62515612:WTUX_1i9N:m:1:2610672541:09697AC36C9ED0A8464FEE8806B41269:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14353564&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWTUX_1i9N).
---

‘Caught In The Crossfire’: Border Town Residents Flee In Droves As
Warring Cartels Burn Houses, Battle In The Streets

Families are fleeing a Mexican town along the border with the U.S. due
to violent cartel activity, including burning homes and intense
battles, according to AZCentral. Rival cartels began fighting Oct. 21
in Sasabe, Sonora, burning down homes and moving into ones residents
left behind, according to AZCentral.

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I’ll let you in on a secret:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36026%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DuQ8oeTq9bP4VWZHLnTmog&sysid=1 "This is a longer email but
I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden’s former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _“Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson.”_
* And I can’t even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I’m bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don’t intimidate me. _But I’ll let you in on a little secret: that’s not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It’s about power and money. Nothing else.**

That’s why it’s mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian- Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36027%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fuzBG8Z0kSupAQdiow5WzQ&sysid=1 "So as one of my first
moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority
Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between
now and the end of the month.")**_

It’s ambitious. I get it. But that’s the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we’ll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here’s my final pitch to you:

Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. name: Trump News HQ
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our newest free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zojpo49slf89rlvgnnlcuhra0vq91uq67tfelkpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg66oj2c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our new online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can preregister for our new free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu2ut7rc6k51j0licu6bijkpfk07gdqj34bko50g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg66oj2c3h2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen '09
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

---

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I’ll let you in on a secret:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjffjsjmjvt9smj8fph1ui6ga2b3mce8p70dj540_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj2hcqkmh38b4snobds7v75cm5hk75ugg0k0reeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zopavpji99ct8b5v4cmjs00ptj65k6md9lmn4tr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zumj325r8g5a6jjo5oh8m2j5up9j8fafklqr7r28_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ul64r50a4820tvd4mh7k3lev1qcbusk1d806n8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh53a0pqegv8n4b803bq7nvcrcisqifokj180n38_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zup5sbtdpseuqe692le5uuj1g949hr4imil72vh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs "Speaker Mike Johnson")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpsgopovsonhvjrtm950csut5enqebtvqgod7e6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8km0nc8ncl04l43j9leh1jmhfq529i4kre7vf18_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

Diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) initiatives lost steam in 2023 compared to previous years as companies increasingly shift resources due to tightening economic conditions, according to Paradigm. Friend As we did last week, we will have a national activists' call tonight at 8:30 pm to discuss escalating our activity and defining the Friends of Diane Sare committees across the nation.
### **Join Zoom Meeting 8:30 pm EDT, Monday November 20**
https://us02web.zoom.us/j/89721943105?pwd=b3dFb3hzdFJFczIvdnNvRGZyMTg0QT09
Meeting ID: 897 2194 3105

+13017158592,,89721943105#,,,,*559017# US (Washington DC)
## Thursday, Nov. 30, 2:00 pm, Ceasefire Forever! Rally
_UK, Tony Blair, hands off the Middle East!_ **Rally at the British Mission** **Thursday 2:00-4:00 pm , 885 2nd Ave., New York, NY 10017** **Send Tony and Bibi to Belmarsh!** Stop the genocide in Gaza! UN Res.242 Peace Conference now! War criminal Bibi Netanyahu, after killing well over 20,00 people in Gaza, including over 8,000 children, now wants to bring former British Prime Minister Tony Blair in to manage “humanitarian relief” in Gaza. Tony Blair was the lying socio-path who, as Prime Minister of the U.K. in 2003, claimed there were weapons of mass destruction in Iraq, goading the United States into killing over 1 million Iraqis and thousands of Americans. Back in 2004, then Prime Minister Blair called for a “post-Westphalian” world order, including pre-emptive war, in a speech in 2004 in Sedgefield, England, Mar. 5, 2004. With the extremely lethal kinds of weapons now available to warring parties, one seemingly small error can put us on the path to annihilation. It is time for mankind to grow up! This welcome ceasefire must be extended and hostages released, both Israelis taken by Hamas, and the thousands of Palestinians including children, held in Israeli jails. As the leaders of Egypt, Belgium, and Spain are saying, it is time to uphold UN Res. 242, that is a two-state solution to the crisis, including a truly sovereign Palestinian State, within the 1967 borders. Israel will be secure when her neighbors are secure, and not under brutal occupation and blockade. It's the nature of man to be free, as our founding fathers understood. | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231127_activists_call_thurs&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231127_activists_call_thurs&n=2)
---
\--Diane

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I’ll let you in on a secret:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685887%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EXhbXvJ6BvzAGaGXBHStZg&sysid=1 "This is a longer email but
I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden’s former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _“Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson.”_
* And I can’t even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I’m bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don’t intimidate me. _But I’ll let you in on a little secret: that’s not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It’s about power and money. Nothing else.**

That’s why it’s mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian- Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685888%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y7kOw5TEOR4SDL26MuEjAA&sysid=1 "So as one of my first
moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority
Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between
now and the end of the month.")**_

It’s ambitious. I get it. But that’s the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we’ll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here’s my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can’t-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I’m not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685889%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YPg0mhjDX1QFWEuUvBtI7A&sysid=1 "The ONLY thing I ask is
for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685880%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QSaixsENa8HauTtfGO7ZiA&sysid=1)[**YES >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685881%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u96%2fhLAWN26XRHi8xIkmqg&sysid=1)_[**NO >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8fdJhmPFU94hCpbLql5YTQ&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685883%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RMtfT8%2bKoE4%2fbw6JN%2bMnxQ&sysid=1 "Speaker Mike Johnson")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F1aYCvx0I9WCLbtQdb41%2fQ&sysid=1 "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dKEyw%2fBPnRRLwB4%2fNf6uGA&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/majority-leader-survey-footer/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20231127_WG-AUN.102418_t1417036-1756&ex_tid=20231127_WG-AUN.102418_t1417036-1756&utm_content=tv-au-20231127&xunv=tv-au-20231127 "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")
---

| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without “green cards,” and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

[Privacy Policy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685896%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LD50oyc64i5z3d2Kyhjz8Q&sysid=1)

subject: ‘A Revenue Problem’:Worries Mount Over GOP’s Finances Ahead Of 2024
body:

subject: We’re wasting $160,000 per month on what?!

Friend, I need not remind you that the federal government is 32 trillion dollars in debt. Really, that means our children and grandchildren are 32 trillion in debt — Washington has zero interest in paying off their financial obligations; they’re simply planning on passing them down to future generations.
I can imagine you’re sick of it — that’s why we need you to sign this important petition now.
| | | [ **Join the Fight TODAY!** ](http://email.mail.oneamericanflag.com/c/eJxckb2u1DAQhZ_G6bKyx06yt0gBhNzmLgVICNFY_plkvfgnih2i5elRVgtCNC6Oj87M-UaFxbvp3pPuPQG4OpsJAOHvCMD89edt-wy_LqVmr3esP97CGz1-4QMBKPcF_1qfKScMyvlD7YbK9sLgWbS6wp51lNEXaM68uvaToBM0IGyrteaImk1TwzTn9gVEo03leqDAGYOOcQBKT8YwITRr-ASiOTNLBD0GnVJEFXB1RsXJq_lkUqh8fy1lyY-9RgKjSfkUN-Nxy4uaMR8mAqNX0bo4Exh1Wi2u9a68r3eVC9ZA-LiVIANatwXCh2et9hBz2laDhA__4InGyyeCp8uosCg3R8KHRxNaH480KUvvcpErxqK81KuKVkbcpUnLXd7UD5R50zc0RRqZ1PQnLsWCsRA-ROPrL80-jPx1uGoCrYzeWcKH_8THJfnQfrq8jd-68_dq7e2yO-9dbjsi6PwAaFL4HQAA___Y0aTs)

| | Thirty-two trillion (that’s twelve zeroes) is an incomprehensible number for most Americans, but when you see how Washington manages its money, well... it’s not hard to see how they wrecked the country so badly. For example, when Biden took office, his administration immediately ended the border wall project. Ever since, even as the nation suffered a terrible border crisis, the Department of Defense has sat on 20,822 unused border wall panels. Adding insult to injury, storing the materials costs $160,000 every single month. It should be clear to you that our federal government is hopelessly broken. Holding your breath waiting for Congress to tackle the debt is useless. In fact, the more we wait for Washington to fix itself, the worse the problem gets. **[That’s why I’m urging you, right now, to sign the Convention of States petition for an Article V convention -– the only viable solution to federal overreach and reckless spending.](http://email.mail.oneamericanflag.com/c/eJxckc2O1DAQhJ_GuSWy2_k95ABksxLsclgkhLhYjt3JePBPFDuMhqdHGQWEuPhQLlV3fS3das1870nzngBcjI4EgPB3BGD5-vO6v8Gv15Sz5zvmT1f3Qo9f-EAA0n3Fv9YzpUAnjT3UZsh0Xypsy3rKsGcNZbSDquXZpW-bmfK2ogw6RjucZqVo13EpWdXNdUUz0wMFzhg0jANQWijFynJiFZ-hrFqmSUmPQUXwKB1uRkk_W7kUKrjM9peU1vjYayQwqhALvyuLe1zlgvEwERit9Nr4hcA4hU3jlt-ktflNxoQ5ED7uyQmH2uyO8OGsVR9iDPumkPDhHzxeWXEiOF1KulWaxRM-PJrQ_HiEClFYE5PY0CdpxbRJr4XHm1BhvYur_IEi7tMVVRJKBDn_iQs-oU-ED17ZvCufvzx9fNOfagK18NZowof_xMcl-VB_fn0ZvzXt92zr9Xoz1ppYN6SkywOgCu53AAAA__8f5qNV)** Calling an Article V convention is about so much more than just balancing the Feds’ outrageous budget. It’s about bringing power back to the states and people and ending Washington’s runaway reign. Article V comes to us straight from our Founding Fathers and is endorsed by many well-known patriots today. But we need your help!

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A Personal Plea: Help Me Protect the American Dream
body:
Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaejvsr83rken81b40c72ujb11rek70ra39kfth8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg61p74chh2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. The foundational principles that have shaped this great country, the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life, are being threatened. The very essence of our American Dream is under siege. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc2hbcmincuarto16ibc3h3jo6gv1sifhgb26eig_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg61p74chh2bs) As the founder of the American Cornerstone Institute, I have written a petition calling for us to collectively uphold these cardinal values in the face of rapidly shifting ideologies. It is a patriotic call to arms to those who believe in preserving our traditional American principles.

Your [signature on this petition](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo5rvgj6c93latog34no7ss9kseoa7vnf005jf60_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg61p74chh2bs) is not just a mark on a document - it's a personal statement of belief, a voice affirming the importance of faith, liberty, family, and life in the fabric of our society.

The stakes have never been higher. I urge you to [stand with me now](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zllhhk98ne335jhevl6t7rms39nvg22bp8vsov5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg61p74chh2bs) to ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for future generations.

Your commitment and dedication to these values are invaluable. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

adult users who primarily follow preteen and teen influencer accounts,
according to an investigation by The Wall Street Journal published
Monday. A June WSJ investigation revealed that Instagram’s algorithms
enable child predators to connect with each other by promoting content
to users with similar interests.

Pope Francis Forced To Cancel Meetings Over Breathing Difficulties

Pope Francis has canceled a series of meetings this week after falling
ill, the Vatican said on Monday. The Pope is suffering breathing
difficulties due to inflammation of the lungs and has postponed some
of his meetings until he recovers, the Vatican told the Daily Caller
News Foundation.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sneak peek – Special Giving Tuesday match opportunity!
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2146405?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Friend, you're one of our most dedicated members, so I wanted to reach out to you first. I have a huge opportunity to share with you. **Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday. And you could make an impact that will keep up our fights for endangered species, people, and our planet.** Friends of the Earth is fighting to protect our planet -- and our futures -- from the greatest threats we've ever known. We're taking on reckless and destructive corporations that have vast resources to get their way. And we’re pressuring our leaders to take the urgent action we need in this moment of crisis. But none of our work would be possible without supporters like you. That’s why tomorrow is such a big deal. **In fact, a generous group of donors is matching every gift we receive through MIDNIGHT tomorrow, up to our $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal.** But before we make our general announcement to the whole community, we're reaching out to top supporters like you. We know that you are as committed to this fight as _every member_ of our core team. The truth is, our planet is at a tipping point. We know you recognize how high the stakes are, Friend. And your support is needed now more than ever. So we've created a custom Giving Tuesday link specifically for you. **Will you give $27 or more now and have your gift MATCHED to help reach our must-hit goal and continue the fight to save our only Earth? Here is your personalized link: ** | [SPECIAL MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2146406?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
I know that this fight can seem overwhelming. But supporters like you are powering our efforts to stop the worst impact of the climate crisis, transition to a just and sustainable food system, protect our oceans and waterways, and protect precious species from extinction. **And your efforts are working.** You helped Friends of the Earth to:
* Work with legislators to draft and introduce the New York Tropical Deforestation-Free Procurement Act and pass it through both houses of the State Legislature. When it becomes law, this bill will help protect tropical forests and communities by ending state purchasing that drives deforestation and tropical primary forest degradation. Even more, it protects against rights abuses of Indigenous Peoples and local tropical communities.
* Support local Yuman-speaking tribes in their fight to gain National Monument designation for Avi Kwa Ame in Nevada. The designation means winning protections for this culturally and ecologically important area.

Those are just a few of the fights we've won together. So we simply can't slow our efforts now. With your support, we are building vital momentum to hold Big Polluters accountable and win the crucial fights we have ahead. **We know that we can count on you,Friend. So please: Will you make an early membership donation today to help reach our must-hit $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal? Every dollar you give right now will be DOUBLED! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Donate $27 immediately ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2146407?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2146408?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

Erich Pica

Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday. And you could make an impact that will keep up our fights for endangered species, people, and our planet. Friends of the Earth is fighting to protect our planet -- and our futures -- from the greatest threats we've ever known. We're taking on reckless and destructive corporations that have vast resources to get their way. And we’re pressuring our leaders to take the urgent action we need in this moment of crisis. But none of our work would be possible without supporters like you. That’s why tomorrow is such a big deal. In fact, a generous group of donors is matching every gift we receive through MIDNIGHT tomorrow, up to our $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal. But before we make our general announcement to the whole community, we're reaching out to top supporters like you. We know that you are as committed to this fight as every member of our core team. The truth is, our planet is at a tipping point. We know you recognize how high the stakes are, Friend. And your support is needed now more than ever. So we've created a custom Giving Tuesday link specifically for you. Will you give $27 or more now and have your gift MATCHED to help reach our must-hit goal and continue the fight to save our only Earth? Here is your personalized link: | == I know that this fight can seem overwhelming. But supporters like you are powering our efforts to stop the worst impact of the climate crisis, transition to a just and sustainable food system, protect our oceans and waterways, and protect precious species from extinction. And your efforts are working. You helped Friends of the Earth to: Work with legislators to draft and introduce the New York Tropical Deforestation-Free Procurement Act and pass it through both houses of the State Legislature. When it becomes law, this bill will help protect tropical forests and communities by ending state purchasing that drives deforestation and tropical primary forest degradation. Even more, it protects against rights abuses of Indigenous Peoples and local tropical communities. Support local Yuman-speaking tribes in their fight to gain National Monument designation for Avi Kwa Ame in Nevada. The designation means winning protections for this culturally and ecologically important area. Those are just a few of the fights we've won together. So we simply can't slow our efforts now. With your support, we are building vital momentum to hold Big Polluters accountable and win the crucial fights we have ahead. We know that we can count on you,Friend. So please: Will you make an early membership donation today to help reach our must-hit $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal? Every dollar you give right now will be DOUBLED! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == None of this work is possible without you. Thank you, Erich Pica President, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I’ll let you in on a secret:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc3qbo49orcb0fnj8a2fcq3edji4atu20fivq5hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg69o74cph2bs "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziajsu7o95bsk42233do9ql4u7q3jihcrkiabs0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg69o74cph2bs "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1v7nms847kb2o8lh31hfd6nrmas75g4pl8siqe8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg69o74cph2bs "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmnqjm3vo9qf0hn4skjv113e1rsjtcuucl6a2fhg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg69o74cph2bs)[**YES >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze8cn6teh550soqvh6hd0vpbquoi12e2opegvcl8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg69o74cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr1at7a1oli90jq77unkr78q32q5tsb0aurk58c8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg69o74cph2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2osuupjn7db2l4cr3kmsdf9n1trn3ck8bhk6s30_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg69o74cph2bs "Speaker Mike Johnson")
---

| |
* * *

---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znoghmr0e3kpa8q90tqnoaek62fee2q1qin086r0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg69o74cph2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrt79s8c838c9etjfon0416oflaqi4e5e8fdilf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg69o74cph2bs "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")

name: Rick Scott
subject: MEMO: Democrat 2024 strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

Our end-of-month deadline is coming up faster than you think, and right now, all eyes are on Senate Republicans.

**Since Democrat Sen. Joe Manchin has announced he is NOT running for re-election, Senate Democrats look to battleground states like Florida to pick up seats to keep their majority.**

As we officially head into 2024, we’ll be reporting our fundraising throughout the year, which means Democrats will know where we stand.

We’ve already been outraised by Senate Democrats, and with our FEC reporting deadline coming up, we can’t afford to fall short again.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our newest free online course
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhmlftqbk4ok9aigvdb4u9v5udk0n8uk20pa5lt8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbhnq7ebesole41tgqthfp5b0lq6me020gvlvh2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chg6ep34cjh2bs)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
I am committed to representing the interests of New Jerseyians, of Americans, in Congress. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/carolynrushforcongress/reproductive-rights-9415868?e=420896fe25)
---
,
**With a focus on bridging the divide and passing legislation that most Americans agree on, I have the right ideas to flip New Jersey’s Second Congressional District back to the Democrats.** This district is winnable for Democrats - especially in a Presidential Election year!

| [GET INVOLVED](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=80e3ec6b5c&e=420896fe25)
---
[](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=93bd9d3b4d&e=420896fe25)

The primary responsibility of Congress is to pass legislation that benefits Americans. I firmly believe that if members of Congress cannot pass meaningful, bipartisan legislation, they aren’t doing their jobs. Legislators need to legislate.
[**Chip in today to help elect a candidate committed to passing legislation that benefits Americans everywhere.**](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=cd7d15f363&e=420896fe25)
Our legislators can and should be passing legislation the majority of their constituents support - bills to protect reproductive rights, to combat climate change, pass common sense gun control, and more. I am committed to representing the interests of New Jerseyians, of Americans, in Congress.
[**Your contribution today makes way for a brighter tomorrow.**](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=bf9f0d7ab7&e=420896fe25)
With hope for America,
Carolyn Rush

Democracy is not “heads I win, tails you lose,” but some left-leaning
reformers want it that way. When they disagree with election outcomes,
they demand wholesale changes to the process. Ranked-choice voting, or
RCV, is the latest example. Normal elections are “one person, one

name: Pro Life Update
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our newest free online course
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znhulakukfig5qtrme08vopv069qsgnuln25tpk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgouttiragauk7o2bqqu3pjtab833pdp4f1b5v08_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6c9h2bs)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Pro Life Update
---

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I’ll let you in on a secret:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztioivov8mtoqbsf28fminvm0397s5vjt2u3dmno_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zraksn8euqknesie13o7s0cojlkknkcdpl7q2f38_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh8eben49vsgki7na2i1t8hemae878uc8359efjg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgo05k5ut6hvvap51iji1clbp5ud76lp2552e6b8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znc8ihfv96hhu90qnlge6q57rsck66dumdhlfc6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuro0h6ihq3e18acsa5lcgbgjomrtvmf4cuch598_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

---

clean_body: My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. name: 1600 Daily
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zksjliork96jve55lo4sc05alvi62nob222uhi9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cdh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp1hf2ng34an6q9hgk77uou1qoerbqcbjqe3i78g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cdh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi8inik1gh271j1gssb7tftm0onbrnl1gne2tjkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cdh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---
