name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A Personal Plea: Help Me Protect the American Dream
body:
Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk9fb550jopafqveg0g5b3t1otqbj4u160cj59u8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi60pr2cjh2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. The foundational principles that have shaped this great country, the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life, are being threatened. The very essence of our American Dream is under siege. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znngkutomnjt4f7r0s3mhhrif4h0tkb26vasedio_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi60pr2cjh2bs) As the founder of the American Cornerstone Institute, I have written a petition calling for us to collectively uphold these cardinal values in the face of rapidly shifting ideologies. It is a patriotic call to arms to those who believe in preserving our traditional American principles.

Your [signature on this petition](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh33amkr9qrrgp0b4nguba8iilbtup570ca04tto_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi60pr2cjh2bs) is not just a mark on a document - it's a personal statement of belief, a voice affirming the importance of faith, liberty, family, and life in the fabric of our society.

The stakes have never been higher. I urge you to [stand with me now](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7o7i2ofqhq0iqrg7e2o30tgsrvbusrtsj8jq6bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi60pr2cjh2bs) to ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for future generations.

Your commitment and dedication to these values are invaluable. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Let me spill the beans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter, can you believe the energy in our community lately? It's fantastic to see these yard signs sprouting up around the neighborhood. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74045821/440434791/1642379951?refcode=em23_231127_eom3_fndd_gq_act___bw_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231127_eom3_fndd_gq_act___bw_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=488e2f7d-318d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDg4ZTJmN2QtMzE4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c9t8O0mAbCO7GbgW-j3-DDh7DmKALpqvoDpydq5Srzk=)
Now, let me spill the beans on why I'm so stoked about these signs. It's not just about the campaign; it's about us — our chats about everything from local buzz to our kids' achievements. **Each sign feels like a high-five from a neighbor, reminding me of the fantastic folks I'm fighting for in this election.**

As we gear up for our November end-of-month deadline, I'm reaching out to you. Your support has been a game-changer, and I'm hoping we can keep this momentum alive.

You know the drill — **our $50,000 goal is in sight, and your $5 donation would mean the world.** Let's make our community even stronger, free of gun violence, with top-notch healthcare, and schools that set our kids up for success.

[**I'm genuinely thankful for your support, and I'm looking forward to representing TX-32 in Washington. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
We need your voice.

|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685894%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JWWqtl7EY5ROAjjDIZgMWw&sysid=1)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I am reaching out today because I believe that you, like me, are concerned about the increasing trend of legal persecution against Americans who wish to live their lives according to their faith. Our cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life form the bedrock of our great nation, and we need your help to maintain them. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685805%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fu6xW3dMkAQigDl9bPS96g&sysid=1) From a high school football coach in Washington who lost his job for praying on the field (KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT), to a Colorado baker hauled through the legal system multiple times for not wanting to bake a cake that violated his religious convictions (MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION), we can't ignore the gradual erosion of religious freedom in America.

That's why I created the American Cornerstone Institute to advocate for commonsense solutions to these issues and to strengthen the bonds that keep our nation united. But we can't do it alone.

**We need your voice.**

I want to personally invite you to participate in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**You can share your thoughts using this secure link:[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685806%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sCHUIZhs9FwPn6PxJr6f2w&sysid=1)**

Your responses are confidential and will be used solely towards furthering our advocacy efforts.

[Please, take a few minutes of your time to complete the survey.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685807%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fJjrtM9XarUlUTRHA8NEjg&sysid=1) Your input is vital in helping us understand the scope of these issues and develop impactful strategies to counteract them.

Your opinion truly matters. Together, we can ensure that religious liberty continues to thrive as an integral part of our American society.

For Liberty,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

---

American Update

Fellow American,

Unfortunately, there are some establishment Republicans who would **rather have a second term of Biden** than have an outsider like me in the White House.

Perennial loser and uncle of RNC Chair Ronna Romney McDaniel, Mitt Romney said it out loud:
> _**“I’d be happy to support virtually any one of the Republicans,[maybe not Vivek...](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=758d07d9955442498fe57d934da25f7b&_e=hgwsBe8i4aLc6VRw49YwGJA7byBOM_YVaiaZ1Fvr9wEIV4uE_TB5uEkLd4TFXf19NHJQhezxO5wDpNXBCjqBesdVoFGEyu0V7vRuWEwRoI1JGHaxllvFxWMPmpmYqUZtyQHiABRymCHcDwtyEoIRL0ORlGs-FCPnJ5cbs5D2tw4C8Dcivd9Vxu_UUjD0bJ86zLdQuq-w4n2ChLpRYJu4y-IjxIWjTmMa8iZfLNGjzvS7Ql5m53SYM9tldFvVsT6m5MYcWFTKlJrwg2j3R-Q2LKsM1wa2Ypb890exxxu3KfQlQHYZJePWZVsbhtb6BZVCsDX2zLTBe7ZcgaV-wWFet-rSmou-Xt-BwR57_GXr2F2IH85DudAhrRj7DEFWxaf3uxpWCggeRhlIhHkK5AEHaw%3D%3D)”**_
[**Turns out he’s opposed to the America First movement itself, not just one man.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=758d07d9955442498fe57d934da25f7b&_e=hgwsBe8i4aLc6VRw49YwGJA7byBOM_YVaiaZ1Fvr9wEIV4uE_TB5uEkLd4TFXf19NHJQhezxO5wDpNXBCjqBesdVoFGEyu0V7vRuWEwRoI1JGHaxllvFxWMPmpmYqUZtyQHiABRymCHcDwtyEoIRL0ORlGs-FCPnJ5cbs5D2tw4C8Dcivd9Vxu_UUjD0bJ86zLdQuq-w4n2ChLpRYJu4y-IjxIWjTmMa8iZfLNGjzvS7Ql5m53SYM9tldFvVsT6mmGRT9YN9DKDIzlc1d5BHXpLVR17ZTGhOzE04OhoTYzJlboSMk4yfJ-zepkh5PcmaEQeFJh7inSo6BikpOiwLDSOYbzpzDcz7pAM7Eljq02O4f37BckleND28rAxF5i2cjq248cgg_k44Fc_XOGk2pw%3D%3D)

| [** SHUT DOWN THE ESTABLISHMENT **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=758d07d9955442498fe57d934da25f7b&_e=hgwsBe8i4aLc6VRw49YwGJA7byBOM_YVaiaZ1Fvr9wEIV4uE_TB5uEkLd4TFXf19NHJQhezxO5wDpNXBCjqBesdVoFGEyu0V7vRuWEwRoI1JGHaxllvFxWMPmpmYqUZtyQHiABRymCHcDwtyEoIRL0ORlGs-FCPnJ5cbs5D2tw4C8Dcivd9Vxu_UUjD0bJ86zLdQuq-w4n2ChLpRYJu4y-IjxIWjTmMa8iZfLNGjzvS7Ql5m53SYM9tldFvVsT6mOudRDy6pLDPk9hT000sf0xq1lmQxLCxOJnEzekNKD86EEZGuEvE5Zvo6KAHY3f95jomNyDqdzn4mqXGDNZklyT6DhU49OBmo0WtL-TSkENLDz0d5B0l_mmZU8aKxRdPWmANVYCcn8NJvGTfz8ogRLA%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American, I plan to show these Establishment Republicans and the American people that **their status quo isn’t working** and real leadership is needed. The days when the governing class’ hand-picked candidates and puppet string manipulation are numbered.

Republicans or Democrats – it doesn't matter. The minute we can all stop playing the game the Establishment has set for us, we can achieve great things together. I’m tired of the Republican party losing and having conservatives go against their own principles, all in the name of being a sore loser.

Enjoy retirement Mitt, thank you for the shout-out on your way out and I hope you’re ready to see real change in the American system that you couldn’t deliver.

Thank you,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=758d07d9955442498fe57d934da25f7b&_e=hgwsBe8i4aLc6VRw49YwGJA7byBOM_YVaiaZ1Fvr9wEIV4uE_TB5uEkLd4TFXf19NHJQhezxO5wDpNXBCjqBesdVoFGEyu0V7vRuWEwRoI1JGHaxllvFxWMPmpmYqUZtyQHiABRymCHcDwtyEoIRL0ORlGs-FCPnJ5cbs5D2tw4C8Dcivd9Vxu_UUjD0bJ86zLdQuq-w4n2ChLpRYJu4y-IjxIWjTmMa8iZfLNGjzvS7Ql5m53SYM9tldFvVsT6mRRZp_aNH8Yoi2o4ROuE-rfgcdXmG3mErhNYtzEau49C9tpSnF-nEoHHE1Qc2hzxsagfIhI_GGGGvO_AOdA_Hg7VugbQMvwVZLSnfBQmkMJlWh_hc7XvFbI41-5Qb1Ke2j5ZFrngd2E-ScCE5NGzIRQ%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** VICTORY MOMENT **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=758d07d9955442498fe57d934da25f7b&_e=hgwsBe8i4aLc6VRw49YwGJA7byBOM_YVaiaZ1Fvr9wEIV4uE_TB5uEkLd4TFXf19NHJQhezxO5wDpNXBCjqBesdVoFGEyu0V7vRuWEwRoI1JGHaxllvFxWMPmpmYqUZtyQHiABRymCHcDwtyEoIRL0ORlGs-FCPnJ5cbs5D2tw4C8Dcivd9Vxu_UUjD0bJ86zLdQuq-w4n2ChLpRYJu4y-IjxIWjTmMa8iZfLNGjzvS7Ql5m53SYM9tldFvVsT6mlNbQeZfr0UfbKr98xt-6vj_UGwzh5wQ2S0Rdc2FA1OF46Lul_sPSP_8NKPU6ZtW7-SL4ACKmGqtXz2FFDxVoQpLkVOJZ4zqx0uA4ThVQPu4ckt_s6d4OJjL9qvxgW7bFN4X3MgLdcPNwy2DouVNisQ%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Unfortunately, there are some establishment Republicans who would rather have a second term of Biden than have an outsider like me in the White House. | | Fellow American, Unfortunately, there are some establishment Republicans who would rather have a second term of Biden than have an outsider like me in the White House. Perennial loser and uncle of RNC Chair Ronna Romney McDaniel, Mitt Romney said it out loud: “I’d be happy to support virtually any one of the Republicans,” | Fellow American, I plan to show these Establishment Republicans and the American people that their status quo isn’t working and real leadership is needed. The days when the governing class’ hand-picked candidates and puppet string manipulation are numbered. Republicans or Democrats – it doesn't matter. The minute we can all stop playing the game the Establishment has set for us, we can achieve great things together. I’m tired of the Republican party losing and having conservatives go against their own principles, all in the name of being a sore loser. Enjoy retirement Mitt, thank you for the shout-out on your way out and I hope you’re ready to see real change in the American system that you couldn’t deliver. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Sen. Gillibrand
subject: thank you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
you've stood by me so many times before before
| | |
---
Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74046535/440437189/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4608-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDA4Y2UyZi0zMjhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3pOM7U-Cqj-aYrDwTlPmM_MqLjMGB74d8_-NLHG9Rk=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before, and I'm counting on you to have my back again. Will you chip in before midnight tonight to join me in this fight for progress and defend our Senate majority? clean_body: you've stood by me so many times before before | | | Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. = Thank you for having my back when we fought for health care coverage for 9/11 first responders and expanded benefits for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need. Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that empowers survivors of sexual assault in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members. Thank you for never giving up the fight to make gun trafficking a federal crime. After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York. Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for national paid family leave for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country. My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support. But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat. I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A Personal Plea: Help Me Protect the American Dream
body:
Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z07fbh1kvgeh391j1rpkv5k74l50quqlkqglildg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6c9h2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. The foundational principles that have shaped this great country, the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life, are being threatened. The very essence of our American Dream is under siege. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu48hc4rvo0tidf120legl4ppmu8joaincc7rjn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6c9h2bs) As the founder of the American Cornerstone Institute, I have written a petition calling for us to collectively uphold these cardinal values in the face of rapidly shifting ideologies. It is a patriotic call to arms to those who believe in preserving our traditional American principles.

Your [signature on this petition](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zren955unq52v4qborfqcg7l3nfpph98732j5pho_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6c9h2bs) is not just a mark on a document - it's a personal statement of belief, a voice affirming the importance of faith, liberty, family, and life in the fabric of our society.

The stakes have never been higher. I urge you to [stand with me now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgfisdtdadm0hqah67gl5upv4fdgerql38fg18g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6c9h2bs) to ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for future generations.

Your commitment and dedication to these values are invaluable. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Action News

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
We need your voice.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z909jiqpt3fp4v9nlnulmmsarr7sbdj5o1k36ggo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I am reaching out today because I believe that you, like me, are concerned about the increasing trend of legal persecution against Americans who wish to live their lives according to their faith. Our cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life form the bedrock of our great nation, and we need your help to maintain them. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrcriofvn9ie4onbq7cf3tsgfgi7fa377out7n00_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs) >From a high school football coach in Washington who lost his job for praying on the field (KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT), to a Colorado baker hauled through the legal system multiple times for not wanting to bake a cake that violated his religious convictions (MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION), we can't ignore the gradual erosion of religious freedom in America.

That's why I created the American Cornerstone Institute to advocate for commonsense solutions to these issues and to strengthen the bonds that keep our nation united. But we can't do it alone.

**We need your voice.**

I want to personally invite you to participate in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**You can share your thoughts using this secure link:[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrq05jhn9rbdemlh9bv8a7ileajrj4fmfi6a8brg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs)**

Your responses are confidential and will be used solely towards furthering our advocacy efforts.

[Please, take a few minutes of your time to complete the survey.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmd9ckjiuobdol6crhlc9j7k22rud3tivc02afj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi68or6cph2bs) Your input is vital in helping us understand the scope of these issues and develop impactful strategies to counteract them.

Your opinion truly matters. Together, we can ensure that religious liberty continues to thrive as an integral part of our American society.

For Liberty,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

You get to help protect our House DFL majority and get your money back! Our campaign relies on grassroots individuals instead of large corporations and we’ve set a goal of 75 new donors today. Friend, w ill you help us reach our goal and make your refundable donation today? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Refundable $50 Donation [] Refundable $100 Donation [] Or, another amount [] T hank you, friend. Truly, your support means the world to our team. We’re lucky to have DFLers like you on our side! Katie Young Digital Director Minnesota House DFL Donate [] Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus 255 Plato Blvd E Saint Paul, MN 55105 United States [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Let's re-elect Elizabeth. Let's protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority. Let's take back the House. Let's re-elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. And let's make big, structural change in 2025 and beyond — like passing a wealth tax, making billionaires pay their fair share, and much more.
Let’s go.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Let's be honest with each other.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWeQCe1iNK

We have 50 days and counting to change the entire narrative that
the liberal media and political class have construed to defeat
Ron DeSantis...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWeQCe1iNK

Friend - We have less than 50 days until the Iowa Caucus.

Chip in $50 today

So
what does that mean? It means we have 50 days and counting to
change the entire narrative that the liberal media and political
class have construed to defeat Ron DeSantis and our campaign.

If
there was another candidate who we could trust to defeat Joe
Biden, we wouldn't have so much riding on Ron DeSantis delivering
a big win. But these other candidates have proven time and time
again that they can't deliver on election day. And our party
can't afford that anymore. That's the truth, and the data backs
it up.

Meanwhile, Ron DeSantis completely FLIPPED the narrative in
Florida. He took the state from being a competitive purple state
to a deep red state and a beacon of freedom.

Don't you think it's time for a change in the Republican party?
Rush in your support RIGHT NOW. You have less than 50 days to
make a difference in this election and there is no better time
than now to make that difference.

Support a proven winner and difference maker. Support Ron
DeSantis!

Contribute $15

Contribute $25

Contribute $47

Contribute $65

Contribute ANY amount

The
Iowa Caucus is our chance to flip the narrative and show the
nation that Ron DeSantis is the candidate capable of getting
America back on track and defeating Joe Biden.

We're asking for your help. Rush in $5, $10, $25, or any amount
to help us extend our ads and put yard signs out in
neighborhoods. Your financial contribution can help us turn the
tide in this race.

Thank you!

Team DeSantis

Support Ron DeSantis today by chipping in!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Could we grab your attention real quick?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1824e377ad09b803d4ac02dc498a7e3b9bf6fad3c3b70c8d75e60f7e32a907f6258c6f554bed800184ca91136bbeedefe67e6891722d848c51fb0c8ce7c915f1844f39b4cb66a6c94ffcc4db97281c80

Friend,

Over the past 6 months, our campaign has been FUELED by our grassroots team, and we're blown away by the generous support!

We've just run some numbers, and here's where we're at: our average donation is $26.56, and if everyone on our team stepped up to match it, we'd be on pace to keep going at this speed and finish November as strong as we've anticipated.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4c730f255f4e368b92df03446f4f93200181851054066d440de8f2745ae25d6ba63ee8986be2c35a0703abd5512ccf6e9ff153c8ae7445487d1eec09574d6918

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4c730f255f4e368b92df03446f4f93200181851054066d440de8f2745ae25d6ba63ee8986be2c35a0703abd5512ccf6e9ff153c8ae7445487d1eec09574d6918
MATCH THE DONATION

As you can see from our incredible efforts on the ground, we're not going anywhere. And we're going to need our team to continue to step up every day that we race toward election day.

If we don't hit our goal and stay on track by the end of the month, we'll be playing catch-up through the end of the year... And we really don't want to bombard you during the holiday season, friend.

Please, if you can, could you match the average donation of the rest of our team? We know it will take all of us coming together to do what we can.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4c730f255f4e368b92df03446f4f93200181851054066d440de8f2745ae25d6ba63ee8986be2c35a0703abd5512ccf6e9ff153c8ae7445487d1eec09574d6918
Send in $26.56 today!

We hope we can count on you! Let's get this done.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4c730f255f4e368bd4c0c670a5f4753f39712af6ba5bb0bf660804236bc3d44b85e6b9a82d81ad43945ed9803a0864237ead1bbe4ac3387ba600f39cce5f1770

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4c730f255f4e368b3de5887366ff8027c7100c08c98c93e3cf6555802fa4cfb79298a7856a990715b3235b911ffe7352007dda0bdee7c5c4299913f586d81029
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4c730f255f4e368b92df03446f4f93200181851054066d440de8f2745ae25d6ba63ee8986be2c35a0703abd5512ccf6e9ff153c8ae7445487d1eec09574d6918

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: NEW: 🍗 Basting Turkeys & Busting Myths
body:
The Truth about Biden's Economy and Krysty's working miracles in the kitchen over Thanksgiving! | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e4b01c928e&e=567664f14c)

We're excited to share the [**newest episode**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3c128d8853&e=567664f14c) of the No Doubt About It podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, and it's a delightful blend of holiday replays from our kitchen to how Biden has his hands full selling a deteriorating economy.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4de8499994&e=567664f14c)
In this episode, Mark and Krysty take you behind the scenes of their Thanksgiving celebrations, with a special focus on Krysty's wizard-like culinary skills in the kitchen. From doubts about her turkey-brining technique to a triumphant Thanksgiving feast, it's a tale of culinary success (that was very much in doubt!).
| [STREAM EPISODE 55 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d96f365f21&e=567664f14c)
---
The episode takes an entertaining turn when Mark makes a comical Black Friday purchase—a Christmas tree that, well, doesn't quite fit in the house as planned.
Shifting gears, we tackle pressing political issues, including the Biden administration's attempt to convince Americans that the economy is thriving despite the harsh inflation affecting family budgets. We discuss media narratives and the questionable portrayal of the economy amidst widespread suffering.
| [STREAM EPISODE 55 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=13c77c3073&e=567664f14c)
---
The conversation then takes a serious turn as we shed light on Hamas releasing hostages taken from Israel and the disturbing tactics used to divert attention from their violent actions. It's a stark reminder of what October 7th really was.
Ending on a lighter note, the episode wraps up with a discussion about the best cheeseburger in New Mexico, adding a touch of culinary exploration to the mix.
| [STREAM EPISODE 55 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d03b48f33f&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
We invite you to listen, like, and subscribe to the No Doubt About It podcast on your favorite platform to stay updated with our latest episodes. Don't forget to [subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ba9b8a9e2f&e=567664f14c) for additional content.

If you enjoy the show and want to support us, visit [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c13e4cb9dd&e=567664f14c), where you can purchase gear and make financial donations. Your support means the world to us!
Thank you for being part of the No Doubt About It community, and we look forward to sharing more entertaining and thought-provoking discussions with you in the future.
Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=431404a057&e=567664f14c)
|
---

You can [update your preferences](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=0d7c9599ab) or [unsubscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=0d7c9599ab)

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I’ll let you in on a secret:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk3365qnm4vsi9jj0qm92p0sc1h8qgjhqeo19hio_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd01b0ig2gpnsik3ua2hgu9aqvrk5thpsjcqbe1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8nkbiqc8b84u469s1snq1kqs2e4r7mppnd9urag_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhep760b6vcgv5cqn5fbk8sif9pjomgncsebfdso_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs)[**YES >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2u19tnhg7l0u4eqa2jv1mp2022dt9crfhsvn6f8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zioro4he0ah3gd9krteh3kk3j2rv0aorpgua5c1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfrq7mfvamc90mnsr0prfa8bli34898qr1qftmto_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs "Speaker Mike Johnson")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoni8ibhpam0imrkb0891h2kdlnth2u09r0qr7t0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1jtju3bfptr0idrfevqdmjfsqfbkkr93euv343o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zof50ainjqe2e0tb3n895odev0tldsl0tqi17hgg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4cph2bs "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")

It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Shawn Harris via Blue Amp Action
subject: Overwhelming gratitude...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Thanksful
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb1acc41-6178-4822-9041-bb0f6b37f1ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter – I really don’t know what to say besides thank you. Thank you for making the launch of our campaign such an overwhelming success. I am incredibly humbled by the supportive messages, encouragement, and donations from people across the country. We’re building our movement to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene around our shared values of compassion and kindness. Because of you, we’re starting this campaign on the right foot. **If you didn’t donate to our launch, don’t worry, you still can **[by clicking here!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff9e0de0-2f1c-49a0-9397-e4b793e5aed6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**DONATE $7 NOW >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7f9cdae-1a8d-4dc4-9126-ef7adbc9024e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5745d84-d9db-4ddf-9a3f-4089dcb2ae3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) As a reminder: my name is Shawn Harris. I am a recently-retired United States Army Brigadier General, a grandfather, and a proud son of Georgia. I am running to restore dignity to northern Georgia and replace Ms. Greene in the House of Representatives. Ms. Greene is the wrong person to represent us at this critical moment. Instead of addressing the issues that make it harder for us to get by, she is focused on dividing our country and devaluing our fellow Americans — embarrassing us at home and abroad. [If you’re on board, would you chip in $7, $15, $25, or whatever you’re comfortable with to help us get our voter outreach efforts up and running?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e658b7c-4852-4beb-9837-826d2ddaa59b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e7d0391-786e-48b2-8745-23f1c1a00333/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Ms. Greene is wrong for our country and certainly wrong for Georgia. It’s time to elect someone who will bring us together over someone who tries to divide us by perpetuating culture wars. From the bottom of my heart: thank you for your kindness. My team and I are excited to get to work! Warm regards, [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf1911a9-e23f-4d1c-9cf8-d0b3d7127016/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Shawn Harris
Candidate – Georgia 14
United States House of Representatives
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta72af749-4ad5-4045-934e-af90cd783200/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

name: Maria Montero
subject: Reminder: Campaign Updates November 24!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
ICYMI
| | | |
---
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
| | |
---|---
Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District in Pennsylvania.

This week, we are pleased to share the support of Lisa Scheller. Lisa was our PA CD-7 candidate last cycle and came within a razor-thin margin of defeating Susan Wild. Act 77, the vote by mail for "any reason" bill, caused a seismic shift in end results for PA in the 2022 election. After regrouping, Lisa with other concerned citizens formed the
"[Win Again PAC](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QuqYGa4EuLPwmrs7UjD4wUGl7W6av7xqziDJMQvNp4VrEnTs49WDxSPrJotAK_BB1ZoKJ4AIiHjMLXCIWZjKGnlFoLCFeiRR1wCu0OMa83XMDG39-jN6eWtxqVBYeMeXBcfUkLt_hpzVxidkIKHeXg==&c=-ai9TQXwBUlQkhdNrA266wBXJko4vPokVX8bm9Vy603sm3oyAGb5HQ==&ch=i4X9ZRTlw2QiFWBmOeRunFXUy5w2-gQBJvaC9VtF--zXyV_7mxN7rA==)", the only group in Pennsylvania dedicated to increasing Republican's participation by mail-in voting. Lisa is laser focused on Republicans winning again in Pennsylvania.

Lisa has known Maria over 30 years. She knows Maria's work ethic, her Conservative values, and her commitment to winning. The Republican Party is at a cross-roads in Pennsylvania, especially here in PA-7. We can continue the status quo or we can vote for the success and future of our party. Maria, a first generation America on her father's side and a Spanish speaker, has been a committed servant to the Latino community, which accounts for 19.5% of this district, which equals 55,000 Spanish speaking voters. Maria was Governor Tom Corbett's Executive Director of the PA Latino Commission who focused their efforts on small business empowerment, educational excellence, and school choice. Maria is a former member of the Allentown Puerto Rican parade committee and served on Hispanic Center Lehigh Valley's board. In addition, Maria was a founding member of the Lehigh Valley Latino Republicans and is actively engaged with the Hispanic Republican Coalition of Pennsylvania.

Maria is a multi-dimensional candidate...a mom, a former Division 1 Athlete and youth sports' coach, an Allentown businesswoman, and an active member of her church in Easton who can bring our team and new voters together for win!

During this Thanksgiving week, what better time to thank Lisa Scheller for friendship, support, and strategic guidance in helping PA, WIN AGAIN!
---
| |
---
| Around The District
---
|
---
|
---
---
| The Lehigh Valley IronPigs, Triple-A affiliate to the Philadelphia Phillies, is a major family attraction in Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District and an important regional economic driver in the hospitality and tourism industry. When Maria read about her favorite baseball team's new Pennsylvania Dutch themed gear, she couldn't wait to get over to Coca-Cola Park to get the new merch! Maria was thankful for the tour and the special guest appearance of beloved IronPigs mascot, FeFe. Opening Day is March 31, 2024...can't wait!
---
| |
---
| Maria visited Executive Education Academy Charter School in Allentown, an outstanding institution providing top-tier education to students in our region. Executive Charter School is considered a blueprint for charter schools, not only in education, but also athletics...cultivating community, leadership, and intellect!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
List of Upcoming Events

[](mailto:midiesel@comcast.net)
---
[](mailto:info@mariamontero.org)
---
[](mailto:info@mariamontero.org)
---
[](mailto:info@mariamontero.org)
---
|
---
As always, your support is crucial to winning this race. To make contributions online please click the link below or mail checks payable to:
Friends of Maria Montero P.O. Box 1494 Easton, PA 18044
Sincerely,
Maria Montero Republican Congressional Candidate PA-7

| |

Mr Prager is the Founder of PragerU and Best selling author. His national radio show is one of the most popular in nation! He will offer a unique perspective on the 2024 Presidential Primary and the crisis in Israel. This event sold out in 3 weeks four years ago so DO NOT DELAY in getting your tickets.
Other Guests include: Bob Frantz, Jim Renacci, Judge Julie Schafer and MORE TO COME!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Anika=20Page?=
subject: Join Us in Making a Meaningful Impact this Giving Tuesday
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571400?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,
As we approach the season of giving, I wanted to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude for your continued support of the Mississippi Center for Public Policy. Your dedication to our cause has been instrumental in advancing our mission to champion liberty, free markets, and limited government in Mississippi. As we gear up for Giving Tuesday, which falls on November 28th, I am excited to share our plans and initiatives for the upcoming year. At MCPP, we are committed to fostering a thriving environment where individual freedom and opportunity flourish. This Giving Tuesday, I invite you to join us in making a lasting impact on the future of our great state. Your support plays a pivotal role in advancing our mission to promote individual liberty, free-market principles, and limited government. With your generosity, we can continue to:
1. Drive Policy Change: Your donation directly fuels our efforts to advocate for policies that foster innovation, economic growth, and personal freedom for all Mississippians.
2. Engage and Educate: Through our Mississippi Leadership Academy, we aim to empower the next generation with the knowledge and tools necessary to actively participate in shaping our state's future.
3. Strengthen Our Communities: By championing principles that encourage self-reliance, responsibility, and opportunity, we work towards building stronger, more resilient communities across Mississippi.

This Giving Tuesday, your contribution, no matter the size, will make a tangible difference. Your support empowers us to amplify our impact and drive positive change in our beloved state. Join us in our journey toward a freer and more prosperous Mississippi. Your generosity will help us pave the way for a brighter future, one built on the bedrock of liberty and opportunity.
---
| [Donate here!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d1b7642a2f&e=5703353baa "Donate here!")

Anika Page

subject: Judicial Watch: DC Government Spends $270,000 To Repaint “Black Lives Matter” on Street Near White House
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it received 25 pages of records in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request from the Washington, DC Department of Transportation which show the cost to taxpayers to repaint the Black Lives Matter slogan on a street in the nation’s capital was over $270,000.

Indeed, the lack of documentation about the ‘investigation’ of who was responsible is striking.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65965&L=30723&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29jYWluZS1mb3VuZC1pbnNpZGUtd2hpdGUtaG91c2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=572425377a5eeddf707ffad8d8c8ad4f2f93570bcbdd0807396f20c4e9160966)

### [After-School Satan Club Targets Rural Connecticut School With Christian ‘Good News’ Club ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65965&L=30739&F=H&&hash=682316a81138b6b0c5ff8f2592a361f6127cc69df80108af5063c943548fd489) Catholic Vote Parents and faith leaders in Lebanon, Connecticut, are outraged that satanists are planning an after-school club for elementary school children in their town beginning December 1.

A representative of The Satanic Temple’s (TST) After School Satan Club says Connecticut’s first such club was requested by a parent whose child attends Lebanon Elementary School as an alternative to the Bible-based Good News Club. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65965&L=30739&F=H&&hash=682316a81138b6b0c5ff8f2592a361f6127cc69df80108af5063c943548fd489)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently it received 25 pages of records in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request from the Washington, DC Department of Transportation which show the cost to taxpayers to repaint the Black Lives Matter slogan on a street in the nation’s capital was over $270,000. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 24, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it received 25 pages of records in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request from the Washington, DC Department of Transportation which show the cost to taxpayers to repaint the Black Lives Matter slogan on a street in the nation’s capital was over $270,000. (The repainting seems to have taken place shortly before Black Lives Matter groups began defending Hamas terrorist murders of Jews in Israel.) ---|--- | | | | | Fraud and waste are so rampant in foreign programs that receive enormous amounts of money from American taxpayers that the U.S. government is spending $30 million to counter corruption in the projects it already funds. The new anti-corruption initiative will operate within the scandal-plagued United States Agency for International Development (USAID), which has a massive budget to provide humanitarian assistance worldwide and annually doles out billions to causes like reducing global poverty and under nutrition, providing bicycles for rural communities in sub-Saharan Africa, racial equality, and a national condom strategy in Eswatini. ---|--- | | | | | “The FBI launched a vicious spy effort against Catholics and sought to spy on parishioners as they sat in church pews,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “These records show top FBI officials were panicked in response about their domestic spying abuse leaking out.” ---|--- | | | | | Mass illegal immigration resulting from the Biden administration’s open border policies is costing American taxpayers hundreds of billions of dollars to provide an unprecedented number of migrants with medical treatment, housing, education, and other welfare services, not to mention law enforcement. A new congressional report that includes federal and state figures reveals the shocking price of supporting an estimated 16.8 to 29 million illegal aliens currently living in the United States. ---|--- | | | Judicial Watch “These photos and documents detail the disruption and expense of the Biden White House cocaine scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Few Americans buy that the Biden administration can’t figure out who brought this cocaine into the West Wing. Indeed, the lack of documentation about the ‘investigation’ of who was responsible is striking.” Catholic Vote Parents and faith leaders in Lebanon, Connecticut, are outraged that satanists are planning an after-school club for elementary school children in their town beginning December 1. A representative of The Satanic Temple’s (TST) After School Satan Club says Connecticut’s first such club was requested by a parent whose child attends Lebanon Elementary School as an alternative to the Bible-based Good News Club. Catholic Vote CatholicVote and our partners at Judicial Watch are prepared to litigate this matter to the end. We’re willing to play the long game, too. We believe Americans – and especially Catholics – have every right to know what led to the decision to authorize spying on Catholics in church! | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj5gd5hffu9dn7ho0fo8vekd28284p512d843d4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4c5h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrkve5ul2k9hgvn8a0r0qu9gba33l9a7vmq4s7b8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4c5h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq4npdrmcqjt5k86fs08th1jqcd128nk7bomcjuo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4c5h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2fs73gbs6u2vlf5sd9ct64hnfag91vmq7pr8flo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi6aoj4c5h2bs)

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Our race summed up in three facts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Here are the top three reasons your $3 matters today.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1231%2E552475%2EHXY5DR)
Peter,
We’re respectfully asking you to chip in your first $3 to re-elect Bob Casey.
Here are the top three reasons your $3 matters today:
1. **Defending PA’s Senate seat just got even more important.** Joe Manchin is not seeking re-election in West Virginia, which means the GOP only has to flip ONE more seat to retake the chamber — and PA is at the top of their list of targets.
2. **Our GOP opponent is a mega-millionaire with a history of self-funding.** Literally. He can spend HUGE sums of his own money to attack Bob and try to flip this seat. We’re counting on you to be able to fight back.
3. **Meeting our fundraising goals helps us stay on track, and the next deadline is coming up.** We need to reach our $100,000 goal by Thursday night, and it’s going to take all of us pitching in to get there.

$3 might not seem like it can make a difference in a race this competitive, but small-dollar donations power this campaign. If enough supporters chip in their first $3 (or $30!) today, we’ll feel a lot better about reaching our big end-of-month goal.
**[Chip in $3 or more to defend PA’s Senate seat, and with it, our majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231127-1?refcode=em20231127&amount=3&refcode2=1231_552475_HXY5DR&akid=1231%2E552475%2EHXY5DR)**

Thanks for hearing us out,
Bob Casey for Senate

clean_body: Here are the top three reasons your $3 matters today. Peter, We’re respectfully asking you to chip in your first $3 to re-elect Bob Casey. Here are the top three reasons your $3 matters today: 1. Defending PA’s Senate seat just got even more important. Joe Manchin is not seeking re-election in West Virginia, which means the GOP only has to flip ONE more seat to retake the chamber — and PA is at the top of their list of targets. 2. Our GOP opponent is a mega-millionaire with a history of self-funding. Literally. He can spend HUGE sums of his own money to attack Bob and try to flip this seat. We’re counting on you to be able to fight back. 3. Meeting our fundraising goals helps us stay on track, and the next deadline is coming up. We need to reach our $100,000 goal by Thursday night, and it’s going to take all of us pitching in to get there. $3 might not seem like it can make a difference in a race this competitive, but small-dollar donations power this campaign. If enough supporters chip in their first $3 (or $30!) today, we’ll feel a lot better about reaching our big end-of-month goal. Thanks for hearing us out, Bob Casey for Senate To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: stop-trophy-hunting@foe.org
subject: [Giving Tuesday Alert] Colorado’s LAST surviving wolves
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | | | **Should Colorado’s LAST surviving wolves be protected from ruthless trophy hunters?**
---
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2146924?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | | [YES](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2146924?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| [NO](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2146924?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share with anyone else. Deadline for responses: 11:59 p.m._
---
**Colorado’s last surviving wolves are in a dire situation, and merciless trophy hunters and their Big Polluter allies are to blame. Three young gray wolves were SHOT TO DEATH near the Colorado-Wyoming border. These were some of Colorado’s first wild-born pups in more than 80 years. Now, the few surviving members of this vital wolf pack are in extreme peril, and decades of wolf conservation could go up in smoke!**
**It gets worse: Because federal protections for gray wolves were rolled back, trophy hunters slaughtered hundreds of wolves in only a matter of days!** Colorado conservationists have been working tirelessly to protect these majestic creatures and the forests they need to thrive. But now, **Colorado’s wolves can be LEGALLY shot and killed as soon as they step over state lines!**
The stakes are high, friend. But the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service isn’t doing enough to protect our wolves. **That means struggling wolf populations have been ABANDONED in pro-hunting states like Wyoming. We can’t allow this majestic species to be legally tortured to death with choking snares, violent shootings, ATV chases and even explosives! That's why we urgently need your help to protect gray wolves and the planet they call home – before it’s too late!**
**We're committed to putting a stop to these merciless attacks and protecting this crucial species and our planet for generations to come. But we urgently need to know where our top supporters stand, and we’re still missing 16 responses from your area – including yours! We’re running out of time, so please, tell us before 11:59 p.m. tonight:**
| | **Should Colorado’s LAST surviving wolves be protected from ruthless trophy hunters?**
---
| | | [YES](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2146924?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| [NO](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2146924?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share with anyone else. Deadline for responses: 11:59 p.m._
---

I am proud to be endorsed by Equality California! Equality California works to bring the voices of LGBTQ+ people and allies to institutions of power to create a world that is healthy, just, and fully equal for all LGBTQ+ people,_a mission in perfect alignment with mine._ My opponent, Rep. Jay Obernolte, won't fight for equality.
