clean_body: | | | I am proud to be endorsed by Equality California! Equality California works to bring the voices of LGBTQ+ people and allies to institutions of power to create a world that is healthy, just, and fully equal for all LGBTQ+ people,a mission in perfect alignment with mine. My opponent, Rep. Jay Obernolte, won't fight for equality. In fact, he voted against the Equality Act that would have protected LGBTQ+ individuals from discrimination in employment, housing, public accommodations, and education. Support from civil rights organizations and grassroots activists like you fuels our campaign with the strength and solidarity needed to make an inclusive and fair future for everyone. The LGBTQ+ community, my community, is under attack by forces that want to take away our rights, force us back into the closet, or worse. In Congress, I will stand up against the right-wing bigotry of the new House Speaker and the party of MAGA, and I'll vote to pass the Equality Act to protect LGBTQ+ rights that are being targeted by extremist. You can always tell you are on the right side of history when all the right people support the movement! Thanks for your support, Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Friend,

JD Vance here, reaching out because I need your help A-S-A-P.

Democrats from all across the country are funneling millions of dollars into conservative races ahead of the 2024 election. They know the key is to start early and start strong, and we desperately need your help to counter the effects their spending is having in key conservative districts and states across the nation. Joe Biden, the DNC (Democratic National Committee), the DSCC (Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee), and the DCCC (Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee) have already sent tens of millions of dollars to Radical candidates trying to overturn our freedoms, our Constitution, and our conservative values. These out of touch, progressive Leftists are threatening America as we know it, **[and if we don't fight back, our nation will be unrecognizable to our children and grandchildren in years to come. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=07696f21600444f09cdf4c19e7e5f566&_e=7e387e9DP_mK_-6ukN4mqY1VekjfDEv8omM79jR5UDFOSA3jSqtjfcl22ucDHSmWlw7-wWVklG-d57vqJgxu3O9tpfRNnvO7bpHNf5HUEg2-aS82lQMIapS561fgUVs-C2m0BkrTY19IyUKHx7cIU3Lso3a02HLDUbdmdRJNXdct1orT5I-L73E_UokkSdl1eiYlCQsb7V80UfloYgBxRa5A1AnnvL6KjpnXQe6A0MVJwQbGhW2J8KoBYjO8z1Kdo8XArOf20OgJudGEk8ko7blIACjEKJCqf0ivMHJcHbr4xfsAz_hj9jKBEtupFgC--Vn_BVtZ1MaXH_n6dcZjhzYaLMukHSQqam5Qn7wDLr_0nIlS0LSR95uojn7a5bqTMrUh9rmqnlWI51FPRLsU7A%3D%3D)**

Unfortunately, this isn't stopping here. More and more money will be sent by these radicals to upend each and every conservative running for office, and it's not just the big organizations with bottomless bank accounts seeking to hurt the America First movement. These committees are activating their on-the-ground activists and major donors to make a major "blue" impact in 2024. They hope to completely eradicate the conservative agenda we know and hold dear.

**[So please, Friend, donate anything you can A-S-A-P towards our upcoming End-of-Month Goal.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=07696f21600444f09cdf4c19e7e5f566&_e=7e387e9DP_mK_-6ukN4mqY1VekjfDEv8omM79jR5UDFOSA3jSqtjfcl22ucDHSmWlw7-wWVklG-d57vqJgxu3O9tpfRNnvO7bpHNf5HUEg2-aS82lQMIapS561fgUVs-C2m0BkrTY19IyUKHx7cIU3Lso3a02HLDUbdmdRJNXdct1orT5I-L73E_UokkSdl1eiYlCQsb7V80UfloYgBxRa5A1AnnvL6KjpnXQe6A0MXaXuPsRTnPTWniuxjlumkX4PUirvW9ksp8kfvmZ4GPW1rngTzu6sJudT6337fhOsfdhgZRTytdpvL-qIVkBsvqgG2Ifm3TYCZp2h2dXE9D6dAdrP0G2sqfpkkiqP8FHMmj07-o407hJljv5T9GMxuRwLvTdU04FjL8IKw8dyA_ww%3D%3D)** Even $5, $10, or $15 will help to ensure Dems aren't outspending us across the country.

**[With a committed team like ours, I KNOW we can make a difference and win in 2024. But we have to start now. Help us meet our goal now.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=07696f21600444f09cdf4c19e7e5f566&_e=7e387e9DP_mK_-6ukN4mqY1VekjfDEv8omM79jR5UDFOSA3jSqtjfcl22ucDHSmWlw7-wWVklG-d57vqJgxu3O9tpfRNnvO7bpHNf5HUEg2-aS82lQMIapS561fgUVs-C2m0BkrTY19IyUKHx7cIU3Lso3a02HLDUbdmdRJNXdct1orT5I-L73E_UokkSdl1eiYlCQsb7V80UfloYgBxRa5A1AnnvL6KjpnXQe6A0MXKSHpQGFeiaf7d1LMoG3oA7U3WH59xfyqh-NRrhv8pfEtElVH9ueAyZpZc5bIxdpc7MFZN93tXNshj11R5gkRpcs8Jqs98te-5NmGR36VYgnV44r2LiDO6EiF_fGPMeTrM0V0W4cJBXDteZYGaW2vsWXCmHaDjE5G-9ALlQUVyxA%3D%3D)**

- JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. clean_body: | Friend, JD Vance here, reaching out because I need your help A-S-A-P. Democrats from all across the country are funneling millions of dollars into conservative races ahead of the 2024 election. They know the key is to start early and start strong, and we desperately need your help to counter the effects their spending is having in key conservative districts and states across the nation. Joe Biden, the DNC (Democratic National Committee), the DSCC (Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee), and the DCCC (Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee) have already sent tens of millions of dollars to Radical candidates trying to overturn our freedoms, our Constitution, and our conservative values. These out of touch, progressive Leftists are threatening America as we know it, Unfortunately, this isn't stopping here. More and more money will be sent by these radicals to upend each and every conservative running for office, and it's not just the big organizations with bottomless bank accounts seeking to hurt the America First movement. These committees are activating their on-the-ground activists and major donors to make a major "blue" impact in 2024. They hope to completely eradicate the conservative agenda we know and hold dear. Even $5, $10, or $15 will help to ensure Dems aren't outspending us across the country. - JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. Peter, we’ll cut

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231127.MY1YoU&refcode=em20231127-32051&t=1001&akid=32051%2E1203867%2EFpxl84 ][IMG]

A mega-donor offered someone $20 million to run against Rashida Tlaib.

AIPAC and wealthy donors are coming for Rashida. They hate that she stands
up for the human rights of all people — Palestinians included.

We can’t let them knock Rashida out of office with tens of millions of
dollars spent against her. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231127.MY1YoU&refcode=em20231127-32051&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32051%2E1203867%2EFpxl84 ]Will you rush a $3

body:
After a wonderful Thanksgiving weekend, I️ want to take a moment to share some recent highlights from the campaign trail with you!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

I️ hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving, surrounded by loved ones and filled with moments of joy, appreciation, and gratitude.

Following a delightful weekend spent with cherished friends and family, I am invigorated and eager to press forward on the campaign trail.

Read on for last week's highlights!

** Thanksgiving: I️ am thankful for you!
------------------------------------------------------------
This weekend, I️ reflected on my profound gratitude for friends, family, and the privilege to represent you and your interests. It reinforced my commitment to safeguarding our Hoosier values—those anchored in faith, family, and freedom—and to eliminating Indiana's individual income tax, putting more money back in your pockets.
The spirit of gratitude is deeply ingrained in us as Hoosiers, and I am profoundly thankful for the unwavering support and camaraderie you bring to this campaign!

** Final Screening of "Racing to Respond"
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Last week, I had the privilege of attending and speaking at the Final Screening of "Racing to Respond" at Gainbridge Fieldhouse.

This documentary, produced by Riley Children's Health, sheds light on Indiana's youth mental health crisis and outlines a new course for our state's youth mental health care.
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Sadly, Indiana continues to outpace the national average in youth suicide rates, with suicide being the second leading cause of death among young Hoosiers.

The documentary shares powerful stories and emphasizes how Hoosiers are uniting to combat this crisis.

Click here to watch the trailer for "Racing To Respond" (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_jet59zJI14&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Organization Day at the Statehouse
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Last Tuesday marked Organization Day at the statehouse—the ceremonial start to the 2024 legislative session. It was a busy day meeting with leaders, including meeting with members of the Indiana County Commissioners.

And, as the president of the Indiana Senate, I️ gaveled the Senate chamber to order, officially starting the second legislative session of the 123rd General Assembly.

Lawmakers will reconvene on Jan. 8, 2024, to begin addressing crucial legislation for our state.

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne is a hard-working leader who has executed leadership from the county level to her current role as Lt. Governor. She has a strong connection to the everyday person, and I appreciate that she has always supported law enforcement. I am pleased to endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“Suzanne has the unique knowledge of understanding the needs of Indiana’s local communities, having served as an auditor and county commissioner. Not only will she help local communities as our future Governor, but she has also demonstrated her skills in knowing the needs of small businesses in her role as Lt. Governor. Suzanne knows how to help communities with their unique needs, and she knows how to grow Indiana businesses!"
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“Suzanne is a connector, a strategist, and a visionary. She truly knows and loves Indiana and its people, and her career has been one of exemplary public service. I’ve worked alongside her in the Statehouse and have seen firsthand her tireless work ethic, her deep commitment to Hoosiers, and her determination to find the best ways to keep Indiana growing in strength and opportunities."

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Thank you for your ongoing support and commitment to building a stronger, more vibrant Indiana.

Together, we can address the challenges our state faces and create a future filled with opportunities for all Hoosiers.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Website (https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers!
------------------------------------------------------------
Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future.

If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events:
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

** Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise!
------------------------------------------------------------

As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)!
SHOP (https://shop.crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7ce11fef48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_21_03_16&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ce11fef48-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
We need your voice.

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36156%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9SrJRO%2b8yAdqY60LYmQiNQ&sysid=1)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I am reaching out today because I believe that you, like me, are concerned about the increasing trend of legal persecution against Americans who wish to live their lives according to their faith. Our cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life form the bedrock of our great nation, and we need your help to maintain them. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36157%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O1s1ljgSUDu%2foUzfEoUesw&sysid=1) From a high school football coach in Washington who lost his job for praying on the field (KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT), to a Colorado baker hauled through the legal system multiple times for not wanting to bake a cake that violated his religious convictions (MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION), we can't ignore the gradual erosion of religious freedom in America.

That's why I created the American Cornerstone Institute to advocate for commonsense solutions to these issues and to strengthen the bonds that keep our nation united. But we can't do it alone.

**We need your voice.**

I want to personally invite you to participate in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**You can share your thoughts using this secure link:[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36158%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cOcx3WVvHxxhkJi5aR%2forA&sysid=1)**

Your responses are confidential and will be used solely towards furthering our advocacy efforts.

[Please, take a few minutes of your time to complete the survey.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36159%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jhQYqWyBeDIdKMGvbHH0yg&sysid=1) Your input is vital in helping us understand the scope of these issues and develop impactful strategies to counteract them.

Your opinion truly matters. Together, we can ensure that religious liberty continues to thrive as an integral part of our American society.

For Liberty,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Your America News
---

subject: Bad news

body:
We expected a slow down, but we really need to pick up the pace now
#

Team, unfortunately we need to share some bad news with you today:
We had a **_big**_ fundraising slowdown over the holiday weekend, and we don’t have much time left in the month to catch up on our November goals.
[**Will you rush a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC to help us close our fundraising gap?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231127-1-30&t=1&akid=6955%2E3935704%2EDpZSbH)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231127-1-30&t=2&akid=6955%2E3935704%2EDpZSbH)**
Thanksgiving week is historically one of the slowest weeks of the year for fundraising. We understand, and we hope you were able to take some time with loved ones to rest and recharge.
But team, we faced a much more significant slowdown than we anticipated. Now, we really need to pick up the pace to reach our November goals. The fight to end gun violence never stops, which means we can’t afford to take a break in our work to save lives.
[**Will you please use this link to make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC? Help us reach our goals before our end of month fundraising deadline on Thursday.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231127-1-30&t=3&akid=6955%2E3935704%2EDpZSbH)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov23.ka8v8M&amount=3&t=22&akid=6955%2E3935704%2EDpZSbH)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A Personal Plea: Help Me Protect the American Dream
body:
Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmi8iosbo63grd5onrbmb1pv5kihr02o8282s4d0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi61o71cjh2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. The foundational principles that have shaped this great country, the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life, are being threatened. The very essence of our American Dream is under siege. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8cnkmi3opn99htstgmn1u0cvn78i1hfhmpi0t2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi61o71cjh2bs) As the founder of the American Cornerstone Institute, I have written a petition calling for us to collectively uphold these cardinal values in the face of rapidly shifting ideologies. It is a patriotic call to arms to those who believe in preserving our traditional American principles.

Your [signature on this petition](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlt47hih00groumcc0jundso5fl6gtgfj7ck8q60_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi61o71cjh2bs) is not just a mark on a document - it's a personal statement of belief, a voice affirming the importance of faith, liberty, family, and life in the fabric of our society.

The stakes have never been higher. I urge you to [stand with me now](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaibrjjb4gf81tg2eblou9vrm1pic77dd8c90jo0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34chi61o71cjh2bs) to ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for future generations.

Your commitment and dedication to these values are invaluable. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

I wanted you to be the first to know, friend: Moments ago, I officially filed for reelection in Illinois’ 13th district. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74058513/440478739/-593305170?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20231127_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY1NTVkOC00MDhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-oCK1JUAaRHbRAGBk8I42oKupx2vdEyX__1LyRcw30=) **[Before I explain more about the significance of this moment, will you donate $5 or more now to become a Founding Donor and kick my campaign off strong? Our first fundraising deadline of my official reelection campaign is this Thursday, so I’m counting on your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74058514/440478740/-593305170?amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20231127_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY1NTVkOC00MDhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-oCK1JUAaRHbRAGBk8I42oKupx2vdEyX__1LyRcw30=)** I was born in Peoria, Illinois where my parents taught me from a young age the importance of family, community, and service to others. **Thanks to the values instilled in me by my family, I’ve spent my entire life fighting on behalf of working families.** After graduating college, I traveled the country fighting to get hardworking people the pay and workplace safety conditions they deserve. I worked for the International Association of Fire Fighters’ union to help look out for our first responders who put their lives on the line for us every day and make sure they have the equipment, training, and health protections they need. Then I stood with United Food and Commercial Workers International Workers union, helping successfully secure a fair day’s pay and workplace protections at dangerous processing plants. **As a senior advisor to Illinois Governor JB Pritzker, I successfully brought workers, small businesses, and elected officials to the negotiating table and secured a $15 minimum wage so that all working families across Illinois can maintain a decent standard of living.** **But I knew I needed to do more.** So I took my fight to Congress to build on my accomplishments and ensure that every family across the country has access to affordable education, reproductive healthcare, and accessible child care — leaving no one behind. This grassroots movement supported me all the way through Election Day and helped me make history by electing me as the first woman to represent IL-13 and flipping this seat blue for the first time in decades. Since then, I’ve cut through the noise and gridlock to build bipartisan relationships in Washington to lower everyday costs for working families, invest in economic development for rural communities, and make quality healthcare more accessible. **And my work is just getting started.** That’s why I am so grateful to you and our entire movement for powering my campaign’s efforts to gather the required signatures needed to get my name on the ballot to run for election here in Illinois. It is because you’ve opened emails, chipped in when you can, and offered your support by knocking door to door that I was able to file moments ago and can now officially kick off my reelection campaign. It was no easy feat to get my name on the ballot. But with National Republicans already eyeing our district and looking to spend big to expand their narrow House majority, this is just the beginning of our fight to reelect me in 2024. **[Our next big test is our November end-of-month deadline this Thursday at midnight, and we have countless more deadlines and goals that will test the strength of our movement over the next year. If you can, please chip in to become a Founding Donor and help us start my official reelection campaign with momentum:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74058515/440478741/-593305170?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20231127_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY1NTVkOC00MDhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-oCK1JUAaRHbRAGBk8I42oKupx2vdEyX__1LyRcw30=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74058516/440478742/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20231127_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY1NTVkOC00MDhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-oCK1JUAaRHbRAGBk8I42oKupx2vdEyX__1LyRcw30=) ** | | **[CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74058517/440478743/-593305170?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_LAU_RES_AC_20231127_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY1NTVkOC00MDhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-oCK1JUAaRHbRAGBk8I42oKupx2vdEyX__1LyRcw30=)**

PA-01 is one of the most competitive districts in the entire country. And winning back the House majority is much, much easier if Democrats invest in — and win — this seat in 2024.
And we've got a great candidate to do it with: a veteran Apache helicopter pilot with a spine of steel named Ashley Ehasz.
Two weeks ago, Pennsylvanians showed just how fed up we are with Republicans' weak, failed leadership. GOP Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick is on notice that we’re paying attention, we’re pissed off, and we’re fired up to elect leaders who will fight for ALL of us — not wage BS culture wars on behalf of MAGA and Trump.
[Let's build on this momentum! Right now we're $3,149 short of our grassroots fundraising goal for the month. clean_body: You know it’s important when both of us are reaching out together. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Hi Peter, it's Joe. Joe Biden | | And this is Kamala. Kamala Harris | If you're up for it, we'd love to meet you for a cup of coffee. Kamala Harris Since my very first campaign, getting to talk one on one with supporters has been one of my favorite parts of running for office. Joe Biden | | I feel the same. So that's what we want to do. With you. Kamala Harris All you have to do is make a contribution of $25, or any amount, to be automatically entered for a chance to have a Cup of Joe with both of us. Joe Biden | | Not only that, but your donation will ensure we have the resources we need at a crucial stage of this race. Kamala Harris It's a win-win. Joe Biden | | What do you say? Kamala Harris | Kamala Harris All you'll have to do is let us know how you like your coffee. Joe Biden | | Hope to see you soon. Kamala Harris | | Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are facing millions of dollars of attack ads across the country. As Republicans get closer to picking a nominee, we need your help to fight back. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | |

Team, we’ve got some bad news. We just went through our fundraising numbers for this month and the results aren’t great. We’re only 65% towards our monthly fundraising goal and have until Thursday at midnight before our deadline passes. Look, we’re not going to claim that the sky is falling, but we are concerned. We can’t afford to see a decline in fundraising right as we’re about to head into an election year. MAGA Republicans are raising an unprecedented amount of money to reach as many voters as possible and stifle the campaigns of Democrats up and down the ballot — and they’re not going to stop. **[So we’re asking: Ahead of November’s end-of-month deadline, will you help us get back on track by donating any amount you can today so that we can have the resources we need to counter MAGA attacks, defend our record, and win in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74059702/440482900/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231127_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQyYzI3MWItNDM4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S7p07Io-GrcTLzOwbImR94W7fEtDLiM1OWeuoWd4YCI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74059703/440482928/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231127_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQyYzI3MWItNDM4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S7p07Io-GrcTLzOwbImR94W7fEtDLiM1OWeuoWd4YCI=)

| Be BRAVE Book Spotlight:
---
|
---
| One of the six titles we will be donating is Nicole Saphier's book That's What Family's For, which she wrote with her son Hudson! In this story, children will follow the adventures of one sweet monkey, Jeff, who falls ill and needs some cheering up. His family goes above and beyond to help him think of a Would-If-I-Could List full of fun activities. They show Jeff how much they love him and that no matter what hard things come their way, the love and support of family is what truly matters.
---
|
---
| About the Author: Dr. Nicole Saphier is an American medical journalist, radiologist, and writer. She is the Director of Breast Imaging at Memorial Sloan Kettering (MSK) Monmouth, New Jersey. She is well known for providing her expert opinions as a contributor on Fox News, Fox Business, and MSNBC.

They show Jeff how much they love him and that no matter what hard things come their way, the love and support of family is what truly matters. | | About the Author: Dr. Nicole Saphier is an American medical journalist, radiologist, and writer. She is the Director of Breast Imaging at Memorial Sloan Kettering (MSK) Monmouth, New Jersey. She is well known for providing her expert opinions as a contributor on Fox News, Fox Business, and MSNBC. | == | | == | "And let us consider how we may spur one another on toward love and good deeds" \- Hebrews 10:24 Thank you! | == | | | | | | | Citizens Defending Freedom | PO Box 156, Mulberry, FL 33860 | | Sent by mailto:communications@ccdfusa.info

Tom is the proud husband to Rhonda and the proud father to two beautiful daughters. Their family resides in the wonderful city of Westfield, New Jersey. Tom's commitment to the people of New Jersey has been inspired by a legacy of **dedicated public service** from his grandfather, former U.S. Representative Robert Kean, to his father, former Governor Thomas H. Kean Sr. Kean has always understood and recognized the importance of civic engagement and is honored to **represent the people of New Jersey's 7th Congressional District** in Congress. From his early days in the Environmental Protection Agency during the George H.W. Bush Administration (where he met his incredible wife Rhonda), to serving as a volunteer firefighter and an emergency medical technician in Washington, D.C. — Tom has always had a heart for making our world a better, freer, safer place. Determined to answer the call to public service again, Tom Kean Jr. believed he, personally, could turn ideas into action and make a lasting difference in people’s lives. In 2001, Tom was elected to the New Jersey General Assembly, and two years later, was named to the upper house of the state legislature after his tireless work in ethics reform. Then in 2008, his peers unanimously elected him Republican Leader in the New Jersey Senate. Shortly thereafter, he unveiled his caucus’ job creation package, **“Common-Sense Plan for a More Affordable New Jersey,”** which ultimately reversed the course that previous administrations were quickly leading the state down. To this day, Tom continues to build upon his proven track record of delivering for the people of New Jersey in Congress:
* **Passed legislation advocating for Veteran-Owned small businesses**
* **Passed legislation to improve commuter rail transportation**
* **Passed a resolution affirming strong US support for Ukraine**
* **Passed legislation to support mental health for school children**

clean_body: Limited Edition | | | | | Did you see it, Friend?! Did you see Team Kean’s ? If you haven’t yet, you will soon. It is going VIRAL—selling over 3,000 on DAY 1 of our big launch! Turns out, folks are really passionate about Keeping the House Majority Republican and out of reach from the Radical Left’s reckless agenda. | | | | So go ahead, claim yours today to support TK and Keep the House RED!🇺🇸☕ - Thanks so much, Caroline | | — MEET REP. TOM KEAN, JR. — Tom is the proud husband to Rhonda and the proud father to two beautiful daughters. Their family resides in the wonderful city of Westfield, New Jersey. Tom's commitment to the people of New Jersey has been inspired by a legacy of dedicated public service from his grandfather, former U.S. Representative Robert Kean, to his father, former Governor Thomas H. Kean Sr. Kean has always understood and recognized the importance of civic engagement and is honored to represent the people of New Jersey's 7th Congressional District in Congress. From his early days in the Environmental Protection Agency during the George H.W. Bush Administration (where he met his incredible wife Rhonda), to serving as a volunteer firefighter and an emergency medical technician in Washington, D.C. — Tom has always had a heart for making our world a better, freer, safer place. Determined to answer the call to public service again, Tom Kean Jr. believed he, personally, could turn ideas into action and make a lasting difference in people’s lives. In 2001, Tom was elected to the New Jersey General Assembly, and two years later, was named to the upper house of the state legislature after his tireless work in ethics reform. Then in 2008, his peers unanimously elected him Republican Leader in the New Jersey Senate. Shortly thereafter, he unveiled his caucus’ job creation package, “Common-Sense Plan for a More Affordable New Jersey,” which ultimately reversed the course that previous administrations were quickly leading the state down. To this day, Tom continues to build upon his proven track record of delivering for the people of New Jersey in Congress: Passed legislation advocating for Veteran-Owned small businesses Passed legislation to improve commuter rail transportation Passed a resolution affirming strong US support for Ukraine Passed legislation to support mental health for school children And with your continued support today, Tom Kean will be able to defeat Nancy Pelosi’s hand-picked opponents that want to take the House Majority in 2024. We cannot let this happen. Please consider chipping in just a few dollars to help Tom continue the fight for NJ-7! | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@TomKean.com.

body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4da811fb6e941bba01178ef9cd61ce2&_e=usfMwvs6NalV6ReBr6niGKMpG5ZbrWQCsbLLXu6UtY8Skuxc5YWjgFS9r9U4alXrBH-rS68h7OPoESEe2TAVYz_Vs7rzyZHfWJyyF04zi7rXuRX9jWCoqspjT4ohw9roTncCDBqE6HX5o7Rr2cXbC6JrR7Uro2heH8Mgpb64zPzUii4j4oOGWjiCZ-nxIIUekbZkrUfN0rBOXH25QybpD1UB8QdNkDbJQVaWq6y_zR1Q1MLrW8mzJJ59CQext-CVjpEV1Y3JeSGk0K7rFXX06NUqEDEoMKTfsIkcyxa-k5Ux6r7g8hmAJJFvxPeQB0FFJ7oHFCQm1qQ07TZt1xTTJ4pa-uYyUNEa8iBLfPKu8J9HKfLjusEZgl4oNCWwDKIbKKhWK4NuqoLMSQD8AgavYw%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4da811fb6e941bba01178ef9cd61ce2&_e=usfMwvs6NalV6ReBr6niGKMpG5ZbrWQCsbLLXu6UtY8Skuxc5YWjgFS9r9U4alXrBH-rS68h7OPoESEe2TAVYz_Vs7rzyZHfWJyyF04zi7rXuRX9jWCoqspjT4ohw9roTncCDBqE6HX5o7Rr2cXbC6JrR7Uro2heH8Mgpb64zPzUii4j4oOGWjiCZ-nxIIUekbZkrUfN0rBOXH25QybpD1UB8QdNkDbJQVaWq6y_zR1Q1MLrW8mzJJ59CQext-CVJwvk1F0UHnHaOqSIo0V3U-OvjUl_Nis8_MDbroGw1RlvH8E_QJzDYmQv6Tyzkl-EfIMShL2hsrJbtyoX_FhtmwWWQ8P3TDg1Zw9NJEEgN3vkuFT3PRMs64d1Yzp84Uqz7WbtbAu02aRuxJudrP0cig%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Freedom Nation Today

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our newest free online course. Bah! Humbug!
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5df2c81891a64d0c95915407d18abbe0&_e=y7EBaT2M2QnwjceSqy7g5b4LD7jJfwPiHGv3BN6ytBPxKid310OP2E9cAkWnxG_xC5YNfmscVtMVSd9Q8nEfaAc1PsIPUet-aYLxF-qgCuMOPoaC-0WMKS8iYxukQyFw3NyHl6DqjwNKvLnjAZuLulmjt93t0Oz0MIT2A_Ba8Lo66VsPDc53HpkzRZbpMJZvYrfVyx6DJRwfXrAuPlzrxeGOMMouXIhGqCOkP2ggOblCI8g_7Nr6uw2AuhALHzIAMZ9TLw1nmzWDElcF9InAIaaxHPeM8MaqqCIJYjeo-7YwKXDHFWNcx9IwukbVGaP1DTxcifBrASb539J54c-Za19DsvrvyL7MjnRi4iij6E9t_sJH-MQGUs3_bPSfEOmG535t181DQ0l5US3OrNn8Qw%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5df2c81891a64d0c95915407d18abbe0&_e=y7EBaT2M2QnwjceSqy7g5b4LD7jJfwPiHGv3BN6ytBPxKid310OP2E9cAkWnxG_xC5YNfmscVtMVSd9Q8nEfaAc1PsIPUet-aYLxF-qgCuMOPoaC-0WMKS8iYxukQyFw3NyHl6DqjwNKvLnjAZuLulmjt93t0Oz0MIT2A_Ba8Lo66VsPDc53HpkzRZbpMJZvYrfVyx6DJRwfXrAuPlzrxeGOMMouXIhGqCOkP2ggOblCI8g_7Nr6uw2AuhALHzIA_LJbPV5B4dQRyVFVO0FnlZgpteNg1j820MJu6DBP2ur8bCFEur8uokZEPAGy_HSVCVaMJGqyyZJl-nMokK9dkSv0Ob8lYW3RvT9a5g3Ws9F4Mg2ExKazWf8fmEwy9YBwPh2vIZl6zcU0EfvW7u1-WQ%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

name: Rev. Darrius Butler
subject: A Thankful Announcement
body:
This is how we will take back the house in 2024
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.darriusbutler.com/so/84OmHf3C6/c?w=aWSvTOeEcY1fbP7kNt1_x5Yq6trsSUolT2uILVUq_UU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFycml1c2J1dGxlci5jb20vc28vODRPbUhmM0M2P2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMWVhZDBkZWMtZTNhNS00NTYzLWJlMDctMmMzZTQ2NmZmNDAyIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Hey My Friend, I’m Darrius Butler, and I’m running for U.S. House of Representatives to defeat Austin Scott and deliver present, engaged leadership for the people of Georgia's Eighth District. Winning this seat in South Georgia will all but guarantee Democrats are able to take back the House Majority in 2024 – and the Georgia legislature called Austin Scott one of the most vulnerable Congressmen in Georgia in 2020!
---
| | | [**CHIP IN →**](https://www.darriusbutler.com/so/84OmHf3C6/c?w=jkJ55OAhihrezmtZVIb3E0BOCGZ5-F7Xya-ygVLMjh4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2J1dGxlcmZvcjh0aCIsInIiOiJiNzRjMWNhZi0wMTMxLTQ0NjMtOTZkNS03ODFiMzYzNmU2ZjciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxZWFkMGRlYy1lM2E1LTQ1NjMtYmUwNy0yYzNlNDY2ZmY0MDIifQ)
---
| | I'm from a small town called Hawkinsville Georgia, about 30 miles south of Macon. As a child, those 30 miles seemed like an eternity away. I was raised by a single mom who did everything she could to keep me in school and out of trouble. Sometimes, it seemed like trouble was waiting for me outside on the daily. But I was lucky I had four amazing grandparents who kept me going on the right path. Going through High School and college I took part in everything I could join. From football, the debate team, and student government. My dream was to one day become a Marine and be a doctor. But life stepped in, I never did make it to the Marines and med-school wasn't in the cards for me. I found myself on mission trips, preaching and studying divinity and theology. The next thing I knew I was preaching under my grandfather and uncles. Over the last few years, my dedication to service has grown exponentially. I got involved and got active. I'm running for Congress because I'm ready to serve. To show more kids from small towns in South Georgia that they have the opportunity to reach their version of the American dream. From day one the odds have been stacked against me - and every time I've beaten the odds. Now it is time to face the next challenge: taking on Austin Scott. Trust me, I know it won't be easy, but at my core, I believe that we deserve so much more. The Eighth District deserves someone who is willing to roll up their sleeves and actually work with the constituents. Austin Scott's main focus is getting re-elected, my only focus will be helping people like you. But I can't win this thing alone: [That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Austin Scott and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please give what ever you can to help not just this campaign but this movement. ](https://www.darriusbutler.com/so/84OmHf3C6/c?w=-Cw1Vj5IbBzGnauDFmUFHgEF9LqkDZLL_Rt8upgmDSU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2J1dGxlcmZvcjh0aCIsInIiOiJiNDMxNWI0My03OTQyLTQ5MzktYWFmYy1lZDI3ZjY1YjhkMDkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxZWFkMGRlYy1lM2E1LTQ1NjMtYmUwNy0yYzNlNDY2ZmY0MDIifQ)If you want to do your part to take back the house from Austin Scott, Marjorie Taylor Green and the rest on the peanut brigade join me now. Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let's Win and win Big Rev. Darrius Butler
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | [**CHIP IN →**](https://www.darriusbutler.com/so/84OmHf3C6/c?w=2irfShV2jvkuape3Z4OGk9bDPNzOmuipIWOeteelOAY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2J1dGxlcmZvcjh0aCIsInIiOiI4YTZjYjZlMC1iYTBhLTQ5OTItOTlhZi03OTc1MmI2YTUwNzkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxZWFkMGRlYy1lM2E1LTQ1NjMtYmUwNy0yYzNlNDY2ZmY0MDIifQ)

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: A resolution in the Senate…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Tuberville is under pressure in Washington and at home.
#
Derek,
When Senator Tuberville first announced his personal vendetta against the Pentagon — holding up hundreds of promotions for our most senior officers, politicizing our Armed Forces, doing untold damage to the Military, all while aiding our adversaries on the world stage — few knew about it.
But today, because of you and because of the work VoteVets has done over more than nine months, it is a national story.
Tuberville is under pressure in Washington and at home.
Some of his GOP colleagues even seem to be close to their breaking point.
The Senate is working to pass a resolution that can break Tuberville’s blockade and approve the backlog of promotions. But Democrats need nine Republicans to do it.
VoteVets is pressuring them — hoping that nine Republicans can see reason and do the right thing for our Military and our National Security. It’s going to take some hard work, but if we’re successful more than 400 of our best and brightest officers will take their positions.
We need your help to get it done. **[So please, if you can afford it, make your first $5 donation to VoteVets today to support our work.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov23.rp0I1d&refcode=em231127-1-30-full&t=1&akid=19877%2E3013755%2Esjs8IM)**
| [CHIP IN TO VOTEVETS](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov23.rp0I1d&refcode=em231127-1-30-full&t=2&akid=19877%2E3013755%2Esjs8IM)
---
It’s been a long road. Let's finish this fight.
Thanks for your support,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=19877%2E3013755%2Esjs8IM).

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Looking for 750 donations today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)

We'll get right to the point:
**We've set an ambitious goal of reaching 750 donations TODAY so that Ilhan can continue representing our movement in Congress.**
**[Can Ilhan count on you to make a $3 contribution right now? This is a grassroots-funded campaign, so any amount you can give will make a big difference.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231127-1-t1t2&t=2&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231127-1-t1t2&t=3&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231127-1-t1t2&t=4&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)**
Here's why this goal is so important:
Now that we're past the Thanksgiving holiday, we need to pick up the pace of our fundraising in order to reach our goals before November ends. And a decent portion of our campaign's funding comes in response to emails like this one.
Outside spending groups are prepared to spend millions of dollars in order to defeat Ilhan and our movement. We simply cannot allow that to happen. And the only way we will have the resources to take them on and win is from lots of people contributing what they can.
Our goal of reaching 750 donations before midnight tonight is not only about how much money we raise. It's also about sending a powerful message about the number of people who stand with Ilhan.
If you've been thinking about making your first online donation, it would make a huge difference for our campaign.
**[Please contribute $3 to Ilhan's campaign right now and together we'll reach our goal of 750 donations before midnight tonight.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231127-1-t1t2&t=5&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)**
Thank you for being a part of this movement.
\- Team Ilhan
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231127-1-t1t2&t=6&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=9&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=10&refcode2=753_791427_FB3C6W&akid=753%2E791427%2EFB3C6W)**.

Washington D.C., 20033

---
One bullet. It takes just one bullet to kill a mama bear. **One bullet to leave her cubs orphaned, struggling, starving, and unable to fight off predators.** One bullet to completely decimate an entire bear family. Our country’s bears are under attack. As they prepare for winter hibernation this fall, it could be their last.
_**That’s why I’m reaching out early, Friend: Vunerable species like black bear and grizzly bear cubs, the lands they roam, and our planet are at risk if trophy hunters and Big Polluters get their way.**_** **_**[With these urgent threats in mind, a generous group of donors have agreed to match all gifts, up to $200,000, but only until Giving Tuesday ends tomorrow.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147223?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**_
To highlight how dire the situation is: Maryland already **DOUBLED the bear slaughter** last hunting season. 103 black bears were killed in the state. Pennsylvania could see similar increases. That would be devastating given that last year, 3,659 black bears were killed in the state. But clearly, this is not enough for trophy hunters. They want to push the massacre to new heights.
As a dedicated supporter, I am sending you a special EARLY ACCESS link for this match, so you can pave the way for others, and strengthen our fight for vulnerable wildlife, people, and the planet. Please don’t wait another second:
[EARLY ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147224?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Trophy hunters in the Northern Rockies are chomping at the bit to remove ESA protections for iconic grizzly bears. They’ve made numerous attempts to delist them. This would allow them to ruthlessly murder them during the hunting season, and they show no signs of letting up. We can’t let them get away with this, Friend.
| **GIVING TUESDAY SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**DEADLINE: **11:59 p.m. Tomorrow
**EARLY MATCH ACCESS: Available. [Give Now.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147225?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **SUPPORTERS FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED: 11 MORE **

**We need to act fast before it’s too late for grizzlies. Protect vulnerable species and our planet with a $27 donation before Giving Tuesday ends! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147219?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147220?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147221?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147222?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s bad enough that bloodthirsty trophy hunters want to MURDER innocent bears for fun. But their cruelty means extreme danger for the next generation of cubs. **Bear cubs rely on their mothers for at least two full years. If these mama bears are killed, their babies will be ORPHANED. They’ll be left to starve, freeze, or become easy prey for other predators. If that happens, the future of this iconic species will be lost. **
We can’t afford for trophy hunters to keep decimating bear families like this. Grizzly bears and their vital habitats are already in a dire situation. At their peak, they numbered 50,000. But by 1975, reckless human activity -- hunting, trapping, and habitat loss -- already decimated bear populations. Their numbers dropped to 1,000 individuals in the lower 48 states. **Now, they occupy just 2% of their original range! **
I know these numbers are shocking, Friend. But still, the pro-hunting lobby and their anti-environment allies are working overtime to strip these endangered animals of essential legal protections. The Endangered Species Act provides critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. These protections are some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect wildlife, the lands they roam, and curb catastrophic climate change.

**Without these protections in place, trophy hunters could brutally kill bears without consequence. What’s more, destructive industries like Big Oil, logging, and factory farming could swoop in and wreak havoc on endangered species’ habitats. That means losing some of the last pristine wilderness we have left.**
**Giving Tuesday is the perfect time to stand up for critical wildlife and the planet before the damage is too great. Donate $27 now! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147219?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147220?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147221?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147222?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
You may be wondering why it matters if bears are lost forever. Well, the fact is that bears are intelligent creatures, Friend, and they hold a critical place in our ecosystems. They enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations, and transport nutrients through vast swaths of wilderness. **And now, by simply existing, they’re standing between massive corporate pollution and a sustainable future for our planet. **
For the sake of our wildlife and the future of our planet, we can’t let Big Polluters and their cronies in Congress destroy our public lands and wipe out our endangered species.
At Friends of the Earth, we are using every tool available to protect endangered species and our planet -- not Big Industry’s profits. We know how to fight and win, and that’s exactly what we plan to do. In honor of Giving Tuesday, we are asking you to stand with us as we continue this work with your membership gift today.
**There’s not a minute to lose.** We all need to raise our voices in defense of vulnerable species. Together, we have the power to stop these killings, strengthen the ESA, and protect our planet before the damage is irreversible. And today, you have DOUBLE the power to fuel our work to save bears, their lands, and the planet with this matching gift opportunity. But this rare match ends tomorrow at midnight. And we won’t reach our goal without your help. Make your $27 contribution now, before this opportunity expires and we lose any more bears or our planet.
**Join the fight to protect vulnerable species and our planet. Donate $27 in honor of Giving Tuesday now and have twice the impact! **

In the Biden Family

---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5cfbce48b950455f9c26ccaee16b78d6&_e=tmqsIZaugiKqbWBEkp6v2Pn3j99CrkyYFHoABoLDvOyYAEyZK5K_kbGeV6b5_vFO5XiuMVH6EQEPdVNGmfaDYTwIkY0uScU76VfaRUkctKvUXteUPTkMAdfpPa1LPx0NRvcbv5aO0xr0jg0knbm7J_LmGQxg772H41P9YIDfTA5em4AC3z2N58HSymsyT_iUvB3kqmdFRbpLIrlZO2u-o_lb6RFFvfpCpdYpfRUnyGbHw7H9Vnynb96VW7M2paxINpmpC0hv4Mg4WRZGwhAWc_PisqipfHYf28PY1IqkYZLCf0teOrStCaH72iI33NgpXAV575wbj3VwAp-5aBNYEWy5m7J8cXYk0pB2cjPw-X0%3D)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5cfbce48b950455f9c26ccaee16b78d6&_e=tmqsIZaugiKqbWBEkp6v2Pn3j99CrkyYFHoABoLDvOyYAEyZK5K_kbGeV6b5_vFO5XiuMVH6EQEPdVNGmfaDYTwIkY0uScU76VfaRUkctKvUXteUPTkMAdfpPa1LPx0NRvcbv5aO0xr0jg0knbm7J_LmGQxg772H41P9YIDfTA5em4AC3z2N58HSymsyT_iUvB3kqmdFRbpLIrlZO2u-o_2s_baDKNJiKt2cD94vybegsvv_9Kw-KxXttmdzoidkDF16RNvb1i_TzxHOSHOoLzo6QKmkee0gm96HDzBqoGC6kCCjHlw2XnwFtkizOohNeXYpngAMsP_QR1ywFX-1xxl-uw-EpoA2CuVOP8VYwgA%3D)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5cfbce48b950455f9c26ccaee16b78d6&_e=tmqsIZaugiKqbWBEkp6v2Pn3j99CrkyYFHoABoLDvOyYAEyZK5K_kbGeV6b5_vFO5XiuMVH6EQEPdVNGmfaDYTwIkY0uScU76VfaRUkctKvUXteUPTkMAdfpPa1LPx0NRvcbv5aO0xr0jg0knbm7J_LmGQxg772H41P9YIDfTA5em4AC3z2N58HSymsyT_iUvB3kqmdFRbpLIrlZO2u-ow2qpF-Iff1I6MULcnYzXSXwWa2MuNIkEgDkuU_5fC_mApRTP0Xn_rYPNjw5AM2bNeCnmEeyLxoRFndALIf9u4xXODcc-lG0wPJ1QSu9AGyD_36LQUxji8VFTEDNk7w7wADjD3h2VOPGrPNFFGr0EJU%3D)

clean_body: In the Biden Family | | Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN conspiracy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight. | I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY. As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. | With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress**

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Our opponents are gearing up to tear down our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The stakes have never been higher in our fight against PACs like AIPAC and the GOP.
#
Peter,
While we’ve been relaxing and resting during this holiday period, our opponents have been gearing up to tear down our movement.
Starting **tonight** , our campaign will be honing in on our grassroots movement to help us round out our monthly fundraising with one last push. **And the stakes have never been higher in our fight against the GOP and their PACs like AIPAC.**
Keep reading below to hear about AIPAC’s plan to unseat and defeat progressives in our government _— but before you do:_**[Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount to help us kick off our end of the month fundraising and keep our campaign on track to protect and re-elect Pramila?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47690?refcode=em20231127-1-3207&t=1&akid=3207%2E420207%2E3pp2dm)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47690?refcode=em20231127-1-3207&t=2&akid=3207%2E420207%2E3pp2dm)**
Thank you for being in this fight with us.
Together,
Jayapal HQ
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal [info@pramilaforcongress.com]
Date: Nov 19, 2023
Subject: A game of shame and blame
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Peter, have you heard the latest on AIPAC's plans?
If not, let me catch you up:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47690?refcode=em20231127-1-3207&t=3&akid=3207%2E420207%2E3pp2dm)
**Let's say it out loud: AIPAC backs extreme election deniers for election,_and then goes after people of color_ — most of whom are women — who dare to do our jobs and fight for our constituents. **
Their MO is to shame and blame in order to **elect a Republican majority.**
AIPAC's huge investment means we need to raise our own funds in order to counter their massive spending.
But we know that, with the support of our grassroots movement, **our progressive champions WILL win because they work for the people and stand up for our democracy.**
[**Are you ready to mobilize our grassroots power to support our progressive movement against these fights? If so, please consider chipping in $3 or whatever you're able to give to strengthen our forces.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47690?refcode=em20231127-1-3207&t=4&akid=3207%2E420207%2E3pp2dm)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47690?refcode=em20231127-1-3207&t=23&akid=3207%2E420207%2E3pp2dm)**
Together,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231127-3207-footer&t=24&refcode2=3207_420207_3pp2dm&akid=3207%2E420207%2E3pp2dm)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=3207%2E420207%2E3pp2dm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3207%2E420207%2E3pp2dm)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

clean_body: The fate of our Republic and the safety of every single family in our country depend on it. | | | John, I'll cut right to the chase, Ilhan Omar's left-wing goons are planning something big. They're planning a massive injection of outside activists into every single district where America First Patriots are running. Right now they're outraising us by OVER ONE MILLION DOLLARS! FEC: TOP DEMOCRAT RAISES $1.4 MILLION IN Q3 If unanswered, they 'll win the 5 seats they need for TOTAL CONTROL: #1 They plan to DEFUND the police. #2 They're going to CONFISCATE every single firearm. #3 They will SUSPEND Free Speech and Freedom of Religion. 2020 was a different time and every last safeguard stopping the far-Left has been eliminated. Make no mistake - Ilhan Omar, George Soros and their left-wing donors are intimidating America First Conservatives. They'll lie and cheat to win. All so you'll sit this out. I know times are tough so if you are not in a position to help us hold the House I completely understand: DO NOT DONATE! HOWEVER IF YOU CAN: please chip in anything, it'll help us get our message out, talk to voters on the doorstep, and win this race. Friend, U.S. police recently assaulted anti-war advocates and people protesting against the militarized police training facility known as Cop City. Public officials have called these peaceful protesters terrorists for speaking up to end state violence. **These attempts to criminalize and suppress dissent are dangerous attacks on our First Amendment right to protest.** We’re seeing an especially violent crackdown from police departments that have long collaborated with Israeli police and military, teaching each other authoritarian tactics like surveillance and repression of protests. [**Sign if you agree: Instead of continuing to spend billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars on violent systems of oppression like policing and the military industrial complex, we need to invest in our communities’ needs like housing, healthcare, clean water, and childcare.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mtZW8B_8qtJj-DttZsUqQ57zyRfxsdpPfaiOoCQP_pLmVkHbFVeWUp2fZXZS5-EMJiIEqq98JkPwJl0iiRw05rIkT1C4Wrd64BaMMBnqGsSycO7c2L--2DVg72KGEizmC1ymVBIpf9RtL_HjTKFR6cz_OODzFcLf12XJks4YaVG0U5cexRkBDuVUTgMg78VYofcZ2EDvlrB9pNC8rJBcljDIKqFGEmB9AhxCDz6SCExvqinzJgBmkMFR3QafHrTfHp_f9KuQ9Lk7hTVp1UyFNCsGhxBrSGlsW0YEMDFGw_R5B17lrBKdENU3lCRtUhRZY8ZBMzOEjWTGlqlBByHaPNhlhg43ER4pPRuClj8ObFF7y_3dh7rp_2EZ8nCTufYCCQmS6jGe60eBTGANNYd321Y7uVZvvu4zxHhFzrX9qhtdpWhgdF-lLMEwC9udrodoPHLL2CTJE38cBmyHCUix-A1jxraXGOv_qdre0Ehp2cF-2QlQUHRYN5Co4U8QKNTSiSAxm3r5Bj8t1WgmWlfE-Sg/41n/UUwsKjNDTruhxYwXseYekA/h1/Q4pLLbYDgxPwGXDfwbB6BuyuYYeRcIvn5OcaWRM8S14) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mtZW8B_8qtJj-DttZsUqQ57zyRfxsdpPfaiOoCQP_pLmVkHbFVeWUp2fZXZS5-EMJiIEqq98JkPwJl0iiRw05rIkT1C4Wrd64BaMMBnqGsSycO7c2L--2DVg72KGEizmCVfHMVTbIWF_sSk2FnrlPUKRO7jiFzu_HhTeoK4wcJBXm2v1AJlFQWcwCgdSRhweb0LFHEWiliHET6cQ-YwBDKJ4z5VnLHfBH2lo8nIaXj04hg40cdEoMu9ZKQXo3jQK0bO8fbh7WFJ2ReP_YsasK8xi-0IiITRZdNt7bTA-8NVzFoM9Ko54OJlwjLKuegz6GLyA55dJMkQNDkJPOooJY7XeIQyc0cPYZs8RzfDu7CfyfNlxr0joaHxIS9yaCtXi2mNwP4DveQVQ9yapbkvKHbPtg7EFOuS3k8Y8mZi1HjIpPEagm0HSM1gzHRsJoPyRYE1bilII0hFTlq4NVWUSNoeKTFvo3xxSM3Fhv1P21SOLJ8wmmN5_K7lxUd-qazFJIRx7B9A8NmEzUzdIjGrf16A/41n/UUwsKjNDTruhxYwXseYekA/h2/nXSuDyJxhh5MWa2z2QFRd3SQ7GyzaAnWXxBCjGFa4Fk)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sun, Nov 26, 2023
Subject: Sign if you agree: Instead of funding war and militarized policing, we need to invest in human needs.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
In recent weeks, U.S. police have assaulted Americans at nonviolent protests for a ceasefire, including at a multi-faith vigil for a ceasefire in Washington, DC.
Without warning, police pepper-sprayed, punched, kicked, and threw protesters down stairs. Police injured about 90 people, many of whom were Jewish people lovingly saying “not in our name.”
Growing up in Detroit, I was taught to march and protest for freedom, justice and more at an early age. It is what I did to demand clean air, an end to police brutality, and illegal foreclosures in my own neighborhood.
So for me, this is how we fight against fascism and oppression. Where we fight against those who would rather fund bombs, wars, and oppression rather than the calls from their own constituents demanding an end to the madness of wars.
It is our responsibility as Americans, human beings, to raise our voices and exercise our full rights under the Constitution.
**These brutal, authoritarian tactics are outrageous, and they undermine our democracy and our civil rights.**
[**Please sign if you agree: Instead of funding war and militarized police that threaten our communities and our movements, we urgently need to invest in human needs like clean water, access to healthcare, and housing.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mtZW8B_8qtJj-DttZsUqQ57zyRfxsdpPfaiOoCQP_pLmVkHbFVeWUp2fZXZS5-EMJiIEqq98JkPwJl0iiRw05rIkT1C4Wrd64BaMMBnqGsSycO7c2L--2DVg72KGEizmCQ-m7-ewcEQbf4FOjj9IW-ZPUSqQwlsBTjL56PtM9SPxlpDGHzf-fDUI01fiQM3DRnLpu_vduw8HUOXJALCaf3us-pqKPCQaKTmbnkfD8nRY9fURk5aHLXtIxqVUWn71-vtAtgf7U3wdvDB8WpqfCEVlX6l8ag2aGxhg6pIZRdlhOehJMURO11ObEdZnfUwCtANI8xCPEaTqy7qQU0B9GZEPOpgSHWFdwc78cs-56T_jtw7iOL2EtQmGBsxLEf2oBi9XWiyrzboq04lyPrjz_nrGdpeQJLNOmysSDPrIfIPQHZqwZ0TvOeAe5ZAIxnLrk-36LtWU_4MVxBYNApAY2jDgwue_NRfCIzdSAqaw0UDU7ZnwhpYvdf1sbkhOOEtGHy8JWuYYTLePFvlc0bSD_3Q/41n/UUwsKjNDTruhxYwXseYekA/h3/kgvMaj_Xpedwe5xE4yzcMW21QACx65W0q6s2j7XxlMM)

Anti-war advocates held a nonviolent vigil, lighting candles, singing in DC begging to be heard alongside the 80% of American Democrats who want a ceasefire.
As a member of Congress, I pride myself in listening to and engaging with my residents, even when it's hard. However, many colleagues would rather ignore and hope the movement would just disappear. Some even slandered and accused their constituents of supporting terrorism. It was the same members who refuse to support a ceasefire.
I still remember the police using tear gas on people peacefully protesting against Cop City, a massive training center for militarized policing in Atlanta. Georgia officials have shamefully charged these nonviolent activists with domestic terrorism and racketeering. This isn't democracy, it's fascism.
**These attempts to criminalize and suppress dissent are dangerous attacks on our First Amendment right to protest. And those same police departments in Atlanta and DC have long collaborated with Israeli police and military.**
Jewish Voice for Peace, Amnesty International, Human Rights Watch, and others have denounced these “deadly exchanges,” where American and Israeli agents of state violence train each other to subjugate marginalized communities, surveil grassroots movements, and silence people who are speaking up for human rights.
No one should be harassed or dehumanized by government agents. We can’t keep spending U.S. tax dollars on war crimes abroad and increasingly militarized police forces that abuse human rights at home.
It’s clear that these harmful systems of oppression are intertwined, and we especially cannot justify funding them when our neighbors are struggling to put food on the table, fighting to keep a roof over their heads, and are forced to ration their medication.
