clean_body: From Detroit to Gaza, I will keep defending our rights and our shared humanity. | | | Friend, U.S. police recently assaulted anti-war advocates and people protesting against the militarized police training facility known as Cop City. Public officials have called these peaceful protesters terrorists for speaking up to end state violence. These attempts to criminalize and suppress dissent are dangerous attacks on our First Amendment right to protest. We’re seeing an especially violent crackdown from police departments that have long collaborated with Israeli police and military, teaching each other authoritarian tactics like surveillance and repression of protests. | In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sun, Nov 26, 2023 Subject: Sign if you agree: Instead of funding war and militarized policing, we need to invest in human needs. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, In recent weeks, U.S. police have assaulted Americans at nonviolent protests for a ceasefire, including at a multi-faith vigil for a ceasefire in Washington, DC. Without warning, police pepper-sprayed, punched, kicked, and threw protesters down stairs. Police injured about 90 people, many of whom were Jewish people lovingly saying “not in our name.” Growing up in Detroit, I was taught to march and protest for freedom, justice and more at an early age. It is what I did to demand clean air, an end to police brutality, and illegal foreclosures in my own neighborhood. So for me, this is how we fight against fascism and oppression. Where we fight against those who would rather fund bombs, wars, and oppression rather than the calls from their own constituents demanding an end to the madness of wars. It is our responsibility as Americans, human beings, to raise our voices and exercise our full rights under the Constitution. These brutal, authoritarian tactics are outrageous, and they undermine our democracy and our civil rights. Anti-war advocates held a nonviolent vigil, lighting candles, singing in DC begging to be heard alongside the 80% of American Democrats who want a ceasefire. As a member of Congress, I pride myself in listening to and engaging with my residents, even when it's hard. However, many colleagues would rather ignore and hope the movement would just disappear. Some even slandered and accused their constituents of supporting terrorism. It was the same members who refuse to support a ceasefire. I still remember the police using tear gas on people peacefully protesting against Cop City, a massive training center for militarized policing in Atlanta. Georgia officials have shamefully charged these nonviolent activists with domestic terrorism and racketeering. This isn't democracy, it's fascism. These attempts to criminalize and suppress dissent are dangerous attacks on our First Amendment right to protest. And those same police departments in Atlanta and DC have long collaborated with Israeli police and military. Jewish Voice for Peace, Amnesty International, Human Rights Watch, and others have denounced these “deadly exchanges,” where American and Israeli agents of state violence train each other to subjugate marginalized communities, surveil grassroots movements, and silence people who are speaking up for human rights. No one should be harassed or dehumanized by government agents. We can’t keep spending U.S. tax dollars on war crimes abroad and increasingly militarized police forces that abuse human rights at home. It’s clear that these harmful systems of oppression are intertwined, and we especially cannot justify funding them when our neighbors are struggling to put food on the table, fighting to keep a roof over their heads, and are forced to ration their medication. From Detroit to Gaza, I will continue to demand equality and justice for all. I will keep defending our rights and our shared humanity. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Who is Colin Allred?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.-UlcZDQ4Zjm2Q)
---
Fellow Conservative, Democrat Colin Allred and his backers think they can fool us with a moderate mask. But the truth is that Colin Allred is far-left and full of harmful progressive ideas.

We’ve been hard at work getting out the word on Colin Allred’s **radical record** and we WILL NOT LET UP in the fight to **Keep Texas Red** on November 5, 2024!

**[**Will you step up today to help?**](http://trk.tedcruz.)**

Here’s the real Allred record his campaign and backers won’t be touting in flashy TV ads:
---
* Colin Allred has _voted to DEFUND Operation Lone Star_ , the Texas state program launched to combat illegal immigration.

* He has used his position in the U.S. House to _help a Dallas based organization that hosts drag shows for children receive $1 million_ in federal taxpayer money.

* He _secured another $1 million in taxpayer money for a radical group_ that teaches children as young as four that America is a “white supremacist” nation.

* He recently lashed out at a citizen report who was asking him questions in the halls of Congress, _even threating to report him to police_ , in an unhinged tirade.

* And Colin Allred recently voted “NO” on the package passed in the House to help Israel fight back against the Hamas terrorists. In the past, he’s voted against a measure to condemn the anti-Israel Boycott, Divestment, Sanctions (BDS) movement, and we recently learned that he has _met with the extremist group Students for Justice in Palestine_ – hate-fueled radicals who organized an anti-Israel rally on October 12th and have ties to Hamas support.

---
**Can you imagine this guy speaking for you in the U.S. Senate?!**

He’s wrong for Texas, wrong for America, and wrong on just about every issue.

_**[_**Take a stand today in this fight.**_](http://trk.tedcruz.-xAIN7EGxvFoYaw)**_ The outcome of this race could very well determine our nation’s future course and it’s all hands on deck to defeat the left next November.

For Liberty,
---
[ ](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Ted Cruz

name: Markwayne Mullin
subject: I’ll never back down from a fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I'm taking the fight to the far-Left

Let me tell you a little about myself, friend.

[My name is Markwayne Mullin. body:
#
Friend,
**FIRST:** The Wisconsin State legislature threatened to impeach Justice Janet Protasiewicz to stop her from ruling against Republicans’ extremely gerrymandered maps.
**THEN:** Assembly Speaker Robin Vos began an unwarranted and unnecessary impeachment process against bipartisan Elections Commissioner, Meagan Wolfe, because a right-wing organization launched attack ads threatening to replace him.
**NOW:** We must do everything we can to flip the state legislature blue and strip Vos of his unchecked power to prevent Wisconsin’s extremist Republicans from continuing to disrupt the democratic process and ignore the will of voters.
The only way we can continue our work to flip the state legislature is by continuing to build our movement and ensure we have the resources to support candidates up and down the ballot.
[**So if you can, please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to our movement today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-nov23.S9Wq-Z&refcode=em231127-1-tt&t=1&akid=5027%2E196590%2EFJIWnX)

clean_body: | | | | Peter, we’re gearing up for a HUGE battle. | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: Blake Dellinger
subject: Fwd: You're Invited: Laura's Birthday Celebration/Signature Signing
body:
**_Time Change Notice_**

Hello all - I just wanted to share that we have to change the time for the signature event from 12-2pm to **3pm-5pm on Sunday 12/3**.

Hopefully you can make it there!

Thank you,
Blake Dellinger
Laura Friedman for Congress

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Blake Dellinger** <[blake@lauraforcongress.org](mailto:blake@lauraforcongress.org)>
Date: Mon, Nov 20, 2023 at 10:55 AM
Subject: You're Invited: Laura's Birthday Celebration/Signature Signing
To: Blake Dellinger <[blake@lauraforcongress.org](mailto:blake@lauraforcongress.org)>

Friends,

I hope you all had a great weekend and are ready to spend time with your loved ones over the holiday this week.

You may not know this, but Laura has a birthday coming up! On Sunday, December 3rd, we will be celebrating Laura's birthday by collecting signatures to get her on the ballot. Can you join us?

In order for Laura to get on the ballot, we will need to have registered voters who live in the 30th Congressional District to sign her nomination papers to qualify for the ballot.

To make it easy - we are having a birthday party/signature signing event in Burbank. We hope you can make it there!

Use the link below to RSVP and you will be sent the address prior to the event. All are welcome to come and support Laura, but you must be a registered voter in the 30th District to sign Laura's papers.

[**Click here to RSVP**.](https://www.lauraforcongress.org/event-details/signature-signing-party)

We hope to see you there!

Thank you,
Blake Dellinger
Laura Friedman for Congress.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: My life story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because,
Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots
supporters.

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a
firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and
sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I
received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to
protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and
biblical values.

JOIN MY TEAM

But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly
and father to our four amazing children.

JOIN MY TEAM

I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to
work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't
wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor.

I set a goal of activating 40,000 grassroots donors
so I can hit the ground running.

Will you join my team today and help me fight for
our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024?

JOIN MY TEAM

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our
conservative movement.

God Bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

Paid for by the NRCC and
not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
NRCC.org

NRCC

320 First St SE

Washington, DC 20003

By providing your cell phone or mobile
phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts,
including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that
number with campaign notifications from the National Republican
Congressional Committee (21818).

NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The week ahead in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here are the issues Powered by People is working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our chance to flip the U.S. House

An increasing number of Congressional Republicans have decided not to run
for re-election next year, citing historic dysfunction in the chamber
under GOP leadership.

This creates an extraordinary opportunity for Democrats to pick up seats
throughout the country — including in Texas. And it’s not just that
powerful Republican incumbents are leaving. It’s the way they are
describing their own party on the way out. Just look at what retiring
Republican Ken Buck of Colorado said:

“We’ve lost our way... We have an identity crisis in the Republican Party.
If we can’t address the election denier issue and we continue down that
path, we won’t have credibility with the American people that we are
going to solve problems.”

This is our best moment yet to win over the voters who have soured on the
GOP’s extremism — [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231127.0Ji0Nu&refcode=ema20231127-235503&t=1001&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]so please chip in $3 or whatever you
can to Powered by People today to help us reach, register, and organize
the voters we need to flip the House.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231127.0Ji0Nu&refcode=ema20231127-235503&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]DONATE $3

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Voting rights in jeopardy

Last week, a U.S. appeals court issued a dangerous ruling that could gut
what remains of the 1965 Voting Rights Act. The ruling bars private
citizens and groups like the NAACP from challenging discriminatory voting
rights laws in court, upending decades of legal precedent and leaving
voters with little legal recourse in an era of rising voter suppression in
the U.S.

Now more than ever before we must fight to win key elections in places
where voting rights are under attack. For those of us in Texas — where it
is harder to vote than in any other state — that means registering,
organizing, and mobilizing voters who will choose pro-democracy candidates
up and down the ballot.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60305?source=ema20231127-235503&t=1021&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]You can read more about the future of this ruling and the effort to
fight it here.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Fighting Texas’ racial profiling bill

Governor Abbott will soon sign Senate Bill 4, an attempt to legalize
racial profiling by giving local law enforcement unprecedented authority
to arrest anyone — including U.S. citizens — just for looking or sounding
like an immigrant.

Dozens of former immigration judges [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60306?source=ema20231127-235503&t=1022&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]say the bill “will undoubtedly
lead to United States citizens being deprived of their rights.” Even a
Texas GOP senator is [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60311?t=1023&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]sounding the alarm that the bill sets “a terrible
precedent by invalidating our obedience and faithfulness to our
Constitution.” That’s why several county judges across Texas are
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60310?t=1024&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]urging the federal government to stop the legislation from taking
effect.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60309?si=20hTh-aozTbvrkCQ%3Fsource%3Dema20231127-235503&t=1025&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]Hear why some Texas law enforcement officers say the bill “opens the
door to biased policing.”

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60309?si=20hTh-aozTbvrkCQ%3Fsource%3Dema20231127-235503&t=1026&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ][IMG]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ready to get to work?

With so much at stake in the upcoming 2024 elections, now is the time to
sign up for our new statewide voter mobilization campaign. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231127-235503&t=1027&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]Please join
us for our 2024 Kickoff Webinar to learn how you can get involved.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231127-235503&t=1028&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]Volunteer Kickoff Webinar

Tuesday, December 5, 2023
6:00 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231127-235503&t=1029&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG ]RSVP →

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I hope it’s a great week for you.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1030&akid=235503%2E444211%2EY1oOsG

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

subject: SNEAK PEAK: Big Plans in 2024!!!
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=cc3a982c17ac43698f828061f01de323&_e=cm9c8QemR0sf0S6HsD9votDEspmAFYaif854_R9sEf0F3pf3yY0TrhTl4SSPIcJ1t2VszmwsVW3DF9nbuGL0kTuq55zbBTvcI-MAc0wUUxwmol0kcRJlWcZVdZK-A8UG1tuNwfoWVL63fKK7io_c9lB7dehSdpXCaIaJjmqApKqE-mIoqAj1C0y5GwtwYEDZW4TeO1qAz2VhnRjE3NHucXuTuKutepFBBfko51SM41iI7V-HAmvulsvNi7hao6XiVeJ5xUdFgUFFuwkKc-8NqvjR6peDZQ3yAexipqAsBZcAeZZD_4EKRp_T4kwBFtFZzJD6qa21ZAP8ngsZbYPgbg%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,
---
The Kingdom to the Capitol Tour is our most ambitious revival tour EVER. A two-part, two-year endeavor to bring REVIVAL to EVERY state capitol. 2023 is in the books and God moved POWERFULLY. Proverbs 16:9 says, "**The heart of man plans his way, but the Lord establishes his steps.** ” In 2023, the Lord CLEARLY established our steps. _HE_ orchestrated us to be in **Jackson, Mississippi** , where locals tried to convince us to cancel or move due to the rampant gun violence. We ignored the warnings, and saw God move POWERFULLY!!! _HE_ orchestrated us to be in **Little Rock, Arkansas** , the day after tornados devastated communities across the region. _HE_ orchestrated us to be in **Nashville, Tennessee** the week after the devastating shooting at The Covenant School. And _HE_ put us in **Montpelier, Vermont** amid historic flooding to be the hands and feet of Jesus.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=cc3a982c17ac43698f828061f01de323&_e=cm9c8QemR0sf0S6HsD9votDEspmAFYaif854_R9sEf0F3pf3yY0TrhTl4SSPIcJ1t2VszmwsVW3DF9nbuGL0kTuq55zbBTvcI-MAc0wUUxwmol0kcRJlWcZVdZK-A8UG1tuNwfoWVL63fKK7io_c9lB7dehSdpXCaIaJjmqApKoMp7gswXmDevxlLyX7FX5vGOMQffKucPP19viHfpXR4_l7F9G0MyUw1NX4orjT1H2QDUclNSK8fo9L1q_3PK9YbQ5wZI7kBmVbBlsTlpR_yFTPWi2VzWfy5a85zC7nrYGek31FISeBKtZUYkU3pCyUM8T6DZH-XahzbY9tA9OR9g%3D%3D)
---
God's timing is perfect, and He has used Let Us Worship to bring not just praise and worship, but to help meet the needs of hurting people across the country. We couldn't have done it without the prayer, generosity, and support of Believers across the country who have partnered with this ministry. We covered half of our nation's state capitols in 2023, and our prayer is to be able to finish in 2024. However, in 2023 we had a partner who footed much of the cost to hold the revivals—in 2024 we don't. That support is gone, though our calling remains! To hold all 24 revivals in 2024, Let Us Worship must pay for each and every one. We REFUSE to charge an entrance fee to worship and instead trust in HIM to provide all that we need. Stay tuned over the coming weeks as we break down the mission and need in detail. Through it all, we trusted HIM, and God was glorified, and we are expectant for 2024 to be even more than we could ever expect or imagine.
---

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: I would love to earn your support

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=854%2E135344%2EN_m5sQ)

Friends -
In a few days, we’ll close the books on our November fundraising drive. It’s not an official FEC deadline, but we do have some very real goals to hit this month that are especially important now that we have a few Republican opponents in the race. Plus, with all the chaos that’s happening in Washington, this has been a rough month for fundraising.
The path to keeping our Senate majority depends on our race here in the notorious swing state of Michigan. It’s why keeping up with our (very real) internal fundraising goals is such a critical part of defending this seat.
The number one source of individual contributions to this campaign is from emails like this. I am very proud of that fact.
But today, I am asking YOU to make your first online contribution to my campaign for Senate.
**One of the potential Republican opponents in this race has raised $46,200 from the Betsy DeVos family – and we know that this is just the beginning of big donors trying to influence this race.** We are staying focused on sharing our positive, affirmative message with voters. But we need to stay on top of our internal fundraising efforts and ensure we have the resources to continue getting our message out.
We have just over a year to reach as many voters as possible to keep Michigan blue, but it’s going to take all of us working together. That’s why I would love to earn your support today. [**Will you consider making your first online contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231127-1-tt&t=2&akid=854%2E135344%2EN_m5sQ)

body:
Looking back at November.| | | [](http://links.craigriedelforcongress.com/u/click?_t=063960b10bde474cb034b193fc03c584&_m=250211d4a40642e985ed9b56ee0e3ce7&_e=cIDMOyKzuzRNPeUf3BLc5pVNXsqX2CoGpSfiC_STOSEkSQ63t1vMAWdNTavlxW13-bGB7ISTg6PAomw2LpGIWX2HwLw27Ve2JPtSS_ZgkZqfr6beafpTdiPydMTPrMqyhAFOG6X9bRlnZcOeoVwKvhAsGnsiijhbru1xqzYFV-Li5cMyefdlpt_lCVVzTA03CcFoIbBqmdffIel8c6UGLhqfOc1PtLJIvEcGOHqO4kHvYgYmiP7FKRkN2Ih6M4_Rn2hmL2gjWRzdJcELjfLCs3X6aeIjLBFyjEAAq5AYYi9Vbz4zqQBP1XCuUkCeFgOgomfLOCUx9Fa_69btZmkdFyczJcy97L8asrjRKhRljlc%3D)
---
Hey my friend, Welcome back to the Riedel Recap, where we look back at our team’s hard work, highlights from the campaign trail, and all the amazing people we’ve met on this journey! While Election Day may have come and gone, we didn’t stop chugging along! We kicked off November in Yuma, Arizona, right on the southern border. Thanks to Biden’s Border Crisis, every state, including Ohio, is a border state. Any serious candidate has to visit the border to see the source of this crisis firsthand, so that’s exactly what my team and I did, meeting with border officials and seeing miles of unwalled open desert where illegal immigrants and drug smugglers enter our country. Back home in Ohio, my team and I spent Veterans Day at Northwest State Community College for their Veterans Luncheon and attended an American Legion event in Ney. It was terrific to spend some time with our nation’s heroes and thank them for their sacrifices! We also attended Kiwanis Club events in East Toledo-Oregon and West Toledo, meeting with great community leaders.
This is just a small blip! We were all over, and I was beyond grateful to visit with Republicans across our district, including Edgerton, Fremont, and Toledo! `
---

Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.
But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.
That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.
We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Roland Gutierrez today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.
It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.
Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.
Let’s prove them wrong, Peter.
That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Roland Gutierrez today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Let’s do this,
David Hogg Co-founder,
Leaders We Deserve

name: Kash Patel
subject: Government Gangsters all lied about January 6
body:
Now, it’s time to hold them accountable. Here’s how:
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ndMYEIB8dYF9UkKDgrkX7g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR4leP0RCaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGEtZG9uYXRlPy91dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMTI3VwNzcGNCCmVf1N9kZWEDGNdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi lied about January 6.

Liz Chaney lied about January 6.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public showing an entirely different story to the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ndMYEIB8dYF9UkKDgrkX7g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR4leP0RCaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGEtZG9uYXRlPy91dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMTI3VwNzcGNCCmVf1N9kZWEDGNdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Donate")

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ndMYEIB8dYF9UkKDgrkX7g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR4leP0RCaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGEtZG9uYXRlPy91dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMTI3VwNzcGNCCmVf1N9kZWEDGNdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

[Donate >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ndMYEIB8dYF9UkKDgrkX7g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR4leP0RCaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGEtZG9uYXRlPy91dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMTI3VwNzcGNCCmVf1N9kZWEDGNdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 >>>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aq8M57NRzrHaWk4dZouWpw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR4leP0RMaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGEtZG9uYXRlPy91dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjMxMTI3JmFtb3VudD0xMFcDc3BjQgplX9TfZGVhAxjXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

clean_body: Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how: "Kash Foundation" Friend, Nancy Pelosi lied about January 6. Liz Chaney lied about January 6. FBI Director Wray lied about January 6. The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public showing an entirely different story to the lies they told. Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how: STEP ONE \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections. STEP TWO \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State. So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases. Here's how you can help: "Donate" Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government... I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters. I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th. We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots. It's time to fight back. Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. Thank you for your continued support! We will take our country back. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc28245055be4e2086790486ada32156&_e=EOkCUWOZqZgM6sJB3o5lbI-IfAE_df80EUWwvtWsdGq6Qp6ccP9Jwgxwng_EAcT80HqqBXaPZgDSCw3jcrkPT4V7661M8tajudg32818_fv30sQbRKNAvSuMEH9q-7Tnd-BIrMbvbVG36UFm7Mj5-V1HapRYPV80tdubUy_RDTvpp5wTAa0Y4TF7QMWiUfLWniRAWRpIoxvslUoq-gJQOb91XnuSy0F0i5wp9tSuxZ-LR9uMvqSgHImNeZKpPZrLDY_LDEPyqbsSZ8VhvlgOUwDM35jAPCzYbMNEp7Sjs9Km_cTnhyOQ1FxcvlttOlubcsTow-cpU58KKrZrWWegwwVil3br9SbzKa-wE-d_t39KQSPgJ6CRaGQzVmcRzHXC0icf2QkBFkcEPTc6Mus8asX3ETQ3LHMX_fm_W3ZiRigH0TIrr0f_uTupFgaS68uM)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc28245055be4e2086790486ada32156&_e=EOkCUWOZqZgM6sJB3o5lbI-IfAE_df80EUWwvtWsdGq6Qp6ccP9Jwgxwng_EAcT80HqqBXaPZgDSCw3jcrkPT4V7661M8tajudg32818_fv30sQbRKNAvSuMEH9q-7Tnd-BIrMbvbVG36UFm7Mj5-V1HapRYPV80tdubUy_RDTvpp5wTAa0Y4TF7QMWiUfLWniRAWRpIoxvslUoq-gJQOb91XnuSy0F0i5wp9tSuxZ-LR9uMvqSgHImNeZKpPZrLDY_LDEPyqbsSZ8VhvlgOUwbt8POVT-NgbsngKYX-1IcjxzWS8egxDB4PTVLpN5Fue-sQ0tCYgAT6WGsiPFq8SAz4TZMb8gqmlXPyYAmGhJGQ5FB2BitMUvo0XMFPVZ4uE5yteNeYK2QfE_1jBZsGAxi5hdRGzqIYJ6yPqZJ-2PgbxPc8OiSmxcu_DMnF45Pv)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc28245055be4e2086790486ada32156&_e=EOkCUWOZqZgM6sJB3o5lbI-IfAE_df80EUWwvtWsdGq6Qp6ccP9Jwgxwng_EAcT80HqqBXaPZgDSCw3jcrkPT4V7661M8tajudg32818_fv30sQbRKNAvSuMEH9q-7Tnd-BIrMbvbVG36UFm7Mj5-V1HapRYPV80tdubUy_RDTvpp5wTAa0Y4TF7QMWiUfLWniRAWRpIoxvslUoq-gJQOb91XnuSy0F0i5wp9tSuxZ-LR9uMvqSgHImNeZKpPZrLDY_LDEPyqbsSZ8VhvlgOUyBAERCbVxknjmapmS3eaDg3avA-46j2gKEslfiK96aQ9qfu1Ao1tUmFiacTqDNFocWjwQqessMZ032pBTVCxrIlENC09HfZe8XqbMU4zcAC3GMRILB2q6PAbQxvMWPivpukKckjsQZfi4T4hqM7iGa_4bwBucsSO6pWgUgr5jFk)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cc28245055be4e2086790486ada32156&_e=EOkCUWOZqZgM6sJB3o5lbI-IfAE_df80EUWwvtWsdGq6Qp6ccP9Jwgxwng_EAcT80HqqBXaPZgDSCw3jcrkPT4V7661M8tajudg32818_fv30sQbRKNAvSuMEH9q-7Tnd-BIrMbvbVG36UFm7Mj5-V1HapRYPV80tdubUy_RDTvpp5wTAa0Y4TF7QMWiUfLWniRAWRpIoxvslUoq-gJQOb91XnuSy0F0i5wp9tSuxZ-LR9uMvqSgHImNeZKpPZrLDY_LDEPyqbsSZ8VhvlgOUwtqLAC3bzf9CkemCFuSNePmr7aaCrRArqb3K9SOswR9wm_04NDwqPIxMN0jFeLjNXYHNltMiJAQNqH8cZNYDjcxtNeCIZ1DTQtj6BWfpkqOQtIVkyp3sY1C9CdHQArXAq1F8QGflRgv7yyQWBAzcUsWfcg2xyA49bFRrZrKkkU9).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=cc28245055be4e2086790486ada32156&_t=zsfMZjnKiEpjKX5HyPv0oSr8ymFO5GAr48qHDPxDVusWnih9ph6-c-NAXkrkIlRMnWvRLOKPstGIKWwMttI3RiCSGR6JLF7ibaII8_5_7TnrMZXcIvoT3ZLjx5S5WZT-YgcTXbbPk-ZEjRLf1m3Q3_hZ4oM9Ez0S3imnYQDu5x4%3D)

name: American Freedom Report
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PkNnw8oufUVVpddxRdJWdA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR3eOP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjExMDEyM19STV9BRlJfMjAyMzExMjdXA3NwY0IKZV_g42RlULMOd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PkNnw8oufUVVpddxRdJWdA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR3eOP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjExMDEyM19STV9BRlJfMjAyMzExMjdXA3NwY0IKZV_g42RlULMOd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PkNnw8oufUVVpddxRdJWdA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR3eOP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjExMDEyM19STV9BRlJfMjAyMzExMjdXA3NwY0IKZV_g42RlULMOd1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) on these survival food kits while you can.

subject: It comes down to Georgia

body:
to restoring order to the House

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74074513/440514477/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjljNjkxYi01NThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrW_x_6Zj3ZUCoL6xIlmmOTCSsIJ4dqU_BYoFyvIvUQ=&emci=2f7df13e-4c8d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&emdi=c69c691b-558d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, we’re launching a donor drive to gain support for flipping control of Congress.

Over the last month we’ve seen Republicans in Congress drag us to the brink of a government shutdown that would’ve left thousands of Georgians working without paychecks, and then they removed their own Speaker of the House with no replacement.

**They repeatedly nominated election deniers, far right MAGA Republicans, and hardcore anti-abortion extremists. They finally selected a far-right extremist who opposes gay rights and marriage equality, has worked to ban abortion, and won't say that Joe Biden legitimately won the 2020 election.**

[**_Will you pitch in toward our donor drive to restore order to the House and flip Congressional seats in Georgia?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74074514/440514478/710125701?refcode=20231127.1_FCF_11AF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjljNjkxYi01NThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrW_x_6Zj3ZUCoL6xIlmmOTCSsIJ4dqU_BYoFyvIvUQ=)

It’s clear that the Republican party is broken beyond all repair and no longer capable of governing.

[**_Pitch in now >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74074515/440514479/710125701?refcode=20231127.1_FCF_11AF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjljNjkxYi01NThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrW_x_6Zj3ZUCoL6xIlmmOTCSsIJ4dqU_BYoFyvIvUQ=)

Thank you,

GA Dems

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO**
body:
Hi there, it’s Zuma Crow — your favorite dog in the Mile High City! 🐶 My dad Jason asked me to reach out with a *very* important favor. Can you keep a secret? | | | Hi there, it’s Zuma Crow — your favorite dog in the Mile High City! 🐶
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74075518/440515224/-1384638863?refcode=X_112723_BanditZuma_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTlmMzNkMC01NThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMNtT5CIk4LST1upJZ6pwEO-7TFAiPEjJjl3JCMe0aM=)
---
My dad Jason asked me to reach out with a *very* important favor. Can you keep a secret?

Tomorrow is Senator Michael Bennet’s birthday — one of my dad’s good friends! For years, they’ve worked paw-in-paw to deliver for Colorado families on issues like protecting our rights, supporting our veterans, defending our health care — and of course, supporting pups like me!

**Now, it’s almost Michael Bennet’s birthday, and we came up with the perfect way to celebrate: The Bennet family just got a NEW puppy, and we want to shower her with gifts! Check out my new best friend, Bandit:**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74075520/440515226/-1384638863?refcode=X_112723_BanditZuma_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTlmMzNkMC01NThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMNtT5CIk4LST1upJZ6pwEO-7TFAiPEjJjl3JCMe0aM=)
---
Bandit is as fun and rambunctious as you can guess. She’s obsessed with new toys and goes through them in days. (I remember my puppy stage too...)That’s why I learned how to write on a keyboard and email you today, friend: Just $10 can help us restock Bandit on all the treats, chew toys, and tennis balls her lil’ heart can handle! 🥰 **[Can you split a donation between Michael Bennet’s campaign and my dad’s? Your gifts can help get my new friend Bandit all the new toys as the family welcomes her in (along with helping my dad and Sen. Bennet keep fighting for Coloradans in Congress)>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74075524/440515227/-1384638863?refcode=X_112723_BanditZuma_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTlmMzNkMC01NThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMNtT5CIk4LST1upJZ6pwEO-7TFAiPEjJjl3JCMe0aM=)**

clean_body: Hi there, it’s Zuma Crow — your favorite dog in the Mile High City! 🐶 My dad Jason asked me to reach out with a very important favor. Can you keep a secret? | | | Hi there, it’s Zuma Crow — your favorite dog in the Mile High City! 🐶 = My dad Jason asked me to reach out with a very important favor. Can you keep a secret? Tomorrow is Senator Michael Bennet’s birthday — one of my dad’s good friends! For years, they’ve worked paw-in-paw to deliver for Colorado families on issues like protecting our rights, supporting our veterans, defending our health care — and of course, supporting pups like me! Now, it’s almost Michael Bennet’s birthday, and we came up with the perfect way to celebrate: The Bennet family just got a NEW puppy, and we want to shower her with gifts! Check out my new best friend, Bandit: = Bandit is as fun and rambunctious as you can guess. She’s obsessed with new toys and goes through them in days. (I remember my puppy stage too...)That’s why I learned how to write on a keyboard and email you today, friend: Just $10 can help us restock Bandit on all the treats, chew toys, and tennis balls her lil’ heart can handle! 🥰 = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jason Crow and Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | Thank you for all your help!— Zuma Crow | | Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States = | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | = | | | PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO | | = By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. name: Katie Porter
subject: My latest road trip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I'm so grateful for our beautiful public lands.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33825%2E3422442%2EHR53PA)
Happy Monday, Derek, I hope you had a nice Thanksgiving weekend. This year my family celebrated Thanksgiving with a road trip to Arches National Park in Moab, Utah. There was mountain biking, hiking, and no-filter-needed sunsets and sunrises.
**I'm so grateful for our beautiful public lands—which allow families opportunities to get outside, support local economies, and help preserve our country’s natural resources.**
****
On the congressional Natural Resources Committee, I'm pushing to protect these public spaces and make them more accessible. But believe it or not, there are some Members of Congress who would rather give our public lands to their fossil fuel CEO friends.
**[Can you add your name to my petition to tell Congress to prioritize protecting our nation’s public lands?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-protect-public-lands/?source=EMAN23_1_PPL_20231127_V1_F&akid=33825%2E3422442%2EHR53PA)**
[Add your name >>](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-protect-public-lands/?source=EMAN23_1_PPL_20231127_V1_F&akid=33825%2E3422442%2EHR53PA)
Our public land belongs to all of us, and I’ll always fight to protect it. Thanks for joining,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_PPL_20231127_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33825_3422442_HR53PA&akid=33825%2E3422442%2EHR53PA)**

name: Team DLCC
subject: 3 reasons to 3X your impact →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
There are countless reasons why you should chip in a 3X-matched gift to support state Dems. We weren’t able to fit them all in, but we found a way to squeeze in the top three. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**We can think of countless reasons to support our movement to elect state Democrats – and while we can’t fit them all in this email _(we tried!),_ we’ll start with three:**
1. **By chipping in a 3X-matched donation _now_ , you’re helping build a winning foundation for state Democrats** – supporting our work this early in the cycle is the _best way_ to set state Democrats up for success.
2. **Our work didn’t end on November 7th – we’re always in election mode.** As you read this, we're preparing to face _six special elections_ over the next two months – including races in Florida and Minnesota. So we need to make sure we’re giving our candidates the resources they need to win.
3. **The DLCC is the _only_ official party committee dedicated to electing Democrats to state legislatures nationwide.** Our work covers _thousands_ of state legislative seats, and we’re relying on grassroots support to help Democrats compete in every state.

[Will you chip in a 3X-matched gift of $10 right now to give Democrats the early investment to hit the ground running ahead of key special elections and an all-important election year? name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They ruined her life without asking any questions
body:
One appointment was all it took.

| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0171eeba069f4fa9bb4be812eb6aa472&_e=vRS6CJ5fJ8hShNFhZvKqv8JXC0e3M_ncGUZvv0J66mcUH37lap9BHs0YKQ4Ka-Bbz4TD4anf5DMCi3jZ8WBQ1zb18rOoA7qa3H7wo0L_PjH-nXH777CCxuzLMaX5pLieRyYMv1LGvFZc8xVfEsYrCgl1o3WLEudVaKsi0Z7fRINuioWMhucK924Kp_YUBt4kUG6EOy5Ewh7VzacJj8JX1iIAwJ6jsr7gXvZC-D5l9ihs7CDN6tEK16kKrCUatqwLiErfXpZtISbJP0-uIjmZaH_Ne8_Jb_24g3MYezFjAX6QGZSXkGhI_R4vH2q8b6JF045XumCluQYanz5_AYSWb8TXmI8qjiT9B9Np9omiMb8WyvairNisa_GlZjM2Cg_T)
---
Friend, One appointment was all it took. **After one appointment at the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic, doctors fast tracked a 16-year-old girl into a double mastectomy.** _Not because she had aggressive cancer, and not because she had some rare condition that made it necessary ..._ But because like so many other girls with mental health comorbidities, Luka Hein had been convinced she was a man in a woman's body. And instead of giving her the mental health counseling she needed, doctors scheduled her for a permanent, painful and life altering procedure that she'd never recover from. Now, I don't know how much you know about transgender medical "treatment." Because of the multiple cases we've taken on in the past two years on this issue, I know a lot more than I ever thought I would. But even by transgender activist standards, a double mastectomy, as the first form of "treatment," is careless and dangerous. Almost every hospital that offers what the Left calls "gender affirming care" insists on prescribing patients with puberty blockers, hormones, or some combination of the two for at least one year before putting them under the scalpel. **But the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic showed no regard for Luka 's wellbeing - [and that's why we're suing them.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0171eeba069f4fa9bb4be812eb6aa472&_e=vRS6CJ5fJ8hShNFhZvKqv8JXC0e3M_ncGUZvv0J66mcUH37lap9BHs0YKQ4Ka-Bbz4TD4anf5DMCi3jZ8WBQ1zb18rOoA7qa3H7wo0L_PjH-nXH777CCxuzLMaX5pLieRyYMv1LGvFZc8xVfEsYrCgl1o3WLEudVaKsi0Z7fRINuioWMhucK924Kp_YUBt4kUG6EOy5Ewh7VzacJj8JX1rOCBKcDvMbtIBdPW8COOSQPY_H-I7sRiHOjwaNCTYbrO_LjlyuLz73PD4mWWm-yjqnAetNuECwdCjo7t8YdXgzT1PUB9zx90fsDvQuHP3VlqffEZjfcGmC3WvWp6wBUpG3LBWRuN4r-DOAFC_22RQ2giH9TOcJKFDIr3ahjCnj6)** Because this is bigger than Luka, and it's bigger than the University of Nebraska Medical Center. Our children are under attack. From our hospitals to our schools to our government to our media, kids are bombarded with transgender propaganda. If they show any signs of distress or deviation from the status quo, trusted adults and authority figures tell them that their real problem is being born the "wrong" body and there's a simple solution. They tell young, impressionable kids that they can change their name, change their gender, get some new clothes, get medication, have a few surgeries and it will fix them. And they tell them everything is reversible if they change their mind later. They tell parents that they can either have a "dead daughter or a live son" - meaning that if their children aren't allowed to transition, they'll eventually kill themselves. But none of that is true. The truth is, so many of these kids end up more broken, suicidal and depressed AFTER transitioning than they were before. The truth is, they're setting these kids and their families up for a lifetime of medical complications and ailments. And the truth is that if patriots like you don't step up now, it's only a matter of time before this evil reaches your loved ones. **[That's why I hope I can count on your generous, tax deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty, to fund our lawsuit on behalf of Luka Hein and cases like hers.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0171eeba069f4fa9bb4be812eb6aa472&_e=vRS6CJ5fJ8hShNFhZvKqv8JXC0e3M_ncGUZvv0J66mcUH37lap9BHs0YKQ4Ka-Bbz4TD4anf5DMCi3jZ8WBQ1zb18rOoA7qa3H7wo0L_PjH-nXH777CCxuzLMaX5pLieRyYMv1LGvFZc8xVfEsYrCgl1o3WLEudVaKsi0Z7fRINuioWMhucK924Kp_YUBt4kUG6EOy5Ewh7VzacJj8JX1izJmVMYqGITMbnwDVC7Gor6hcud63DSMaQti6N1_dXjW6t4DDXBu7922ojZ3WUvRPLrBvNMLkTDuS3TRhG05jyFKoJv8IWB_dKp6pxLHZOPjMeYgFcPvoRsTDE9XVgfUwo7QwbUT8aX0RmgfVxciulIvdS9Ugeo_O1_MqaYph6s)** Luka is one of three detransitioners we represent in landmark lawsuits against the hospitals and doctors responsible for mutilating their bodies as minors. We've taken on case after case because we know just how important it is to protect vulnerable children. I've sat face to face with young women that have had their lives and their health stolen from them. **_I can 't change what's been done to them - but with your help, I can make these gender clinics pay._** And if we can win this case, we can send a loud, clear message to hospitals nationwide that our children are NOT lab rats. They aren't science experiments, they aren't blank checks for Big Pharma, and they aren't political pawns for the radical Left. If we win this lawsuit, we could set a precedent nationwide and save thousands of children from Luka's fate. But as a nonprofit organization, that won't happen without patriots like you.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | P.S. Luka needed a psychiatrist, a counselor or a therapist. But instead, "doctors" gave her a radical double mastectomy - and her life will never be the same. **[Please give a generous, tax-deductible donation today to fund her lawsuit, hold her doctors accountable, and fight to ensure no other child has to go through what she went through.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0171eeba069f4fa9bb4be812eb6aa472&_e=vRS6CJ5fJ8hShNFhZvKqv8JXC0e3M_ncGUZvv0J66mcUH37lap9BHs0YKQ4Ka-Bbz4TD4anf5DMCi3jZ8WBQ1zb18rOoA7qa3H7wo0L_PjH-nXH777CCxuzLMaX5pLieRyYMv1LGvFZc8xVfEsYrCgl1o3WLEudVaKsi0Z7fRINuioWMhucK924Kp_YUBt4kUG6EOy5Ewh7VzacJj8JX1vxX2UvhVKiFb_gdXZ_Ph5cC2wdw_HmSVwsPrZ6GMJ4G2jLSg8Blk03k1f6N9MQXg3mau2smWOLanjvT0WRSeQAOququNzCvzSofHnQ8JZYTBIvFOZnWzFQ0U5ce7__GNlW7kRoxDaSV8dHTHs4f21a28pHccvvGH-SbXuKp7YYj)**

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdf1a93d954949228f68f95cf17736e2&_e=uO1ZM6tIroA_OOMX3IMnxDo1PXRGRtB8OqsRCNt4sLdCpYOTkd222TXt2T13E724y67qRpDlgzJ_2yuRDWfqkr3hd_-gwEtMrYRVQMzJzWVp0xZADxynEdQ0oV_-4sdjIBMPGmvmgBHQD_xpnagI9sItHaLLziv12Lwka3rSBE0Vqfb8saIJ3Fij3S8i32qPSy93H4egeSwYuQI0mI5gjc8Q0HYbYgqo9cyEP71AHsiGcFyPrLEsk_PpH00X3UrdaY-Kh5s00RT9fGVaio7d9_C6zNu6kmwZWTgyjnz9bSvznQqBHNcghQm_hzlDyC1UzftRtnzNUNJyyaOc8u5gnkWto9CASKvp8Xs1MIn9Gsrl2UOPBHhHpZ2Hegzn6tG3zQmszgmV7MCjgjWKvchbkvJ20FjU-go6XttW0tjsvnQJyCAz0zB2rKmu7wFA4DYV)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdf1a93d954949228f68f95cf17736e2&_e=uO1ZM6tIroA_OOMX3IMnxDo1PXRGRtB8OqsRCNt4sLdCpYOTkd222TXt2T13E724y67qRpDlgzJ_2yuRDWfqkr3hd_-gwEtMrYRVQMzJzWVp0xZADxynEdQ0oV_-4sdjIBMPGmvmgBHQD_xpnagI9sItHaLLziv12Lwka3rSBE0Vqfb8saIJ3Fij3S8i32qPSy93H4egeSwYuQI0mI5gjc8Q0HYbYgqo9cyEP71AHsiGcFyPrLEsk_PpH00X3UrdaY-Kh5s00RT9fGVaio7d92UrRmyrZLa-JQzUFspf69-CVJNxoUGR3YnFmtnUv9Pp5UnIpF_nReh3aXBIeEeZRTCeAyOE86Pz1s6__eKngt0Sn2QTeQTMtkveagBF-Hpo2-of-YgDibOJSu1I1U49E6ntGIDkLfp-jqB990M074aETeyruhtAWLF4YTLKcDrM)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdf1a93d954949228f68f95cf17736e2&_e=uO1ZM6tIroA_OOMX3IMnxDo1PXRGRtB8OqsRCNt4sLdCpYOTkd222TXt2T13E724y67qRpDlgzJ_2yuRDWfqkr3hd_-gwEtMrYRVQMzJzWVp0xZADxynEdQ0oV_-4sdjIBMPGmvmgBHQD_xpnagI9sItHaLLziv12Lwka3rSBE0Vqfb8saIJ3Fij3S8i32qPSy93H4egeSwYuQI0mI5gjc8Q0HYbYgqo9cyEP71AHsiGcFyPrLEsk_PpH00X3UrdaY-Kh5s00RT9fGVaio7d91T6MEKoAQKwU8pLzx_VB_p1YHF9slc0qX0iIbnnQ8iNeiWoy_t-ARTo4cQk3ayDVGnxKaj5-K9MEW4_CniaDc11VOWmnMbGDqmHPDS0WR4CvoskC-40sGn0fQqX-xWiQGoPHwVVXcqtzKqVxaRI-NQ1f5Yj5MPzTdQJ0oZcij8H)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdf1a93d954949228f68f95cf17736e2&_e=uO1ZM6tIroA_OOMX3IMnxDo1PXRGRtB8OqsRCNt4sLdCpYOTkd222TXt2T13E724y67qRpDlgzJ_2yuRDWfqkr3hd_-gwEtMrYRVQMzJzWVp0xZADxynEdQ0oV_-4sdjIBMPGmvmgBHQD_xpnagI9sItHaLLziv12Lwka3rSBE0Vqfb8saIJ3Fij3S8i32qPSy93H4egeSwYuQI0mI5gjc8Q0HYbYgqo9cyEP71AHsiGcFyPrLEsk_PpH00X3UrdaY-Kh5s00RT9fGVaio7d9-YEtKdDjw-DwFKygOjMAspvJddN5jmM1qdLFcqKnseDkcTq_652-3g_lPbJMImk7MnkbzIswfmOFQf2-WtIf8NF8N2Du7J1NOUkL9C-lpbmtmUDHDaaulltk8yGNVHOF4gIpJ0zV1Y9EIrN11M0R0xDXCBC64o77UkHbQ8AEJZt).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

**Ready for an easy decision? Here’s one.**

There are two questions in the Race to Replace Scott Perry:

**1\. Who is best able to beat Scott Perry?**

The 10th is predominantly a Republican district. There is only one candidate in the Race to Replace who has a track record of winning elections as a Democrat in a Republican district.

Twice I have been elected to the Carlisle school board despite a substantial Republican registration advantage. I know how to appeal to reasonable Republicans and how to provide constituent service that keeps their trust.

[Convinced? Donate now to make it happen!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74081704/440523196/-2112306580?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_231127_1_1&refcode2=12790b9a-588d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&contactdata=NNigRtpzCvX3/7ynfon20ngQ93R9GaPLW9EHNRcLkjT1Jptxak6M/1SY8GNFvQxW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjc5MGI5YS01ODhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tCn3ULTFLLpMYEvBwaMi5pOXqfjEOR_6CsSgZu12bm0=) | | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74081705/440523197/-2112306580?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_231127_1_1&refcode2=12790b9a-588d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&contactdata=NNigRtpzCvX3/7ynfon20ngQ93R9GaPLW9EHNRcLkjT1Jptxak6M/1SY8GNFvQxW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjc5MGI5YS01ODhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tCn3ULTFLLpMYEvBwaMi5pOXqfjEOR_6CsSgZu12bm0=)**
---

**2\. Who is best able to represent the people of the 10th District?**
* A life-long Democrat
* 15+ years living, working and volunteering in the 10th District
* A farmer and small business owner
* Crisis-tested leadership as a veteran of on-the-ground combat and peacekeeping forces
* Almost all campaign funds from residents of the 10th District
* Community service to veterans, unemployed, underemployed
* A teacher and school board member
* Ethnic heritage as the son of a Mexican-American.

No other candidate can offer ALL of this life experience and service to the people of the 10th District.

clean_body: | Ready for an easy decision? Here’s one. There are two questions in the Race to Replace Scott Perry: 1\. Who is best able to beat Scott Perry? The 10th is predominantly a Republican district. There is only one candidate in the Race to Replace who has a track record of winning elections as a Democrat in a Republican district. Twice I have been elected to the Carlisle school board despite a substantial Republican registration advantage. I know how to appeal to reasonable Republicans and how to provide constituent service that keeps their trust. = | | = 2\. Who is best able to represent the people of the 10th District? A life-long Democrat 15+ years living, working and volunteering in the 10th District A farmer and small business owner Crisis-tested leadership as a veteran of on-the-ground combat and peacekeeping forces Almost all campaign funds from residents of the 10th District Community service to veterans, unemployed, underemployed A teacher and school board member Ethnic heritage as the son of a Mexican-American. No other candidate can offer ALL of this life experience and service to the people of the 10th District. = | = Thanks for all you do. Onward, Rick P.S. body:

Friend, candidly, because Bob is so generous to us with time-off around the holidays, we didn't do much outreach for fundraising last week.
We need to catch up before our end-of-the month deadline and you should be rewarded for your contribution. So, we have some merch for you!

Hi ,
We have partnered with a top-notch vendor who also serves high-profile clients like Joe Biden, Stacy Abrams, Cpt. Mark Kelly, Indivisible, For the People, and many more. It means you're buying some high quality threads.
We take pride in the fact that everything here is union printed , from design to the processing, shipping, and managing. We are committed to supporting organized labor, and each product comes with an authentication stamp to prove it.
All of our products are 100% Made in the USA, supplied by hardworking American families.
We also care about the environment, which is why a portion of every purchase made through our merchant processor supports carbon capture.
Dr. Bob wanted us to only work with companies that share his values and ideals.
When you buy our merchandise, proceeds benefit the campaign, 'Friends of Dr. Bob'. It may not be a direct donation [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] , but it helps us get the word out for Doc when you wear our merchandise.
Our top sellers include hoodies and can coozies, but we also have hats, stickers, onesies, tees, sweatshirts, and even yard signs if you can't wait. These make great stocking stuffers; baby not included.
To get yours before Christmas, order soon!
Thank you for your support, and happy shopping!
Bob Lorinser for Congress

name: Adam Schiff
subject: 10 weeks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Derek, every time you pitch in $10, you help me stay on the road a bit longer, meeting a few more voters. You help my team run extra digital ads for young voters. You help us print more literature and yard signs for our field team knocking on doors.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)
Derek —
Early voting begins in California in _10 weeks._
That’s right. **Just. 10. Weeks.**
It might be hard to believe, but Californians are deciding who to vote for _right now_ — which is why my team and I are pulling out all the stops as we work to meet voters across our great state.
**[Today, I’m hoping you can pitch in $10 to fuel our campaign’s work over these next 10 weeks to make sure everyone from San Diego to Siskiyou knows what we stand for and how I’m going to deliver for them in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.1bMUf6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)**
[DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.1bMUf6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)
---
With the support of this grassroots team, I’ve been able to meet people across California. On their home turf. Talking about their issues. And what we need to get done.
From union halls and coffee shops to boardwalks and barbecues, there’s nothing I love more than shaking hands with voters and asking a simple question: “How can I help?”
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.8xjxgy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)
Derek, every time you pitch in $10, you help me stay on the road a bit longer and power my efforts to meet a few more voters. You help my team run extra digital ads for young voters. You help us print more literature and yard signs for our field team knocking on doors.
**With 10 weeks to go until early voting begins, we’re building the largest grassroots movement California has ever seen — and we’re doing it together.**
**[Please, chip in $10 to power our campaign all the way to early voting and beyond. I’m so appreciative of any amount you can give today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.1bMUf6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.hoLlT4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.xj9sMr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.J8Tkh1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.8YGyR7&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.eiBZhK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=12&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.8xjxgy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231127_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=13&akid=4575%2E5257348%2EHJpORj)
---
Thank you for supporting our campaign. Onward to early voting!
— Adam

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Why your donation *today* makes such a big impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We have one of the best (and only!) opportunities to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024.
#
Peter,
With our second-to-last monthly fundraising deadline of 2023 coming up at the end of this week, I wanted to share a few quick reasons why your donation today makes such a big impact on our grassroots campaign:
* **DC insiders and corporate mega-donors have funneled millions of dollars into Missouri’s U.S. Senate race since Lucas Kunce launched this campaign back in January.** They know that a born-and-raised Missourian and 13-year Marine veteran like Lucas has what it takes to defeat Josh Hawley next year, so they’re already spending BIG to tear Lucas down.
* **Even despite all the GOP spending + attacks, multiple polls confirm that Lucas is in a _statistical tie_ with Josh Hawley.** After Hawley exposed himself as a fraud and a coward on January 6th, he became the most unpopular GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election in 2024 — and between his approval numbers and these head-to-head polls, he’s got a lot to show for it.
* **Now, our campaign has reached a major turning point.** Lucas spent 2023 holding Hawley accountable and meeting with voters across the state. But with 2024 now just weeks away, we need to start making some critical decisions about our organizing program, media buys, and so many other elements of a winning grassroots campaign.

**When you chip in today, you’re not just helping us defeat Josh Hawley — you’re making an early investment into one of the best and only opportunities we have to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39392?refcode=em20231127-4270&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4270%2E614464%2EYwHHy6)**
Together, we can stand up to the shady insiders and corporate elites doing everything they can to keep their grip on this seat. We can help Lucas take the lead in this neck-and-neck race. We can send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate. And we can take back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country.
But we can’t do it without your help, Peter. **So I’m asking:**
**[Will you rush a donation of absolutely any amount (even just $3!) toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today? With $0 from corporate PACs and $0 from Big Oil and Big Pharma execs, we’re building a grassroots movement here in Missouri entirely powered by everyday people like you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39392?refcode=em20231127-4270&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4270%2E614464%2EYwHHy6)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39393?refcode=em20231127-4270&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=4270%2E614464%2EYwHHy6) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39393?refcode=em20231127-4270&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=4270%2E614464%2EYwHHy6) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39393?refcode=em20231127-4270&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=4270%2E614464%2EYwHHy6) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39393?refcode=em20231127-4270&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=4270%2E614464%2EYwHHy6) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39393?refcode=em20231127-4270&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=4270%2E614464%2EYwHHy6) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39393?refcode=em20231127-4270&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=4270%2E614464%2EYwHHy6) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39392?refcode=em20231127-4270&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4270%2E614464%2EYwHHy6)
---
Thanks for all your help.
Now let’s flip this seat!
Emma
Team Lucas Kunce

name: Stop Gun Violence PAC
subject: Democrats SPRUNG to action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
An assault weapons ban will help us save thousands of lives in this country every year!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74085192/440526348/2040583187?refcode=BLU_EM_SGVP_2023-11-27_Z&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWJkMjY1ZjctNWE4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=khIa9recVu8xhwToLB2XlTU1UW-hK_nIVSAjCHbqQUk=)
---
| | | Peter,

When we emailed you last week about the importance of PASSING an assault weapons ban, we weren’t sure if local Democrats were going to step up...

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74085431/440527441/623074613?code=jtk1345-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ4ODUxMTQtNWM4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0nDWzPFY2RfkZG08ama6kKg4M294uposYOvE5ONuaE=&emci=09c1fab7-a085-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=54885114-5c8d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=9329426)
---
As we witness a world in crisis, friend, we are also at a pivotal moment in our own nation’s history. Despite the fact that disgraced former President Donald Trump has been criminally indicted on four separate occasions over a myriad of alleged crimes, we’ve seen him climbing in the polls as the clear GOP frontrunner in the 2024 presidential election. We’ve seen the Supreme Court – stacked with three ideologically extreme justices appointed by Donald Trump – overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and upend reproductive freedom for tens of millions of Americans. And we’ve seen the rapid rise of artificial intelligence (AI), which could pose existential risks to our elections, to millions of jobs, and to humanity itself, if this technology is left unchecked. **As we face these threats to our freedoms, our economy, our safety, and our democracy, I need to hear from you directly about what is top of mind for you and your family. That’s why my team and I put together a brand-new priorities survey to collect your feedback:** **[Please, will you take this survey and share your thoughts, priorities, and concerns with me directly? Your input is as critical as ever, and I’m looking for another 200 responses from this team before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74085432/440527442/859235145?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1345-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ4ODUxMTQtNWM4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0nDWzPFY2RfkZG08ama6kKg4M294uposYOvE5ONuaE=&emci=09c1fab7-a085-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=54885114-5c8d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=9329426)**
| | | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74085433/440527443/859235145?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1345-su-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ4ODUxMTQtNWM4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0nDWzPFY2RfkZG08ama6kKg4M294uposYOvE5ONuaE=&emci=09c1fab7-a085-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=54885114-5c8d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=9329426)

As I’ve done throughout my career, I’m doing everything to protect the values we hold dear as Americans and solve the problems facing everyday people across our country. Thank you so much for letting me know what’s on your mind at this important moment. Dick

We’re excited to share that we’ve added another major supporter – **Food and Water Action, the political arm of Food & Water Watch, has endorsed Laura’s campaign!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74085759/440528547/-1415976427?refcode=em-11.27.23-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWUzZjg1ZDEtNWQ4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TQA7433Djy5ApjbHCwA7eE5YTt7Uo8nX5SdFbd1_A6Y=) _“As an Assemblymember in Sacramento, Laura Friedman has a proven record on climate change – and has also helped protect Californians from PFAS exposure and drought. We’re excited to endorse her in the race for California’s 30th Congressional district!”_ This is another major show of support from environmental organizations, joining groups like California Environmental Voters, League of Conservation Voters Action Fund, and Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund. **And at a time when extreme weather caused by climate change is ravishing forests, food and water supplies, and communities nationwide, we need an environmental champion like Laura in Congress.** **[It’s wonderful to have these groups support, but the most important support we can have is yours. We’re excited to endorse her in the race for California’s 30th Congressional district!” This is another major show of support from environmental organizations, joining groups like California Environmental Voters, League of Conservation Voters Action Fund, and Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund.
