| | Dear Peter, [**Giving Tuesday is tomorrow, but we’re opening our match one day early! If you donate between now and midnight tomorrow, November 28th, your gift will be matched, doubling your impact!** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74085881/440528930/1111673356?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2Mjc4MTRlLTVlOGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=anyKSuoO7C7IiCGyg07qu52sDE-RlJBA2pv-v0e6UYU=&emci=074e7798-c688-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=8627814e-5e8d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=2107230) Our work–protecting Oregon’s natural legacy, electing pro-climate and pro-environment candidates, and holding our elected leaders accountable–is only possible with the help of thousands of grassroots supporters like you. This Giving Tuesday, we asked OLCV members why they invest in our work. Here is what a couple of them had to say: _“In my mind, the most impactful way to advance environmental and_ _conservation objectives is legislative. And particularly at this time, action at the state level is critical. OLCV has a robust process for evaluating and supporting candidates for state level office, and an equally robust system of tracking and reporting their environment-related voting records (the scorecard). I use both OLCV's candidate endorsements and the annual scorecard to inform my own voting as well as my local political activism. If you're wanting to see action on environment and conservation in Oregon, invest in OLCV.”_ – Bonnie New _“OLCV leads the way by organizing environmental and climate groups all over the state to help create, support, and ultimately pass vital legislation to curb greenhouse gas emissions. We all rely on their analysis and expertise. Their leadership is irreplaceable.”_ – KB Mercer **[This Giving Tuesday, will you join Bonnie, KB, and the thousands of others who share our commitment to protecting the Oregon we love?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74085882/440528931/1111673356?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2Mjc4MTRlLTVlOGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=anyKSuoO7C7IiCGyg07qu52sDE-RlJBA2pv-v0e6UYU=&emci=074e7798-c688-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=8627814e-5e8d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=2107230) ** We know that there are so many important causes to support on Giving Tuesday and all year long. Thank you for considering giving to OLCV. With sincere gratitude,
April Christenson, OLCV Development Director |
---|---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Urgent Petition to Preserve Our Shared Values
body:
Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture.

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8a0dbad0b8148dea85d2350bc27171e&_e=UCntjIgm1OgHQlOF0hA0izmvkeQ1OYkPeLJ9n_z0lMGunamELXs9xcQrnh_Aera4YO-x2wZ5nNBTvnsGu7Vsejq9f5pkMPhQybFDP87RLX7kh9wre-6f79PTHmc6CcdEjWo-_QLeZiPLOJ21fPCMbvWvP1ABD6mRILW-fozvaDxFnKgKYCnyyEQxZPGbQoUqzx8j_3E3Rz5ChTVzJFR_nOzlLucyr-5FdGEbWdFYkpcI9HBVnAKOaok9RNWIAuvElpHZUhovYqq29p2il77TZP0q7lrBRQjE67gar27_fnBTmEBDb5uyl3iqrykItSj80EbUeG8StqxFsjtpBVMfilNqJdl-LV-FnObn3lhqc7YZkajMsH0yK3dSEV_-uRDs2pNTMJN35z7RFUhoaWWaNMkDjD2kvLUkqvNknHpaT8o%3D)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. The foundational principles that have shaped this great country, the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life, are being threatened. The very essence of our American Dream is under siege. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8a0dbad0b8148dea85d2350bc27171e&_e=UCntjIgm1OgHQlOF0hA0izmvkeQ1OYkPeLJ9n_z0lMGunamELXs9xcQrnh_Aera4YO-x2wZ5nNBTvnsGu7Vsejq9f5pkMPhQybFDP87RLX7kh9wre-6f79PTHmc6CcdEjWo-_QLeZiPLOJ21fPCMbvWvP1ABD6mRILW-fozvaDxFnKgKYCnyyEQxZPGbQoUqzx8j_3E3Rz5ChTVzJFR_nOzlLucyr-5FdGEbWdFYkpcI9HBVnAKOaok9RNWIAuvE5DkixN0vA3qRALE9MlSqwKnZIhfAGrIkDddXrxWQKHcfCL4ss2GmU8klbam3TkK4DS4Ph00_0Ge8j-4n3KgPmFJngi-_oT5NjEYgOFDHQuVMGT9d12c_l6KgzG3n3epiyFK4gTeLBhxc5VRTWHFQge5k1jJ-4KUedcAD_Q1asLc%3D) As the founder of the American Cornerstone Institute, I have written a petition calling for us to collectively uphold these cardinal values in the face of rapidly shifting ideologies. It is a patriotic call to arms to those who believe in preserving our traditional American principles.

Your [signature on this petition](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8a0dbad0b8148dea85d2350bc27171e&_e=UCntjIgm1OgHQlOF0hA0izmvkeQ1OYkPeLJ9n_z0lMGunamELXs9xcQrnh_Aera4YO-x2wZ5nNBTvnsGu7Vsejq9f5pkMPhQybFDP87RLX7kh9wre-6f79PTHmc6CcdEjWo-_QLeZiPLOJ21fPCMbvWvP1ABD6mRILW-fozvaDxFnKgKYCnyyEQxZPGbQoUqzx8j_3E3Rz5ChTVzJFR_nOzlLucyr-5FdGEbWdFYkpcI9HBVnAKOaok9RNWIAuvEXr4jy3MLtKuaEd-1WCdPJCQeAdJUNNcT3tv4UbGg9Ymmc31iJop_bi98lN_MeUOCzI5c0wcsX6RsR8WaxaRGKf7fWJo0i0-FvJFkP9qUb263Zx-5n86Y8BsSwtu_ssUTj4hc8hTM2n_i0Cyj6eDFEimJ9DO3MOFjUU2qIs0YJz4%3D) is not just a mark on a document - it's a personal statement of belief, a voice affirming the importance of faith, liberty, family, and life in the fabric of our society.

The stakes have never been higher. I urge you to [stand with me now](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8a0dbad0b8148dea85d2350bc27171e&_e=UCntjIgm1OgHQlOF0hA0izmvkeQ1OYkPeLJ9n_z0lMGunamELXs9xcQrnh_Aera4YO-x2wZ5nNBTvnsGu7Vsejq9f5pkMPhQybFDP87RLX7kh9wre-6f79PTHmc6CcdEjWo-_QLeZiPLOJ21fPCMbvWvP1ABD6mRILW-fozvaDxFnKgKYCnyyEQxZPGbQoUqzx8j_3E3Rz5ChTVzJFR_nOzlLucyr-5FdGEbWdFYkpcI9HBVnAKOaok9RNWIAuvExg9TBH3JW7HiDBvS8gj6c-dRXi86IGB94uhNhdSnU1JWL-YYKAmGWyiN213stBAfgzxflkYGhMNwQpDEsgBBqDnGBPpXRPVXO7tu6FFZ627eUk1XO73oQZO2RTJpz8A2jI4a6cCDR9aLEK7y6i8iQjUN6d6QUuQ0Mplsc9e-Xuk%3D) to ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for future generations.

Your commitment and dedication to these values are invaluable. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

clean_body: Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. The foundational principles that have shaped this great country, the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life, are being threatened. The very essence of our American Dream is under siege. As the founder of the American Cornerstone Institute, I have written a petition calling for us to collectively uphold these cardinal values in the face of rapidly shifting ideologies. It is a patriotic call to arms to those who believe in preserving our traditional American principles. Your is not just a mark on a document - it's a personal statement of belief, a voice affirming the importance of faith, liberty, family, and life in the fabric of our society. The stakes have never been higher. I urge you to to ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for future generations. Your commitment and dedication to these values are invaluable. Together, we can make a difference. Sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Families are fleeing a Mexican town along the border with the U.S. due
to violent cartel activity, including burning homes and intense
battles, according to AZCentral. Rival cartels began fighting Oct. 21
in Sasabe, Sonora, burning down homes and moving into ones residents
left behind, according to AZCentral.

name: Debbie (personal)
subject: trucking along
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
the road to victory
| | |
---
Hi, friend — it's hard to believe that November has gone by so fast, but there are only three days until my end-of-month deadline. I'm about to ask you to make a donation so that I can hit my $150,000 November goal before then — but first, will you let me explain why this is so important?
(If you're short on time but ready to flip Florida blue, here's the best donation link to use: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_2023_email_fr](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74086903/440532603/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk337-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWYwMjE1NDYtNjA4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FWunTqcbjusekQWKaw9vZIzK1V9s--gLyTxtqjl955s=)**)
Now that we've finished off the last bit of leftover turkey, I'm back on the campaign trail, meeting with voters in every corner of Florida.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74086904/440532604/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk337-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWYwMjE1NDYtNjA4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FWunTqcbjusekQWKaw9vZIzK1V9s--gLyTxtqjl955s=)
Their stories remind me of why I'm in this race. There are so many critical issues, like the rising cost of housing and the growing gun violence crisis, facing our state. Floridians need a leader who listens, learns, and works for _them_ — _not_ a right-wing millionaire who only cares about himself.
But here's the thing, friend: **Out here on the road, **_costs add up FAST._ **And my finance director just called to report we're tracking 17% behind where we should be to hit my November goal.**
Goals like these keep our movement going strong — covering costs for everything from ads to the tank of gas that gets us to the next campaign stop. _And they're_ _even more important when your opponent draws from his fortune of nearly a quarter of a billion dollars any time his campaign account needs topping off._
**Thankfully, we just need 19 more people to step up before midnight to get back on track — and I know I can count on you. So, friend, will you rush $5, or anything you can right now, to keep our movement on the road to victory? Here's that donation link again: ****[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_2023_email_fr](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74086905/440532605/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk337-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWYwMjE1NDYtNjA4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FWunTqcbjusekQWKaw9vZIzK1V9s--gLyTxtqjl955s=)**
Thanks for sticking with me,

Debbie

_Sent from Debbie's iPhone_
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74086906/440532606/-31037693?refcode=jtk337-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWYwMjE1NDYtNjA4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FWunTqcbjusekQWKaw9vZIzK1V9s--gLyTxtqjl955s=)

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: I grew up next to one of Donald Trump's golf courses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74087363/440534287/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGI0OGNhYy02MThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMWpSISOUYAlq_9kMbp7rEEcJB4bVdITO1GvU6jAuz0=)
---
Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74087364/440534288/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231127_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGI0OGNhYy02MThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMWpSISOUYAlq_9kMbp7rEEcJB4bVdITO1GvU6jAuz0=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74087365/440534289/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231127_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGI0OGNhYy02MThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMWpSISOUYAlq_9kMbp7rEEcJB4bVdITO1GvU6jAuz0=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the shadow of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward tonight's $10,000 November goal? If thousands of people like you each chip in what they can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and reclaim our House Majority. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74087366/440534290/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231127_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGI0OGNhYy02MThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMWpSISOUYAlq_9kMbp7rEEcJB4bVdITO1GvU6jAuz0=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74087373/440534297/-1359812268?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20231127_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGI0OGNhYy02MThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yMWpSISOUYAlq_9kMbp7rEEcJB4bVdITO1GvU6jAuz0=)

clean_body: | = Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ = Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain. I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips. I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx. = My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family. Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families. You see, the New York City government shoveled over $100 million in government aid to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street. But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families. When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it. I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress. Right now, the shadow of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families – and they’re raising millions to pull it off. But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: The J6 legal warfare being waged against Trump
body:
Leftist activists recently filed a lawsuit to remove President Trump from the ballot in Colorado citing text in the 14th Amendment.. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10401487?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

If you haven’t followed the latest January 6th legal battle being waged against President Trump and any other fighter opposed to the regime, it’s time to pay attention.

_**So please take a moment and read this short email**_.

Leftist activists recently filed a lawsuit to remove President Trump from the ballot in Colorado citing text in the 14th Amendment that prohibits a federally-elected official from taking office who “engaged in insurrection.”

Thankfully, my colleague Jeffrey Clark thoroughly debunked this legal theory with **President****Trump even sharing our research on Truth Social**. And the Judge in the Colorado case agreed with us last week. Finding no legal precedent, the lawsuit was dismissed and President Trump will be kept on the ballot in Colorado.

Case closed? Not by a longshot. 🚨🚨🚨

While we may have won this battle, leftist activists are already planning to appeal the case to the Supreme Court.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=683c4bbee5&e=17913c7d6d)
---
President Trump shared our critical research on Truth Social debunking the Left's phony election claims.
| **If they can keep President Trump or any other candidate off the ballot through phony legal schemes, we’ve lost our Republic**.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a7c825a24d&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Citizens for Renewing America is doing the hard work of debunking these leftist legal arguments, sounding the alarm bells to the grassroots and fighting tooth and nail against the real insurrection threat happening right in front of our eyes. We have also [written model legislation](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=5640dd412c&e=17913c7d6d) to give to state lawmakers the ability to protect their own elections as well.

We don’t take special interest money. We’re not compromised by Big Tech.

**[Our work is possible because people just like you step to the plate and support our cause](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=91e02648c8&e=17913c7d6d). **

Okay, you’ve read the email. You understand the stakes. Now let me ask you this:

**[Can I count on you to help us fight?](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=4f481c400f&e=17913c7d6d)**
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President, Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=f56361ff2b&e=17913c7d6d)

clean_body: It’s time we take that seat back for the people who call our district home. | | | | Peter — Lynn has spent her career working in local, regional, and state governments building coalitions to address urgent issues, from affordable housing to transportation, economic recovery, and job creation. Yet for all the hard work here in our Oregon communities, Lori Chavez DeRemer is notdoing her part in Congress — she's aligned with the ideological politicians who are more intent on culture wars than helping working people, more interested in rolling back fundamental rights than protecting our small cities and rural communities. It's time we take that seat back for the people who call our district home, Peter. = Your donation is an essential part of a broader grassroots movement to take back the House, to enshrine reproductive rights, to tackle climate change, and so much more. name: Brandon Herrera
subject: FW: Win a trip to come target shooting with me!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Herrera for Congress
body:
Hello Patriot,
Did you see the message below?
I can't wait to go shooting with one of my supporters - and all for a great cause: helping me defeat a pro-amnesty, anti-gun member of Congress, Tony Gonzales.
Make your contribution today to be entered to win at [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/MWH892fW25Ll3nTskXHWK5xw/MWH892fW25Ll3nTskXHWK5xw).
Thank you for standing with me and with our Constitution!
Brandon Herrera

* * *
**From:** Brandon Herrera <brandon@brandonherreraforcongress.com>
**Sent:** Wednesday, November 22, 2023 12:35 PM
**Subject:** Win a trip to come target shooting with me!

Dear Patriot,
I'm running against Tony Gonzales to represent Texas' 23rd Congressional District.
I'm a Second Amendment activist and a Constitutionalist. I'll never vote to infringe on your right to keep and bear arms. Tony, however, has voted repeatedly for gun control measures that hurt law abiding citizens.
To defeat Tony Gonzales, I need to inform Texans about his voting record. I'm having a contest to fly one of my supporters down to San Antonio to go target shooting with me. All you need to do to enter is donate before Midnight on November 30th!
Please donate to win a free trip to go target shooting with me: [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/MWH892fW25Ll3nTskXHWK5xw/MWH892fW25Ll3nTskXHWK5xw).
I have a lifelong passion for firearms, and I would be honored to go shooting with one of you. As a business owner, I experienced the consequences of the COVID lockdowns firsthand. I understand the federal government has too much power, and I'm running to return that power back to the people.
Please donate to be entered into winning a trip to San Antonio at [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/MWH892fW25Ll3nTskXHWK5xw/MWH892fW25Ll3nTskXHWK5xw). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
Tony Gonzales is an incumbent Republican with the support of special interests, but I rely on grassroots supporters like you.
You can help get a Second Amendment absolutist into Congress by donating today at [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/MWH892fW25Ll3nTskXHWK5xw/MWH892fW25Ll3nTskXHWK5xw).
Will you please help me meet our goal so we can send a staunch Constitutionalist to Congress?
Respectfully,
Brandon Herrera

clean_body: Hello Patriot, Did you see the message below? I can't wait to go shooting with one of my supporters - and all for a great cause: helping me defeat a pro-amnesty, anti-gun member of Congress, Tony Gonzales. Make your contribution today to be entered to win at . Thank you for standing with me and with our Constitution! Brandon Herrera From: Brandon Herrera <brandon@brandonherreraforcongress.com> Sent: Wednesday, November 22, 2023 12:35 PM Subject:** Win a trip to come target shooting with me! Dear Patriot, I'm running against Tony Gonzales to represent Texas' 23rd Congressional District. I'm a Second Amendment activist and a Constitutionalist. I'll never vote to infringe on your right to keep and bear arms. Tony, however, has voted repeatedly for gun control measures that hurt law abiding citizens. To defeat Tony Gonzales, I need to inform Texans about his voting record. I'm having a contest to fly one of my supporters down to San Antonio to go target shooting with me. All you need to do to enter is donate before Midnight on November 30th! Please donate to win a free trip to go target shooting with me: . I have a lifelong passion for firearms, and I would be honored to go shooting with one of you. As a business owner, I experienced the consequences of the COVID lockdowns firsthand. I understand the federal government has too much power, and I'm running to return that power back to the people. Please donate to be entered into winning a trip to San Antonio at . You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button. Tony Gonzales is an incumbent Republican with the support of special interests, but I rely on grassroots supporters like you. You can help get a Second Amendment absolutist into Congress by donating today at . Will you please help me meet our goal so we can send a staunch Constitutionalist to Congress? Peter Willis,

AIPAC, a far-right wing special interest group, is projected to spend “at least $100 million” supporting primary challengers against progressives brave enough to call for peace.

With prominent Jewish elected officials, like Congressman Jamie Raskin and our founder, Senator Bernie Sanders, criticizing the extreme rightwing government of Bibi Netanyahu, AIPAC’s claim to be representing Jewish Americans is wrong – but that doesn’t mean they won’t use their money to weaponize their false claim to defeat the Squad.

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Why should you care about the OSU Abuse Scandal
body:
Your kids and grandkids are still in Danger. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wBNshDOzLJMfORfziRODTfYxgBKM8hWkiwXtP6XutktV22TP9yKGKy-UGyC2BrtGBuMY4H3c14a03rij_zrU4rlwIy0cod9nqMhKXqpIjeSCqeyCiQqwmYvqX-0QJzIPnBWJpANZeHMstP5aox1vOW-rRKnE899cSybviRuNS5s1mJwqh8BqfZ2ei3H68ZlKZ_f3kEASd4-hpnynoLhIZUKQYLxs_qyV5KzIfUfsqXuibRiSyz2NO4ouxG7ZEumh_QIR9PxEDpKN8zpkpzyHUrRFcb-dm1jxP3DDnKtB3x0ooIOnVB1W3RmbGNQrJqc2Xm_KQWwf2yia-ZRKmq5ldVWT4_FMgu9SzPxiyzHnRbnw/41n/CLXJrRETTNWTP8nKb5X_3Q/h0/tp03xTHonW9KYv1KskQsybfvNzd57_ckVo3VPHYdtII)
---
Team, While Jim Jordan was an assistant wrestling coach at OSU, dozens of athletes reported that a team doctor, Richard Strauss, was sexually assaulting them and others.
It has been widely reported that one of the OSU Coaches that received reports of abuse and knew of this abusive environment was Jim Jordan. Jordan would have interacted with victims of Strauss’ sexual abuse daily.
Not surprisingly, Jim Jordan brushed off the athletes’ concerns at the time, and now he insists that he didn’t know _anything_ at all—a completely unbelievable claim. **Who is more credible, survivors of the abuse who have publicly said Jordan ignored them or Jim Jordan, a proven liar and self-serving politician?**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wBNshDOzLJMfORfziRODTfn7ncMYB4tSTxJ6CkbuX-l_d1AQUHZZY5rsjQmYm2HrJ8JPPj04Y6a6fNHawxsr1fHxuY7nF2prq1aS9RY-IKFj5dTo40mnFR5YXlmTn3C7vWSFmnYws77R3u5QdE0cRCO7Ndb6Mr9tDbqPLl7VQc5GULL2G7sJ4ZYViXjJ0mWBBYQ1hhd_olhK1kkkNxWWGR-DIwmKi-WGiwDDz3mbIYDlXpOY9q9TPwdEvFcXdYKAFqSzWxp3qcGdTQaj1IAzu8tWQEY5tWp8Vf9hbPXu-hawV4H6XP_qhWutOUHm9cPvp-ef_8DysvXpmF6Y0ZWtbPTDNBsILHH7PQ6xUEHcBJdt-AGlSjuy8CQMI8Wq9bzwlyyq_JOYNV4YKbG202HitY/41n/CLXJrRETTNWTP8nKb5X_3Q/h1/4cz89uW4QDvAAzCbQfty3IDp_s_xGVlKzycdcxwdeVA)
---
**I am absolutely infuriated by what happened to these incredible men, and the lack of accountability for Jim Jordan—who should have had the courage to step in and help them. And to make matter worse** Jordan has taken this same dismissive attitude with him to DC where he uses the House Judiciary Committee to help cover up the crimes of the GOP and Former President Donald Trump.
While the athletes seek justice in the courts, I am more determined than ever to defeat Jim Jordan this election and deliver the political accountability that he deserves for leaving the young men he was charged with protecting vulnerable to abuse. Jordan was complicit/allegedly involved with the sexual abuse scandal at OSU. He was complicit/allegedly involved with January 6th GOP plot to interfere with the election. He is not an honest man who has our children’s and country’s best interests at heart. He doesn’t have the backbone or desire to stand up for what is right. Our children are still in danger of being abused by predators which is why as my first action as a Congresswoman I will introduce my bill, the Comprehensive Sexual Abuse Prevention and Accountability Act. A bill which among will add new sweeping protections and make enablers like Jim Jordan face real world consequences. **[Jordan has got to go—and I am the woman who is going to FIRE him next November. My team has set an end of November goal of $25,000, and we are on target to make it, but I need your support to get there. Can you join this movement for justice and help me reach our critical goals with a contribution of $25 or more?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wBNshDOzLJMfORfziRODTfn7ncMYB4tSTxJ6CkbuX-l_d1AQUHZZY5rsjQmYm2HrLFHP0VvgFBGaLg2mo7HFYZONJp3QouAFGGfriLGdn9g44rOv14IYPsjJZFxoQ0H9zwNuSyf_3F2-zFU0Cyy2btpJimF9nEk4b-dYX2ftjRRuMOEZxIza5RfkOvhWHGzJwTVqzEHZWRok7WGLT9ElZbnxNsUH0B6JYYknhpD1-PDchZn9nQI4AEAWeGX6wRCcvHtrTziLGTv9nVRd4rX_36m3YyZFWqXDFB2FAWkQTxb6Y6k5cfuCfIjQYt3xfvwsDKYFxIoXcGcDkq_Wwzk76_k0znm4M7_bGiCEHFDxAj9pOHVvIWqkROzAZ55cm3jRhTwRYGREotISmbASxWIA2wbJn0tdhSY2-KS1m-s9LTag/41n/CLXJrRETTNWTP8nKb5X_3Q/h2/wpO7obWlZZ4Yb5rCGLAeIp5EJY070dmLyhwiJyVurO4)**

clean_body: Your kids and grandkids are still in Danger. | | Team, While Jim Jordan was an assistant wrestling coach at OSU, dozens of athletes reported that a team doctor, Richard Strauss, was sexually assaulting them and others. It has been widely reported that one of the OSU Coaches that received reports of abuse and knew of this abusive environment was Jim Jordan. Jordan would have interacted with victims of Strauss’ sexual abuse daily. Not surprisingly, Jim Jordan brushed off the athletes’ concerns at the time, and now he insists that he didn’t know anything at all—a completely unbelievable claim. Who is more credible, survivors of the abuse who have publicly said Jordan ignored them or Jim Jordan, a proven liar and self-serving politician? | I am absolutely infuriated by what happened to these incredible men, and the lack of accountability for Jim Jordan—who should have had the courage to step in and help them. And to make matter worse Jordan has taken this same dismissive attitude with him to DC where he uses the House Judiciary Committee to help cover up the crimes of the GOP and Former President Donald Trump. While the athletes seek justice in the courts, I am more determined than ever to defeat Jim Jordan this election and deliver the political accountability that he deserves for leaving the young men he was charged with protecting vulnerable to abuse. Jordan was complicit/allegedly involved with the sexual abuse scandal at OSU. He was complicit/allegedly involved with January 6th GOP plot to interfere with the election. He is not an honest man who has our children’s and country’s best interests at heart. He doesn’t have the backbone or desire to stand up for what is right. Our children are still in danger of being abused by predators which is why as my first action as a Congresswoman I will introduce my bill, the Comprehensive Sexual Abuse Prevention and Accountability Act. A bill which among will add new sweeping protections and make enablers like Jim Jordan face real world consequences. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Donate or Real leaders step up when called upon to help. If Jim Jordan doesn’t have the courage to stand with the athletes who looked up to him when he was their coach, he won’t ever have the courage to do the right thing for his constituents. body:

I have a huge opportunity to share with you. **Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday. And you could make an impact that will keep up our fights for endangered species, people, and our planet.** Friends of the Earth is fighting to protect our planet -- and our futures -- from the greatest threats we've ever known. We're taking on reckless and destructive corporations that have vast resources to get their way. And we’re pressuring our leaders to take the urgent action we need in this moment of crisis. But none of our work would be possible without supporters like you. That’s why tomorrow is such a big deal. **In fact, a generous group of donors is matching every gift we receive through MIDNIGHT tomorrow, up to our $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal.** But before we make our general announcement to the whole community, we're reaching out to top supporters like you. We know that you are as committed to this fight as _every member_ of our core team. The truth is, our planet is at a tipping point. We know you recognize how high the stakes are, Friend. And your support is needed now more than ever. So we've created a custom Giving Tuesday link specifically for you. **Will you give $27 or more now and have your gift MATCHED to help reach our must-hit goal and continue the fight to save our only Earth? Here is your personalized link: ** | [SPECIAL MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147849?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
I know that this fight can seem overwhelming. But supporters like you are powering our efforts to stop the worst impact of the climate crisis, transition to a just and sustainable food system, protect our oceans and waterways, and protect precious species from extinction. **And your efforts are working.** You helped Friends of the Earth to:
* Work with legislators to draft and introduce the New York Tropical Deforestation-Free Procurement Act and pass it through both houses of the State Legislature. When it becomes law, this bill will help protect tropical forests and communities by ending state purchasing that drives deforestation and tropical primary forest degradation. Even more, it protects against rights abuses of Indigenous Peoples and local tropical communities.
* Support local Yuman-speaking tribes in their fight to gain National Monument designation for Avi Kwa Ame in Nevada. The designation means winning protections for this culturally and ecologically important area.

Those are just a few of the fights we've won together. So we simply can't slow our efforts now. With your support, we are building vital momentum to hold Big Polluters accountable and win the crucial fights we have ahead. **We know that we can count on you, Friend. So please: Will you make an early membership donation today to help reach our must-hit $200,000 Giving Tuesday goal? Every dollar you give right now will be DOUBLED! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Donate $27 immediately ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147850?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our newest free online course Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters
dpwillis67@gmail.com
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aaYXdcMHhajDZHJPTVYhBw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our new online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can preregister for our new free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aaYXdcMHhajDZHJPTVYhBw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen '09
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-eN1hlhtqzOcxOeU0LX93g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR6kCP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmVfTwBlZU-nxGBSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2MUuc6Oo9Wc-RLEao-rhmA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnR6kCP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplX08AZWVPp8RgUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Team Emily Busch
subject: Peter, we can't do this alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Busch for Congress
body:
Will you help us avoid a holiday slump?
---
|
---
| [ ](https://emily4mi.com/l/38JLoqKyWdpr)
---
Hi Peter, As Emily Busch's team, a large part of our job is centered around answering two important questions: **"Who is Emily Busch, and why is she running for Congress?"** We've had a great time in the last few months answering these questions for folks across the district, but today, we're thinking about the next few months. Peter, we've seen this before: **_as we get into the holiday season grassroots donation rates tend to decline_**** _significantly._** [**And we'll be the first ones to tell you –**](https://emily4mi.com/l/GT4fvdlyePAr)**[we have great momentum and need to kick it up as we reach t](https://emily4mi.com/l/x1v36PWvHWRJ)[he year’s end. Before we give you the details, will you chip in any amount toward our people-first, people-funded movement today?](https://emily4mi.com/l/5M8fiA5alfJK)**
---
[ **CHIP IN** ](https://emily4mi.com/l/VOCTqJwYYRAM)
---
Peter, we want to be as transparent as possible: the holidays leave us with less days to fundraise at the end of the year, which means preparing for 2024 starts **now.** And your support is crucial. With folks like you in our corner, we can:
---
**1️⃣ Continue to meet voters in-person to share Emily's story** **2️⃣ Maximize our outreach efforts by connecting with voters via email and text** **3️⃣ Secure essential campaign materials like yard signs, mailers and supplies for our volunteers.**
---
We've got a lot ahead of us in 2024. That's why we're going to be working around the clock to tell folks about Emily's top priorities: **addressing gun safety issues, securing reproductive freedom, and lowering costs for our working families.** **[But we can't do this alone. Especially before the holiday season, we could really use your help to prepare for 2024. With our End of Month Fundraising Deadline right around the corner, will you chip in $25, $35 or $50 to help us reach our $6,371 goal?](https://emily4mi.com/l/Pe73FxTOeVRi)**
---
[ **REACH OUR GOAL** ](https://emily4mi.com/l/5OGZ1cm4MLMP)
---
Thank you,
Team Emily
---
|
---
| | | [](https://emily4mi.com/l/2IjPbgJqudmW)

Emily first learned the importance of community and helping others from her mom, a nurse, and dad, a manufacturing representative, while growing up in a tight-knit, middle-class Midwestern family.

The proud product of public schools, Emily worked hard in and out of the classroom, balancing her studies and interest in performing arts with an after-school job as a cashier at Ace Hardware. She went on to earn her B.A. in Biology from Indiana University and Masters from Michigan State University.

Now, Emily is running for Congress in Michigan’s 10th District to keep our kids safe, protect our rights, and lower costs for Michigan families.

Emily chose to move to Oakland County two decades ago because it was the place she wanted to raise her family – a place with friendly neighbors, good schools, and safe neighborhoods.

She and her husband, a retired firefighter and Marine, enjoy camping, fishing, and visiting national parks in their free time.

**Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to**

**Emily Busch for Congress**
PO Box 80744
Rochester, MI 48308
---
[ **JOIN OUR TEAM** ](https://emily4mi.com/l/gpU2CylKuo5Q)
---
| | Paid for by Emily Busch for Congress
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://emily4mi.com/l/yQc6MDTQE5kg)
---

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Why should you care about the OSU Abuse Scandal
body:
Your kids and grandkids are still in Danger. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74089500/440541618/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDg2MmJlMTItNjg4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OEbGbdkXPIrYSL1bs4Fr2NuTsYXHKUm3YSkDhb69YP4=)
---
Friend, While Jim Jordan was an assistant wrestling coach at OSU, dozens of athletes reported that a team doctor, Richard Strauss, was sexually assaulting them and others. It has been widely reported that one of the OSU Coaches that received reports of abuse and knew of this abusive environment was Jim Jordan. Jordan would have interacted with victims of Strauss’ sexual abuse daily. Not surprisingly, Jim Jordan brushed off the athletes’ concerns at the time, and now he insists that he didn’t know _anything_ at all—a completely unbelievable claim. **Who is more credible, survivors of the abuse who have publicly said Jordan ignored them or Jim Jordan, a proven liar and self-serving politician?**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74089501/440541626/1649708063?refcode=survivor-justiceNGP_graphic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDg2MmJlMTItNjg4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OEbGbdkXPIrYSL1bs4Fr2NuTsYXHKUm3YSkDhb69YP4=)
---
_This past week I interviewed some of the survivors of the OSU abuse case and talked about their lawsuit and Jim Jordan's role in all of this._
---
**I am absolutely infuriated by what happened to these incredible men, and the lack of accountability for Jim Jordan—who should have had the courage to step in and help them.** And to make matters worse Jordan has taken this same dismissive attitude with him to DC where he uses the House Judiciary Committee to help cover up the crimes of the GOP and Former President Donald Trump. While the athletes seek justice in the courts, I am more determined than ever to defeat Jim Jordan this election and deliver the political accountability that he deserves for leaving the young men he was charged with protecting vulnerable to abuse. Jordan was complicit/allegedly involved with the sexual abuse scandal at OSU. He was complicit/allegedly involved with January 6th GOP plot to interfere with the election. He is not an honest man who has our children’s and country’s best interests at heart. He doesn’t have the backbone or desire to stand up for what is right. Our children are still in danger of being abused by predators which is why as my first action as a Congresswoman I will introduce my bill, the Comprehensive Sexual Abuse Prevention and Accountability Act. A bill which among will add new sweeping protections and make enablers like Jim Jordan face real world consequences. **[Jordan has got to go—and I am the woman who is going to FIRE him next November. My team has set an end of November goal of $25,000, and we are on target to make it, but I need your support to get there. Can you join this movement for justice and help me reach our critical goals with a contribution of $25 or more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74089502/440541633/1649708063?refcode=survivor-justiceNGP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDg2MmJlMTItNjg4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OEbGbdkXPIrYSL1bs4Fr2NuTsYXHKUm3YSkDhb69YP4=)**

clean_body: Your kids and grandkids are still in Danger. | | | = Friend, While Jim Jordan was an assistant wrestling coach at OSU, dozens of athletes reported that a team doctor, Richard Strauss, was sexually assaulting them and others. It has been widely reported that one of the OSU Coaches that received reports of abuse and knew of this abusive environment was Jim Jordan. Jordan would have interacted with victims of Strauss’ sexual abuse daily. Not surprisingly, Jim Jordan brushed off the athletes’ concerns at the time, and now he insists that he didn’t know anything at all—a completely unbelievable claim. Who is more credible, survivors of the abuse who have publicly said Jordan ignored them or Jim Jordan, a proven liar and self-serving politician? = This past week I interviewed some of the survivors of the OSU abuse case and talked about their lawsuit and Jim Jordan's role in all of this. I am absolutely infuriated by what happened to these incredible men, and the lack of accountability for Jim Jordan—who should have had the courage to step in and help them. And to make matters worse Jordan has taken this same dismissive attitude with him to DC where he uses the House Judiciary Committee to help cover up the crimes of the GOP and Former President Donald Trump. While the athletes seek justice in the courts, I am more determined than ever to defeat Jim Jordan this election and deliver the political accountability that he deserves for leaving the young men he was charged with protecting vulnerable to abuse. Jordan was complicit/allegedly involved with the sexual abuse scandal at OSU. He was complicit/allegedly involved with January 6th GOP plot to interfere with the election. He is not an honest man who has our children’s and country’s best interests at heart. He doesn’t have the backbone or desire to stand up for what is right. Our children are still in danger of being abused by predators which is why as my first action as a Congresswoman I will introduce my bill, the Comprehensive Sexual Abuse Prevention and Accountability Act. A bill which among will add new sweeping protections and make enablers like Jim Jordan face real world consequences. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = | = = = | | Donate= Real leaders step up when called upon to help. If Jim Jordan doesn’t have the courage to stand with the athletes who looked up to him when he was their coach, he won’t ever have the courage to do the right thing for his constituents. Sincerely, -Tamie Wilson | | | = | Tamie Wilson Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | = To contribute via check, please address to: Tamie Wilson for US 273 SARATOGA ST. name: Murray, Patty
subject: Abortion is essential health care.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Peter, this is horrible:
**Recently, House Republicans introduced a bill** **to BAN medication abortion**** ****– the most common method of abortion in America.**
Make no mistake: This abortion pill, mifepristone, has been FDA-approved and safely used for _23 years_. Banning this pill is just their latest effort to stop abortion nationwide.
We will not stand idly by as Republicans keep working to take away our fundamental right to make our own reproductive health care decisions. We hope you won't either, Peter.
**We need every member of this team to speak out, but you're running out of time to answer our poll before it closes at midnight tonight. Please, lock in your response now:**

But in New York, the GOP just had their best election cycle in DECADES. With Politico reporting that Dems are facing **a tough Senate map** in 2024, they're more confident than ever.
Now, they're coming for Kirsten's seat —**and she's _counting on you_ to stand with her team during this critical moment.**

name: James Carville
subject: The newest out of Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
A shady MAGA billionaire just poured $2 MILLION into this race to try and flip Nevada red.

| It’s James Carville, and I’m raging at the newest development out of Nevada: **A shady MAGA billionaire just poured $2 MILLION into this race to try and flip Nevada red.**

**I’m not going to mince words – national Republicans think they can BUY this seat.** Our razor-thin majority is hanging on by a single thread, and there’s no question that Mitch McConnell and his extremist cronies are going to spend every cent they can to take back the Senate.

If you want to defend the Senate, this race should be at the very top of your priorities list – and Jacky Rosen needs our immediate help to fight back against her opponent’s new multi-million dollar warchest.

**She is counting on a surge of grassroots support to counteract the deluge of money flooding into this race. But as of this morning, she is falling massively behind her CAN’T MISS fundraising goal.**

[_**Can I count on you to split $10 between Jacky’s campaign and Fight for Progress right away to help Jacky close her fundraising gap, win in Nevada, and defend our Senate majority?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74090144/440544030/-220169546?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-27_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNjJjNjhkLTY5OGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zOffIOTsZv8z1EpKZePhQPB2vMHWLPa3gb9GshPwKlM=)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
We need your voice.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ba659bR9oAUX5oXR-9X_Fg~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I am reaching out today because I believe that you, like me, are concerned about the increasing trend of legal persecution against Americans who wish to live their lives according to their faith. Our cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life form the bedrock of our great nation, and we need your help to maintain them. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ba659bR9oAUX5oXR-9X_Fg~~/AARclAA~~) From a high school football coach in Washington who lost his job for praying on the field (KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT), to a Colorado baker hauled through the legal system multiple times for not wanting to bake a cake that violated his religious convictions (MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION), we can't ignore the gradual erosion of religious freedom in America.

That's why I created the American Cornerstone Institute to advocate for commonsense solutions to these issues and to strengthen the bonds that keep our nation united. But we can't do it alone.

**We need your voice.**

I want to personally invite you to participate in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**You can share your thoughts using this secure link:[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ba659bR9oAUX5oXR-9X_Fg~~/AARclAA~~)**

Your responses are confidential and will be used solely towards furthering our advocacy efforts.

[Please, take a few minutes of your time to complete the survey.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ba659bR9oAUX5oXR-9X_Fg~~/AARclAA~~) Your input is vital in helping us understand the scope of these issues and develop impactful strategies to counteract them.

Your opinion truly matters. Together, we can ensure that religious liberty continues to thrive as an integral part of our American society.

For Liberty,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Freedom Report
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Andy Kim
subject: When I see something wrong — I'm going to try and fix it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
We’re building a movement of people who don’t accept corruption and the political machine as inevitable in New Jersey politics.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74090250/440544464/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg3MDkwZS02YThkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w-fynPpsQZdABHDYTp3cLf31mab3qHC2Ygr7KquzKEE=&emci=f4b1cb1d-648d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&emdi=8087090e-6a8d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=26261389)
---

| | When I see something wrong — I'm going to try and fix it. Right now, our current Senator lost the trust of New Jerseyans, and I couldn't sit idly by and ignore the truth. That's why I got into this race. **I know for some, New Jersey politics — and politics in general — has a reputation for corruption.** Many people and politicians brush it off, saying _that's just Jersey_. But I know New Jerseyans are fed up with corrupt politics and powerful political families calling the shots. That means they're fed up with dishonesty, greed, and politicians only looking out for themselves. Now more than ever, New Jersey needs hard working, trustworthy leaders focused on the common good and injecting some integrity and civility back into our politics. **That's why I'm running for Senate, and that's why I'm confident in our campaign.** [**We're building a movement of people who don't accept corruption and the political machine as inevitable in New Jersey politics. I know for some, New Jersey politics — and politics in general — has a reputation for corruption. Many people and politicians brush it off, saying that's just Jersey. name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Army-Navy WC Summit Invite
body:
https://www.takingthehillpac.com/ [https://www.takingthehillpac.com/]
Army-Navy Warrior Class Summit at MIT
Friend,
Hope you’re getting ready for a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday. We are so grateful that you’re part of our team. We’re a little over two weeks away from ‘America’s Game’ - the annual Army Navy game - this year at Gillette Stadium in Foxborough, Massachusetts.
I wanted to invite you to our annual Army Navy Policy Summit, to be held the afternoon before the game at MIT Sloan School of Business. The event will have the best and brightest speaking from Harvard Business School, Wharton Business School and MIT Sloan Business School with industry leaders and national influencers. Here’s the invitation and we’re hoping you can join in person or online that day.
You can register here: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/743665803437?aff=oddtdtcreator [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/743665803437?aff=oddtdtcreator]
Teaching at Wharton and mentioning the next generation of ‘Vetrepreneurs’ has been a true honor. Appreciate your support and hope to see you at MIT or soon. Have a wonderful Thanksgiving! We’re grateful for YOU!
Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army | Fmr Member US Congress
PS. Please pass along this email/invitiation to the conference for those who might be interested. Currently serving and students are free, nominal cost for others.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/AN%20Policy%20Retreat.png]
Visit the Warrior Class Website [https://the-warrior-class.com/]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/JcTKjLm2l0SduvIvv8SeUg2?unsubscribedata=XD7KNZhVS19ddu2Owk5WwvoEtbUtw%2BOa7uANT9hpJbkYhk2hoqUVXM765IEBRGn7iiK%2Bn9OLKIJ4i3bbIRKWBx2dANuVT0fi3fhc6zJtfcNVsWbkHYnLtZOgoawfFcptYJ9GKgL5MqutA0VU0fAVJdchJD%2B42Z3yJj8w5LBjEL3V53mHS%2BHt03zNjnecgU7TjHAF0k3MNib3c0Au%2FYwCAiXeEh3n3c5PFuEdqr6A3tcj2l3m2UsNCrchU8TuQ4drStwr9KiIzqmOE7AHlJT7EycFDEOIgNHe%2BLorlul3rG8c2dYyx%2FTZW%2BWGkxyb23ILQ3QLm%2BNC1GSBnSN7TmqFDNMc4JZBRSphabIJaTfoWjnDUAt8kiCX%2Foc3N2AQVQcvQJnFM%2F1CKKNVSmzwWcpRXjjBHiXyTnU1KsX1rv5vlbpEA1B3clPhmFmvt3nONuvL .

name: Joe Kent
subject: analysis attached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
My family had a fantastic Thanksgiving and I hope your family did as well.
I wanted to share an analysis with you that our campaign recently did that shows how we're in the strongest possible position to defeat Marie Perez. Please find it attached.
In the 2020 election, three Republicans won their rematches against the same Democrat opponents in the exact same districts, including one in California that has the same "jungle primary" that we have here in Washington State. In all three cases:
* We lost our initial race by less than any of them (less than 1%).

* We have raised more money than any of them at this point in the campaign.

* We were the only Republicans who defeated an incumbent in our first run - a major feat that almost never happens.

Thanks to your support, the wind has been at our backs for flipping this seat RED. We have earned the endorsement of six counties and the state party, we've raised a record amount of money, and we're the only recognized Republican candidate in the race.
Help us maintain the momentum with a contribution today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/W5FEoI6fl58LupRDA892L9xw/Z3lQgb9YaZSSA2k4K95R1A)
We are unifying like never before and nothing less than that will be required to defeat my opponent, woke extremists Marie Perez.
So far she's voted:
* For Biden's elimination of the debt ceiling and the out-of-control spending that's driving inflation.

* Defunding the Veterans administration but keeping troops in Middle East hotspots so they can be used as target practice for terrorists.

* Against supporting Israel's effort to rescue American hostages held in Gaza.

* For an additional 87,000 IRS agents to target and harass small businesses and families.

* Against Parental Rights and protecting women and girls' facilities from biological men.

Marie Perez is the most vulnerable Democrat in Congress and with your help, I will replace her. Please support my campaign today with a contribution at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/W5FEoI6fl58LupRDA892L9xw/Z3lQgb9YaZSSA2k4K95R1A).
Thank you and God Bless,
Joe Kent

Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
---

[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/Z3lQgb9YaZSSA2k4K95R1A)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: So be it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks.
But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it.
If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, so be it.
And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), so be it.
I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else.
Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate — the last place Trump wants me to be — by splitting a contribution between Seth Moulton and my campaign of $15 or any amount you can spare. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Thanks for your support, friend. While I face these attacks, it means so much to me to know you’re on my side.
Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: DEADLINE to defeat socialism!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American,

I know I’ve been sending you a lot of emails about defeating socialism and taking down eh socialist squad, but I this is important. **[Our end of month deadline is in just THREE DAYS, and I need you to pitch in now if we’re going to meet our goal.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=2a815135adc24a2e98122bfffcea8855&_e=k_JiXEeEZAmomWyltuKx57p35BZIqhL6gkdAG7moyKHEoQXkAdFsXIeKBoKTX9EwNMSGD1tDntfvDf1PAXHij5rX0z46TYFEJEwmZ69Uqtc8ESUYKyyyNnl2gnsKzb44hFEH336c8C0p47u_sEkw9ShzAPw3UDq0wkP-jD1oL-rfBkP9dfIZZMHKA8V6fDr50YipvswJ4zuLUrRymmfPL5V5MledtmIexd76dLjzZ3qp10LVV7JIidkGrx-EKKoK8okO8Hao0PC-E-Lat3jz3KGq0ZwCcAkzKXGidXjSh_4lxjAi3zWtan67XK4LXQwY2ziKzM2oacjclTnBnwtyNw%3D%3D)**

[**PITCH IN NOW**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=2a815135adc24a2e98122bfffcea8855&_e=k_JiXEeEZAmomWyltuKx57p35BZIqhL6gkdAG7moyKHEoQXkAdFsXIeKBoKTX9EwNMSGD1tDntfvDf1PAXHij5rX0z46TYFEJEwmZ69Uqtc8ESUYKyyyNnl2gnsKzb44hFEH336c8C0p47u_sEkw9ShzAPw3UDq0wkP-jD1oL-rfBkP9dfIZZMHKA8V6fDr5EIdNF774FrS01Vf6n5GIYJ6CUELxteqeEs6ug7vyc02XjMmohix7iJKTB1tl7XsEhD9zG0hEJ7RWPwhvslG2HphA9PtEU2zci3CRKZFz0VZaudte8y7yc2reC7iwY7uWXgrECZxIV0CjjwTbukqNRQ%3D%3D)

With socialist mega donors from Hollywood stars to George Soros lining up to try and steal this seat, we need to reach our goal. I can’t rely on billionaires like the Left does because that’s not who I represent. **I ONLY answer to hardworking, law-abiding Americans like you. YOU are the reason I continue to fight against socialism, and YOU are the backbone of this campaign.** **[You’ve always stepped up when it matters most, and I know now is no different. Will you pitch in now and help us meet our end of month goal?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=2a815135adc24a2e98122bfffcea8855&_e=k_JiXEeEZAmomWyltuKx57p35BZIqhL6gkdAG7moyKHEoQXkAdFsXIeKBoKTX9EwNMSGD1tDntfvDf1PAXHij5rX0z46TYFEJEwmZ69Uqtc8ESUYKyyyNnl2gnsKzb44hFEH336c8C0p47u_sEkw9ShzAPw3UDq0wkP-jD1oL-rfBkP9dfIZZMHKA8V6fDr5k6u6o2Yk_gV7nWHviiJEtqZ8jR0L3V1h-qwgCjk1mJRBFXDasJad5YWExY6n_9orVlDaCthPCEjBKwei82trD7SKgtWp364bNLjb0rQ1tIHxo_dljGfnOZAJZaggGMJOrPMxJzQyWKdggly-O14MiQ%3D%3D)**

[**PITCH IN NOW**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=2a815135adc24a2e98122bfffcea8855&_e=k_JiXEeEZAmomWyltuKx57p35BZIqhL6gkdAG7moyKHEoQXkAdFsXIeKBoKTX9EwNMSGD1tDntfvDf1PAXHij5rX0z46TYFEJEwmZ69Uqtc8ESUYKyyyNnl2gnsKzb44hFEH336c8C0p47u_sEkw9ShzAPw3UDq0wkP-jD1oL-rfBkP9dfIZZMHKA8V6fDr55VdfGsOL45_4sjJhOutUUAjKbiUnl5mfMiQyCzKcKR_Y7m8GZc6lHbnfKzjC0vjc1Ysc9VkBksJrXWA4kiH-WqrFX9jzCS2CXJmZIwsRi6Cjfy1N2GoH6O6DxfVQz7jR6Pg7bBBOk1aNUvYjUhHHCg%3D%3D)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: My life story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | |
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---

I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice. I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree. As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values. | | | | "Generic Button" But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly and father to our four amazing children. | | | | "Generic Button" I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024. We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor. I set a goal of activating 40,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running. "Will you join my team today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024? " | | | "Generic Button" Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our conservative movement. I’ve seen firsthand the kind of leader George is throughout our life together.

**He’s passionate about getting results -- whether through his former role as NASA Chief of Staff under President Obama, working with city and business leaders to help Antelope Valley hospitals get critical supplies during the uncertainty of the first Covid lockdown, bringing together science, tech, government and philanthropy groups to build solutions to the wildfire crisis, or as a father of our two children.

It’s clear that the Santa Clarita and Antelope Valleys need someone like George representing us at home and in Washington.**

I know that he will get results for our communities in Congress just as he has his entire career. From finding solutions to the wildfire crisis that threatens California and beyond, to creating more jobs in the district, to protecting a woman’s right to choose -- _George is working day and night to move CA-27 forward._

But this is a critical moment in the campaign. It’s been a busy autumn for George on the campaign trail, and we are working to build momentum and engagement as we head into 2024. We want to energize and empower people to be a part of building the future that inspires us. Join our campaign. Support George and let’s co-create a world we can all be proud of!

And remember: **This is a toss-up race. All eyes -- from National Republicans and Democrats alike -- are on CA-27 as a key piece of the House majority for either party.**

They’ve spent millions of dollars trying to take it back, but thanks to this grassroots network, we’ve been able to hold this seat.
Early grassroots investment has been key to Abigail’s success, and this race will be no different. clean_body: | = Peter, This month, Abigail launched her campaign to become the next Governor of Virginia. We don’t win elections overnight, and the path to victory starts now. = = | = Abigail is the best choice to become the next Governor of Virginia. She was raised in Henrico County, graduated from the University of Virginia, and is raising her three daughters here in the Commonwealth. And not only does Abigail know Virginia, she knows how to win. Before Abigail won her first race for Congress in 2018, Republicans had held the seat for almost half a century. They’ve spent millions of dollars trying to take it back, but thanks to this grassroots network, we’ve been able to hold this seat. Early grassroots investment has been key to Abigail’s success, and this race will be no different. We need your support to start laying the groundwork for our campaign now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Abigail Spanberger and HER Time will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support, Team Spanberger HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| Team, no matter the consequences, Kelly Ayotte is sticking to her extremist policies.

And the consequences are dire for countless Granite Staters.

We need a leader who understands New Hampshire families and will fight back against extremism.

We need a governor who will protect reproductive freedom, defend public education, build affordable housing, combat climate change, and make sure every Granite Stater has the opportunity to thrive.

While Kelly is focused on scoring petty political points, I’m focused on leading New Hampshire forward and as governor, I will lead the corner office with integrity.

**[I need to count on folks like you to help us get there.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74091361/440548214/-1943369977?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_CW_20231127_FR_1.2_3MO_candidate_na_na_EOM.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGZkMjViNC02ZDhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjL2PPbkp-9ugk-PE2ZTRjdRKPhLMGTMqjmK-3DgS0Q=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariela=20Roca?=
subject: A Few Updates
body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=6a5afbb5a3&e=0a12281e0e)
|
---
# Weekly Update: Fundraising Drive, Volunteer Event, and Parade Invitation!
Dear Supporters,
I hope each of you had a fantastic Thanksgiving, surrounded by loved ones and filled with gratitude. As we dive back into action this week, there's a lot on our plate, and I'm excited to share some upcoming opportunities for involvement and support.
**Fundraising Drive: Your Support Matters!** Our fundraising efforts are in full swing, and your contribution can make a significant impact. Every donation means less time on the phone for Mariela and more time connecting with voters, understanding their needs, and advocating for our community. Your support drives our campaign forward, inching us closer to our shared goals. Donate today to power Mariela's mission!
| [DONATE TODAY!](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=ca11f27466&e=0a12281e0e)
---
**Volunteer Event: Wednesday, November 29th 6-9 pm at Mission BBQ.** Join us for a special volunteer event this week! It's a chance to meet like-minded individuals, share ideas, and contribute your time and skills to the campaign. We'll be gathering at Mission BBQ in Frederick, MD. Let's come together, fueled by our collective passion for positive change!
Click the button below to register to volunteer, or reply back to this email to let us know. ⬇️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=2b961601b1&e=0a12281e0e)
**New Market Christmas Parade: Saturday, December 2nd @ 3PM** Mark your calendars for the New Market Christmas Parade this Saturday! We're thrilled to participate and showcase our support for the community and spread some holiday cheer! Join us as we walk together, spreading joy and our message of progress during this festive celebration. The parade starts at 3PM and we will be lining up around 2PM.
Click the button below to register to volunteer, or reply back to this email to let us know if you can join! ⬇️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=a8e629edd2&e=0a12281e0e)
| [VOLUNTEER HERE!](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=62f2ccdf3b&e=0a12281e0e)
---
Mariela's dedication to serving the community is unwavering, but she can't do it alone. Your contribution, whether through donations or volunteering, makes a significant difference in our ability to connect with voters and enact meaningful change.
Donate Today by clicking the button at the end of this email! ⬇️
Thank you for your continued support and commitment to our cause. We are going to flip Maryland 6th Red with your support! 🇺🇸
Let's keep the momentum going strong!
Warm regards,PaulTeam Roca
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=dfd5750f6c&e=0a12281e0e)

name: Team Williams
subject: Did you catch Brian on CBS Mornings?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress

Hi Peter -- Eric Swalwell here, Congressman for California’s 14th District.

I am thrilled to endorse Joanna Weiss for Congress in CA-47. **Joanna has experience winning tough races in Orange County, and I am confident she is the candidate to beat back Republican extremism next November.**

**[Will you join me in supporting Joanna with a $3 donation? Your support today makes a real difference in this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74091475/440548781/1436736915?refcode=em-11.27.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzdjNGViNDItNmU4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tcfneMuUROa__Lvl80v89d6mjtO25DzRNSpfRx6NF30=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74091476/440548782/1436736915?refcode=em-11.27.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzdjNGViNDItNmU4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tcfneMuUROa__Lvl80v89d6mjtO25DzRNSpfRx6NF30=)****
---

I am proud to join the growing number of members from the California delegation endorsing Joanna -- as well as critical organizations like EMILYs List and Elect Democratic Women.

**Reproductive rights and the foundation of our very democracy are on the ballot next year, and Joanna is a true champion of both of those issues.** I look forward to working side-by-side with her in Congress to get to work for families in California and across the country.

But before that can happen, I want to do my part to help Joanna get elected. **CA-47 is the only currently Democratic-held open seat in the state this cycle, and in order to retake the House majority and give our communities the representation they deserve, we need all hands on deck to elect Joanna and fight back against the national Republicans eyeing this seat.**

clean_body: | = = Hi Peter -- Eric Swalwell here, Congressman for California’s 14th District. I am thrilled to endorse Joanna Weiss for Congress in CA-47. Joanna has experience winning tough races in Orange County, and I am confident she is the candidate to beat back Republican extremism next November. = | **= I am proud to join the growing number of members from the California delegation endorsing Joanna -- as well as critical organizations like EMILYs List and Elect Democratic Women. Reproductive rights and the foundation of our very democracy are on the ballot next year, and Joanna is a true champion of both of those issues. I look forward to working side-by-side with her in Congress to get to work for families in California and across the country. But before that can happen, I want to do my part to help Joanna get elected. CA-47 is the only currently Democratic-held open seat in the state this cycle, and in order to retake the House majority and give our communities the representation they deserve, we need all hands on deck to elect Joanna and fight back against the national Republicans eyeing this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Eric Swalwell Congressman, CA-14 | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to .
