name: Eric Stern, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: I wanted to share this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This proves our movement is grassroots.
#
Hey, it’s Eric -- do you have a moment? I want to share something I just read in our ActBlue.
**_Did you know that our average donation in 2023 is just $14.02?_**
Here’s why I’m proud of that number: **Our average contribution proves that this movement is powered by small-dollar donations.** We’ve relied on real people like you donating what + when they’re able to since Day One — and we plan to keep it that way.
Here’s why I’m also nervous about that number: it’s lower than usual, which means we need more folks to step up than usual to hit the same important end-of-month goals.
**[So I’m asking for folks like you to help out ahead of our deadline at midnight on Thursday: Will you help us boost our fundraising back up by chipping in $25 or even more?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231127-1?refcode=em20231127-1-8686&refcode2=8686_434096_oRKup9&akid=8686%2E434096%2EoRKup9)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231127-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231127-8686&refcode2=8686_434096_oRKup9&akid=8686%2E434096%2EoRKup9)**
Allow me to dive further into our average donation amount and why it matters so much.
This time last year, our 2022 average donation was around $29. Now we’ve dipped down all the way to $14.
In a weird way, my team is proud of it! Here's why:
_A low average donation is the hallmark of a real people-powered campaign. It shows that we’re not funded by corporate PACs or billionaires with deep pockets._
But, on the other hand, it means the money we used to raise from a single donation -- well, now we need two to raise the same amount!
**We can't afford to let our fundraising dip *too* low, Derek.** So, we're asking everyone who hasn't donated to make their very first contribution to John Fetterman today -- that'll help us close the gap.
**[Can you make your first donation right now to help Team Fetterman reach our end-of-month goal? Every donation helps us show the strength and size of this grassroots team.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231127-1?refcode=em20231127-1-8686&refcode2=8686_434096_oRKup9&akid=8686%2E434096%2EoRKup9)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231127-1?refcode=em20231127-8686&refcode2=8686_434096_oRKup9&akid=8686%2E434096%2EoRKup9)**
Thank you for all you do.
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231127-8686-footer&t=1&refcode2=8686_434096_oRKup9&akid=8686%2E434096%2EoRKup9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8686%2E434096%2EoRKup9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8686%2E434096%2EoRKup9)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: The Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: You're invited to bill workshops this week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell
body:
Happy Monday!
Bill workshops start tomorrow! You are invited to join us on Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday, whatever best fits into your schedule.
We want to hear from folks across the community about what concerns are top of mind for you as we finalize our legislative agenda for the 2024 session. Feel free to invite any friends or community members as well (or bring them with you!). Please RSVP! This helps us know how many people to prepare for.

RSVP here! [https://bit.ly/sewellworkshop]

During each workshop, we will provide an overview of Virginia's legislative process, go over some frequently asked questions, and then dive into talking about your community concerns and what we might be able to do to address them in Richmond. These events are non-partisan and kid-friendly. All constituents are welcome. Coloring books for children and snacks for all will be available.

The Details
What: Talk about community concerns and shape Del. Sewell's 2024 legislative agenda
When: All bill workshops will begin at 7pm.
Where: Choose your date! All workshops will be the same.
• Tue, Nov 28th - Virtual (Zoom Link Upon RSVP)
• Wed, Nov 29th - Occoquan Town Hall (314 Mill St, Occoquan, VA 22125)
• Thu, Nov 30th - Dale City Christian Church (co-hosted with the Dale City Civic Association, 14022 Lindendale Rd, Woodbridge, VA 22193)

I look forward to seeing you at one of my workshops this week!
Delegate Briana Sewell

Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell.
Friends of Briana Sewell
PO Box 1849
Woodbridge, VA 22195
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/BDPKPY_4S0izjMklQV7G1w2?unsubscribedata=rcif%2BVYXEGS%2BdW5nAmVZ90zBokvjM3iRyAMM6zrNOVvTa8eUE2IaABN2PsCYgkS%2BAqB%2BojNOJY27rQLaQHCBVunmL1NtDKrGL3coV1Icl5Fc%2FrLFaAz%2F5fnURZ%2F9sT97uBV8JUFIyGsP1n8DYwusE%2BcfJd3EAjQFsBd1EOJhVLo5N4FkZKlua6M%2FAzHD3BGl6LH6TuPMx5il45hdTpwlqA1NF9%2BDGtSVKygwNCN5phXVAqSbTOPdSZpHDGnOt0AJDNxg39i9GeOx3D2HtBWNveHuOAkfFi9eyO7Ye1PWKKgGY5ba40hhgsHcNEJt2lBWWG0s0C30SzxvixgzjeuLP22taTOWieBS6xQ1hvYY%2FqBPq%2Faxd1SG0NVfgTBhDc2ENLhtQwodPhLKtgIe%2Bgv3bOesxQ%2F4tPxDAHXs%2B4A7mIpLczZUhDzDLjstZw7g%2BUHe .

subject: Nancy Pelosi Responsible for January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
President Trump was right when he said Nancy Pelosi was responsible for January 6th...
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | _**President Trump was right when he said Nancy Pelosi was responsible for January 6th...**_
---
| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kUffXNznJNnasNX8m7Kwyw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
40,000 hours of J6 footage was released, and everything you’ve been told is a LIE.

body:
I wanted to take a moment to explain why your support matters.

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74092402/440551799/-1346134463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3NDc3NGE3LTcwOGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeWpDpb_nK-lCTdLusaZR2linEF-tpZmBtGKEst0voo=)** Peter, it’s Jane Fonda. I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC because I believe it is more important now than ever before that we do everything we can to ensure that my generation leaves the next with everything they need for a livable, prosperous future. To me, that means we must do what we can to protect our air, water and other natural resources and hold those who profit from polluting our planet accountable for the harm they’ve caused. I’m reaching out today in hopes that you’ll join me in supporting that mission by splitting a contribution between my PAC and Future Forum PAC today. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74092404/440551802/1472404073?&refcode=E4773-20231101-JaneFonda-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3NDc3NGE3LTcwOGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeWpDpb_nK-lCTdLusaZR2linEF-tpZmBtGKEst0voo=)**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74092406/440551803/1472404073?&refcode=E4773-20231101-JaneFonda-SB-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3NDc3NGE3LTcwOGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeWpDpb_nK-lCTdLusaZR2linEF-tpZmBtGKEst0voo=) _**Here are 3 reasons why every investment counts:**_ _**1️⃣ We rely on grassroots supporters like you to make an impact**_. We wish we didn’t have to ask people to part with their hard-earned money, but our ability to support climate champions depends on people like you to fight back against the big financial warchests many of our candidates’ opponents bring to the table. _**2️⃣ We focus our support where we can have the biggest impact.**_ Our strategy combines direct financial support and leveraging our ability to reach people in down-ballot races where even modest financial support goes a long way. We have already been able to make a major impact on state & local races across the country, from Virginia’s state legislature to key victories for local Climate Champions in Denver, San Antonio, and Pittsburgh. _**3️⃣ The climate crisis is here.**_ Day after day, we are seeing the effects of burning fossils on our communities. The fossil fuel industry is dedicated to investing in politicians who will let them continue to get away with it. We can’t take a break from demanding climate action because the climate crisis is getting worse every day. And with your support, I strongly believe the climate movement is in great hands, but there is still so much work to be done. We don’t say any of this to scare you – anyone who tries to scare you into giving them money should rethink that strategy. **If nothing else, our goal is for you to feel hopeful – our team and the rest of the climate movement are working every day out of hope for a livable future, and we hope you consider yourself part of our team.** Every dollar you invest in the Jane Fonda Climate PAC has an immediate impact on the decisions we make, _**and we cannot do it without you.**_ **[Will you split a contribution today between the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and Future Forum PAC to power our climate movement and elect climate champions?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74092408/440551805/1472404073?&refcode=E4773-20231101-JaneFonda-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3NDc3NGE3LTcwOGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeWpDpb_nK-lCTdLusaZR2linEF-tpZmBtGKEst0voo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74092411/440551806/1472404073?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4773-20231101-JaneFonda-EG-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3NDc3NGE3LTcwOGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeWpDpb_nK-lCTdLusaZR2linEF-tpZmBtGKEst0voo=) | [$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74092414/440551809/1472404073?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4773-20231101-JaneFonda-EG-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3NDc3NGE3LTcwOGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SeWpDpb_nK-lCTdLusaZR2linEF-tpZmBtGKEst0voo=)

subject: I know God is not done with America yet.

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

clean_body: It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God. | Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet. It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. I know our country is in desperate need of prayer. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

**Already, Republicans have suppressed the will of an alarming number of Americans. ****During last year's midterm elections, voter suppression laws blocked 4.6 million people from voting. And in 2023 so far, 14 states have enacted laws making it _harder_ to vote.**
Peter, this is only the beginning. Republicans know they can't win in 2024 unless they suppress the will of the people, and that's _exactly_ what they're trying to do.
We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like _you_ prefer to vote or how you just cast your vote this Election Day.

We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like you prefer to vote or how you just cast your vote this Election Day. clean_body: But the ruthless Democrats forgot who they’re dealing with! | | | Friend, Soros-funded Democrats thought they could blindside us by filing an appeal during the Thanksgiving holiday to try and remove President Trump’s name from the ballot in 2024. But nobody blindsides Donald Trump! President Trump knows there are ZERO DAYS OFF when it comes to saving the greatest country in history, which is why the President immediately fought back against these vicious attempts to remove his name from the ballot. If the Democrats get away with deciding who can and cannot appear on YOUR ballot, then our once Free Republic will have become a dictatorship where your “president” is chosen for you. 2024 is not just another election. It may be the LAST ELECTION America ever has. | That’s why we need to CRUSH our fundraising goal before the November end-of-month deadline to ensure we can fight back and WIN against the tyrannical Democrats’ attempts to cancel YOUR ballot and STEAL the 2024 election in broad daylight. | Thank you, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: What if I told you, Peter?
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74093105/440554249/-2048798125?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_NO_20221127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM0ZGY3My03MjhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2G2Aa975z6HF-myKOjlCp0P7vJpWUNUp2HMbkDlGOC8=) I have a question for you, Peter: If I told you that Democrats have 23 Senate seats to defend next year, and that our razor-thin majority could come down to just one of them, **[would you chip in $5 to help me defend this seat before Thursday's end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74093106/440554250/-2048798125?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_NO_20221127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM0ZGY3My03MjhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2G2Aa975z6HF-myKOjlCp0P7vJpWUNUp2HMbkDlGOC8=)** What if I told you that the last time our fundamental freedoms and our democracy were on the ballot, small donations of $5 or more helped Democrats flip the Senate majority in 2020 and _expand it_ in 2022? How about if I told you that Mitch McConnell and his dark money, mega-donor allies are prepared to spend millions on the airwaves every day in battleground states like Montana, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin to prop up far-right, anti-abortion extremists — **[would you chip in $5 to keep them out of power?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74093107/440554251/-2048798125?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_NO_20221127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM0ZGY3My03MjhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2G2Aa975z6HF-myKOjlCp0P7vJpWUNUp2HMbkDlGOC8=)** Peter, the non-stop news cycle can make it feel like the sky is falling — but together, _we can push it back up_. I’ve seen this grassroots team deliver incredible victories before, and we can do it again. [**So please, chip in $5 or more to defend our razor-thin majority and keep me fighting for our families, our planet, and our future in the Senate ahead of Thursday's end-of-month deadline. Support from folks like you means more than you know.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74093108/440554252/840717225?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_NO_20221127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM0ZGY3My03MjhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2G2Aa975z6HF-myKOjlCp0P7vJpWUNUp2HMbkDlGOC8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ****[Chip in $5 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74093109/440554253/-2048798125?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_NO_20221127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM0ZGY3My03MjhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2G2Aa975z6HF-myKOjlCp0P7vJpWUNUp2HMbkDlGOC8=)****

clean_body: | = I have a question for you, Peter: If I told you that Democrats have 23 Senate seats to defend next year, and that our razor-thin majority could come down to just one of them, = What if I told you that the last time our fundamental freedoms and our democracy were on the ballot, small donations of $5 or more helped Democrats flip the Senate majority in 2020 and expand it in 2022? How about if I told you that Mitch McConnell and his dark money, mega-donor allies are prepared to spend millions on the airwaves every day in battleground states like Montana, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin to prop up far-right, anti-abortion extremists — = Peter, the non-stop news cycle can make it feel like the sky is falling — but together, we can push it back up. I’ve seen this grassroots team deliver incredible victories before, and we can do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** Mahalo for standing with me, Mazie Our friends in Maui still need our support. Peter, these were some of the most unproductive and unprofessional weeks of leadership we have EVER seen from the House. Instead of getting to work for the American people, House Republicans turned the past few weeks into a circus, arguing amongst themselves about who should become the new Speaker, getting close to literal _fist fights_ , childish name calling and toying with the idea of a government shutdown because of their own political agendas. They’re not just clowns — House Republicans are downright dangerous. **This type of leadership isn't what the people want, not in South Texas, not in America, yet it's exactly what we're getting under extremist House GOP leadership.** **[That’s why we MUST retake the House in 2024 — and Michelle Vallejo is the one to do it but we are coming up on a major deadline. And Michelle’s opponent, Monica De La Cruz, is right there with them. Her votes show exactly where she stands — not with the people of South Texas, but with the billionaires, corporations, special interests, and the most extreme factions of the Republican party.
**[House Republicans have shown who they are — now we must show who we are by doing everything we can to vote them out. clean_body: Just beyond embarrassing | | | Peter, these were some of the most unproductive and unprofessional weeks of leadership we have EVER seen from the House. Instead of getting to work for the American people, House Republicans turned the past few weeks into a circus, arguing amongst themselves about who should become the new Speaker, getting close to literal fist fights , childish name calling and toying with the idea of a government shutdown because of their own political agendas. They’re not just clowns — House Republicans are downright dangerous. This type of leadership isn't what the people want, not in South Texas, not in America, yet it's exactly what we're getting under extremist House GOP leadership. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | House Republicans have been very clear about what their agenda moving forward includes: creating a closed-door committee to slash Social Security and Medicare, as well as cutting funding to the IRS, limiting women's healthcare choices, and further marginalizing our LGBTQ+ community. And Michelle’s opponent, Monica De La Cruz, is right there with them. Her votes show exactly where she stands — not with the people of South Texas, but with the billionaires, corporations, special interests, and the most extreme factions of the Republican party. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

body:
Peter, you're invited! Join us for our volunteer launch party Wednesday from 5 - 8 PM! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/agwanforus/11-29party?e=3482649c63)
---
[](https://AgwanForUS.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=28f5b6be813525e28e75dbe6b&id=8cb577ab40&e=3482649c63)
# Join our Party on Wednesday!
[](https://AgwanForUS.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=28f5b6be813525e28e75dbe6b&id=b689edcd2f&e=3482649c63)
**Join us on Wednesday!****
Meet us at our campaign office this Wednesday, 11/29 from 5 - 8 PM!**
**6220 Westpark Drive - Suite 119**
**** We'll have free food and drinks, so bring your friends, your family, and anyone who you think might be interested in making a phone call or knocking on a door with us. We cannot do this without everyone in the community getting involved. Come hang out, have a good time, and let’s go win this new district together!
Broad-based coalitions are how meaningful progress is made. Movements like ours are built on united passions and community support. This is about doing what’s right and fighting for folks in the newly drawn District 07. **Help us fight.** Help us fight for universal healthcare, clean energy jobs, and aggressive gun control. Help us fight to take lobbyists out of politics and change the way things work in Congress.
| [Click here to RSVP](https://AgwanForUS.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=28f5b6be813525e28e75dbe6b&id=d14ebe0781&e=3482649c63)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Mama bears murdered. Cubs left orphaned. We must act fast.
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Early Access: Fight back against trophy hunting and Big Polluter attacks on wildlife and our planet. Donate $27 today before Giving Tuesday ends tomorrow!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147893?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147894?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147895?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147896?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
One bullet. It takes just one bullet to kill a mama bear. **One bullet to leave her cubs orphaned, struggling, starving, and unable to fight off predators.** One bullet to completely decimate an entire bear family. Our country’s bears are under attack. As they prepare for winter hibernation this fall, it could be their last.
_**That’s why I’m reaching out early, Friend: Vunerable species like black bear and grizzly bear cubs, the lands they roam, and our planet are at risk if trophy hunters and Big Polluters get their way.**_** **_**[With these urgent threats in mind, a generous group of donors have agreed to match all gifts, up to $200,000, but only until Giving Tuesday ends tomorrow.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147897?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**_
To highlight how dire the situation is: Maryland already **DOUBLED the bear slaughter** last hunting season. 103 black bears were killed in the state. Pennsylvania could see similar increases. That would be devastating given that last year, 3,659 black bears were killed in the state. But clearly, this is not enough for trophy hunters. They want to push the massacre to new heights.
As a dedicated supporter, I am sending you a special EARLY ACCESS link for this match, so you can pave the way for others, and strengthen our fight for vulnerable wildlife, people, and the planet. Please don’t wait another second:
[EARLY ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147898?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Trophy hunters in the Northern Rockies are chomping at the bit to remove ESA protections for iconic grizzly bears. They’ve made numerous attempts to delist them. This would allow them to ruthlessly murder them during the hunting season, and they show no signs of letting up. We can’t let them get away with this, Friend.
| **GIVING TUESDAY SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**DEADLINE: **11:59 p.m. Tomorrow
**EARLY MATCH ACCESS: Available. [Give Now.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147899?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **SUPPORTERS FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED: 10 MORE **
| | [MAKE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147900?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. 11:59 p.m. deadline._
---
**We need to act fast before it’s too late for grizzlies. Protect vulnerable species and our planet with a $27 donation before Giving Tuesday ends! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147893?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147894?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147895?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147896?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s bad enough that bloodthirsty trophy hunters want to MURDER innocent bears for fun. But their cruelty means extreme danger for the next generation of cubs. **Bear cubs rely on their mothers for at least two full years. If these mama bears are killed, their babies will be ORPHANED. They’ll be left to starve, freeze, or become easy prey for other predators. If that happens, the future of this iconic species will be lost. **
We can’t afford for trophy hunters to keep decimating bear families like this. Grizzly bears and their vital habitats are already in a dire situation. At their peak, they numbered 50,000. But by 1975, reckless human activity -- hunting, trapping, and habitat loss -- already decimated bear populations. Their numbers dropped to 1,000 individuals in the lower 48 states. **Now, they occupy just 2% of their original range! **
I know these numbers are shocking, Friend. But still, the pro-hunting lobby and their anti-environment allies are working overtime to strip these endangered animals of essential legal protections. The Endangered Species Act provides critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. These protections are some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect wildlife, the lands they roam, and curb catastrophic climate change.

**Without these protections in place, trophy hunters could brutally kill bears without consequence. What’s more, destructive industries like Big Oil, logging, and factory farming could swoop in and wreak havoc on endangered species’ habitats. That means losing some of the last pristine wilderness we have left.**
**Giving Tuesday is the perfect time to stand up for critical wildlife and the planet before the damage is too great. Donate $27 now! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147893?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147894?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147895?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147896?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
You may be wondering why it matters if bears are lost forever. Well, the fact is that bears are intelligent creatures, Friend, and they hold a critical place in our ecosystems. They enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations, and transport nutrients through vast swaths of wilderness. **And now, by simply existing, they’re standing between massive corporate pollution and a sustainable future for our planet. **
For the sake of our wildlife and the future of our planet, we can’t let Big Polluters and their cronies in Congress destroy our public lands and wipe out our endangered species.
At Friends of the Earth, we are using every tool available to protect endangered species and our planet -- not Big Industry’s profits. We know how to fight and win, and that’s exactly what we plan to do. In honor of Giving Tuesday, we are asking you to stand with us as we continue this work with your membership gift today.
**There’s not a minute to lose.** We all need to raise our voices in defense of vulnerable species. Together, we have the power to stop these killings, strengthen the ESA, and protect our planet before the damage is irreversible. And today, you have DOUBLE the power to fuel our work to save bears, their lands, and the planet with this matching gift opportunity. But this rare match ends tomorrow at midnight. And we won’t reach our goal without your help. Make your $27 contribution now, before this opportunity expires and we lose any more bears or our planet.
**Join the fight to protect vulnerable species and our planet. Donate $27 in honor of Giving Tuesday now and have twice the impact! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147893?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147894?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147895?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2147896?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth **
|

What’s more, destructive industries like Big Oil, logging, and factory farming could swoop in and wreak havoc on endangered species’ habitats. That means losing some of the last pristine wilderness we have left. Giving Tuesday is the perfect time to stand up for critical wildlife and the planet before the damage is too great. Donate $27 now! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == You may be wondering why it matters if bears are lost forever. Well, the fact is that bears are intelligent creatures, Friend, and they hold a critical place in our ecosystems. They enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations, and transport nutrients through vast swaths of wilderness. And now, by simply existing, they’re standing between massive corporate pollution and a sustainable future for our planet. For the sake of our wildlife and the future of our planet, we can’t let Big Polluters and their cronies in Congress destroy our public lands and wipe out our endangered species. At Friends of the Earth, we are using every tool available to protect endangered species and our planet -- not Big Industry’s profits. We know how to fight and win, and that’s exactly what we plan to do. In honor of Giving Tuesday, we are asking you to stand with us as we continue this work with your membership gift today. There’s not a minute to lose. We all need to raise our voices in defense of vulnerable species. Together, we have the power to stop these killings, strengthen the ESA, and protect our planet before the damage is irreversible. And today, you have DOUBLE the power to fuel our work to save bears, their lands, and the planet with this matching gift opportunity. But this rare match ends tomorrow at midnight. And we won’t reach our goal without your help. Make your $27 contribution now, before this opportunity expires and we lose any more bears or our planet. Join the fight to protect vulnerable species and our planet. Donate $27 in honor of Giving Tuesday now and have twice the impact! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Raena Garcia Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: the right thing to do + good politics

body:

| | There are a lot of important issues that we need to address as a country, ranging from tackling the climate crisis to expanding voting rights. **_But Peter, few issues are as important as defending a woman’s right to bodily autonomy._** Women and their doctors should be in complete control over decisions about if, how, and when they choose to be pregnant. _That’s why I’m proud to be endorsed by amazing organizations like EMILYs List and Reproductive Freedom for All (formerly NARAL), and why I hope you’ll support my campaign, too._ **Defending and expanding reproductive rights won’t be easy, but it’s the right thing to do, and a message that resonates with a vast majority of Americans.[Can I count on you to have my back in the fight for abortion rights by chipping in $25 right now?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8135?t=11&amount=25&akid=691%2E52803%2EuevzwS)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8135?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=691%2E52803%2EuevzwS)

Abortion is health care, Peter, full stop.
In fact, defending reproductive freedom is both the right thing to do AND a winning issue for Democrats.
We’ve seen that in places like Ohio, Virginia, and Kentucky — _and it gives us an edge in the fight against far-right, anti-choice extremists._
**[I’m committed to fighting for abortion rights, and it’s a huge part of why I’m running for the U.S. Senate, Peter. Will you contribute $25 toward my campaign so I can continue pushing for federal protections for reproductive rights?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8135?t=18&amount=25&akid=691%2E52803%2EuevzwS)**

Hi Peter,
The Democratic Primary for Arizona’s 3rd Congressional District is already shaping up to be one of the most competitive races in our state. And we don’t have big corporate backers or a long list of wealthy friends to fund our campaign. To win this race, we’ll need your help. Can you chip in $10 today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_112723_noveom_1&amount=10]
If you want someone who will fight for progressive values, stick with working families, and take on MAGA Republicans, Raquel Terán is your candidate.
Why? Just look at Raquel’s record. When far-right extremists in the Arizona State Legislature attacked minimum wage increases and access to health care, Raquel fought back and won! She supports taking bold action on the climate crisis and Medicare for All. Raquel has spent her career knocking on doors, registering voters, and confronting extremism – and that doesn’t leave a lot of time for cultivating super-rich donors, corporate sponsors, or Super PAC funders. That’s why our campaign can only win with the support of small-dollar donors who will keep us moving forward.
Show that you want Arizona’s 3rd District represented by a true progressive who will fight for working families in Congress today by rushing in a $10 contribution to our campaign >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_112723_noveom_1&amount=10]

Friend, We know that MAGA extremists will do anything to try to win — including undermining our nation’s democracy. It’s especially unacceptable to me as a combat veteran who fought to protect our democracy — because as messy as our politics can be at times, nothing is more important than the right to cast a vote in free and fair elections. As we head into 2024, it’s important we put country over party, and defend our democracy whenever it’s under attack. **[Will you stand with me by chipping in today? subject: Feeling gloomy

body:
- We're running slightly behind this month's fundraising goals. At the bottom of this e-mail, you can help me catch up not just with a contribution, but by purchasing some new quality merchandise. If you're able, greatly appreciated.
With deep gratitude,
-Dr. Bob
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Why are we feeling so gloomy?
Friend,
Holidays can be rough for many struggling in an economy that only works for some of us. To improve our collective mood, to help create an equitable future for all, today I'm asking for your support [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] of my campaign for US Congress.
Together, we can – and must – make a difference to uplift the nation.
Here's how...
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/moodys-getty-ed.jpg]
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]

low

We're all concerned about the future.
Throughout my career, I've been working hard to resolve issues that make Americans gloomy - in public health, family medicine, and in international diplomacy. With your help, I can get to Washington and continue the hard work.
I will advocate for livable wages. If the goal is to reduce subsidies for families, which accounts for 20% of the budget, we must uplift hardworking people with family-sustaining wages.
I will fight for Medicare for All because it saves $500 billion annually while providing care for all Americans.
Millionaires, billionaires, and large lucrative corporations underpaid their taxes last year by more than $688 billion; money that can be invested in education, affordable housing, energy independence, environmental protection, and addressing climate change.
We can trim defense contractor spending profits that reach 40%, saving $100 billion annually, and invest in care for our veterans, national defense, and diplomacy to prevent international crises.
It's time for the American middle class to rise up - to put hardworking people in rural America back on the pedestal where they belong.
I need your help doing it.
Thank you,
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

clean_body: - We're running slightly behind this month's fundraising goals. At the bottom of this e-mail, you can help me catch up not just with a contribution, but by purchasing some new quality merchandise. If you're able, greatly appreciated. With deep gratitude, -Dr. Bob [] Why are we feeling so gloomy? Friend, Holidays can be rough for many struggling in an economy that only works for some of us. To improve our collective mood, to help create an equitable future for all, today I'm asking for your support [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] of my campaign for US Congress. Together, we can – and must – make a difference to uplift the nation. Here's how... [] CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] Friend, The economists are saying we should not be gloomy because: Unemployment is at a record low Workers are more content Wage growth is outpacing inflation Americans have become wealthier Gas prices have decreased by around 30% from their peak They say the price shock from two years of high inflation will subside. So, why are Americans gloomy? Our dysfunctional political system Distrust in the media Economic inequality Social / cultural divide International crises Mental hardships / stress Debt, energy dependence, climate change, unaffordable housing, threats to Medicare and Social Security We're all concerned about the future. body:
Peter, Historically, contributions slow significantly during the holiday season. We get it — shopping lists, Giving Tuesday, spending more time with family, the list goes on. But when our campaign is fully-funded by this grassroots team, we can’t afford to have slow periods. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74093787/440556458/1217362583?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTY5MzlhZi03NDhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OaAaBqvDruvKtMF0GKu13CdLIdJEyOgoIHinywGSds=)

Peter,
Historically, contributions slow significantly during the holiday season. We get it — shopping lists, Giving Tuesday, spending more time with family, the list goes on. But when our campaign is fully-funded by this grassroots team, we can’t afford to have slow periods.
Each month, we set a budget based on the resources we need to have Keith’s back as he fights to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect.
Right-wing special interests are working 24/7 to restrict our right to vote, end our right to choose, make us less safe, and make corporations more powerful and the middle class weaker. So, our budget is really important.
Our end-of-month deadline is right around the corner, and if we want to have Keith’s back, we’re asking everyone who is reading this email to chip in today to help us get back on track. **Looking at our numbers, we still need to close a $11,400 gap before Friday.**
But here’s the good news, Peter: According to our records, you’re still eligible to take advantage of your 2023 PCR. That means you can make a contribution of up to $50 (or $100 for couples) today and receive a full refund from the State!
[**Will you take advantage of your PCR today to show Keith you have his back? Every single dollar will get us closer to our end-of-month goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74093790/440556461/196194268?refcode=body&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTY5MzlhZi03NDhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OaAaBqvDruvKtMF0GKu13CdLIdJEyOgoIHinywGSds=)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Working Families Power
subject: Have you sent your holiday cards yet, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Picture this, Peter. It’s January 4, 2024. You’re unwinding after a busy holiday season, relieved to finally be home after all the visits to family and friends. You’re curled up with a cup of hot cocoa. You feel at peace. And then you realize: _“OH NO! I CAN’T BELIEVE I FORGOT TO SEND HOLIDAY CARDS THIS YEAR!”_ Don’t let that happen. **Instead, join our new project to send FREE holiday postcards (with your picture!) to the people in your life.** When you attend a Deliver Delight and Democracy postcard event with Working Families Power, you’ll be sending your loved ones wishes for a happy new year, as well as a physical reminder of how important it is that they get out and vote in 2024. We'll handle all the postage and shipping! **[Sign up to join a virtual postcard party this Thursday, November 30 at 3 PM ET or 6 PM clean_body: | | | Picture this, Peter. It’s January 4, 2024. You’re unwinding after a busy holiday season, relieved to finally be home after all the visits to family and friends. You’re curled up with a cup of hot cocoa. You feel at peace. And then you realize: “OH NO! I CAN’T BELIEVE I FORGOT TO SEND HOLIDAY CARDS THIS YEAR!” Don’t let that happen. Instead, join our new project to send FREE holiday postcards (with your picture!) to the people in your life. When you attend a Deliver Delight and Democracy postcard event with Working Families Power, you’ll be sending your loved ones wishes for a happy new year, as well as a physical reminder of how important it is that they get out and vote in 2024. We'll handle all the postage and shipping! Or, In solidarity, Working Families Power Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. Want to learn more about Working Families Power? Help us build the movement power to win a democracy for the many — not the wealthy and powerful few. Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Your Giving Tuesday gift is EXTRA important right now >>
body:
__Help unlock $100,000 in matching funds before midnight tomorrow. |
---

|
Peter -- Tomorrow is Giving Tuesday, the global day of generosity to support the causes you care about most. And as an LCV supporter, I know that, for you, ensuring a healthy, safe, and just world for current and future generations is a top priority.

That's why I'm hoping you'll join our Giving Tuesday challenge now: **A donor has pledged to contribute an additional $100,000 Giving Tuesday gift to LCV to fund our work into 2024, IF -- and only IF -- 1,000 supporters make a Giving Tuesday donation to LCV by midnight tomorrow night.**

[Renew your LCV membership in honor of Giving Tuesday and help unlock $100,000 more to fund our critical work >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9k~)

_(If you 're able to start a monthly donation -- even if it's just $5 -- we get to count it 12 times. This will have such a huge impact on the campaigns we can run going into the new year, so we're asking everyone to pitch in what they can.)_

| | **
** **FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW**

**Supporter Record:** Peter Willis
**Email:** %EMAIL%%

**GOAL:** 1,000 donations by midnight tomorrow
**PROGRESS:** 19% to goal

**STATUS:** [Renew now -- it only takes $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9k~) |
---|---|---

With your help, I know that LCV can continue to make meaningful progress towards protecting our communities and our planet for generations to come.

Here are just a few reasons why your Giving Tuesday gift is EXTRA important right now:
1. **Because Republicans are _still_ threatening to shut down our government unless they get massive cuts to environmental programs.** We just narrowly avoided a government shutdown, but the next funding deadline is right around the corner, and every environmental legislative attack the MAGA fringe has passed in recent weeks is still on the table: We _have_ to make sure all of our progress doesn't end up on the chopping block now. [We're counting on your support to defend the environment in Congress. Pitch in now >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9k~)
2. **Because we can get closer to our goal of protecting 30 percent of U.S. lands and waters by 2030 with more monument designations.** President Biden has already taken action to protect cultural and sacred sites for Indigenous people and landscapes rich in ecological and historical value in Nevada and Arizona, accessible plateaus and ridges in Texas, landmarks honoring the fight for racial justice and snow-capped peaks in Colorado, among others. Now there are even more opportunities to protect more lands and culturally significant sites for people rather than for logging and fossil fuel industries -- and we need people like you on our side. [We can win these fights, but only if the environmental movement shows up >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9k~)
3. **Because we have the chance to shut down the Dakota Access Oil Pipeline once and for all.** For years, the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe has led the fight against the dirty Pipeline, which threatens clean drinking water for millions of people. Now, the Army Corps of Engineers has been ordered by the courts to conduct a new environmental impact analysis and take public comment as a result of the Tribe's steadfast opposition. [This is our best-ever opportunity to shut down this project -- and your support can help make that happen. Donate today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9k~)
4. **Because a group of donors has offered $100,000 in matching gift funds.** Bottom line: Your contribution goes further to win environmental campaigns that matter if you give now and help unlock this critical funding. [Renew your LCV membership for $5 today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9k~)

**Meeting our Giving Tuesday goal matters.** I hope you'll pitch in: Our match unlock goal is 1,000 donors, but it ends at midnight tomorrow. [Renew your membership now. Even $5 can have a huge impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrB9k~)

Thank you for your support of LCV's work!

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
__
__

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10289024&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDU1ODIyOQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDU1ODIyOQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10289024&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDU1ODIyOQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDU1ODIyOQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcgXbq7M-) |

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Pretty good!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
With the momentum behind us, we need to build every day.
#

Hey, Peter! I'm following up on the email my campaign sent yesterday.
After they reached out about how we were falling short of our 15,000 donation goal a TON of people chipped in, and we made a lot of progress! We’re not there yet, not by a long shot. But after yesterday, I’m feeling good.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231127-1-30&t=1&akid=1489%2E734936%2E7t3P04)
Now, we have to keep it up.
With the momentum behind us, we need to build every day. Because Kari Lake and Trump... they’re not taking any breaks. We can’t either.
We’ve got to take the threat seriously in Arizona. Just because we’ve won the past few elections doesn’t mean victory is guaranteed.
Honestly, there is a real danger that Kari Lake could beat us next November. I don’t like to think about that, but it’s true. And if Kari Lake can win in Arizona, so can Trump.
We can’t let that happen.
So here’s what I need from you today.
[**Make your FIRST donation of $3. Your first donation is always the most important. So today, especially today, I need you to chip in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231127-1-30&t=2&akid=1489%2E734936%2E7t3P04)
[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231127-1-30&t=3&akid=1489%2E734936%2E7t3P04)
I really appreciate this,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=4&akid=1489%2E734936%2E7t3P04). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1489%2E734936%2E7t3P04). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=1489_734936_7t3P04&akid=1489%2E734936%2E7t3P04)

name: DLCC Membership (via DLCC.org)
subject: [OFFER INSIDE] re: Membership...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
We’re calling for grassroots supporters to activate their Official 2024 DLCC Membership and claim a triple match donation all before November 30th at midnight → | | |
---
| |
---|---
**2023 has been a GREAT year for state Democrats **– and that’s thanks to grassroots supporters like you. We want to thank you for helping...
* **Secure victories in 32 special elections across the country,**
* **Protect our hard-won majority in the Pennsylvania House, and**
* **Invest over $2.2 million dollars to defend our progress in Virginia**

name: Padora for Congress
subject: Say NO to extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Now that Thanksgiving is over, we’ve got to make sure we don’t fall off-track on our November fundraising! So we set a goal to raise another $6,000 for John’s campaign by the end of the month.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2a29a433d59440529ced8efe07e12e8e&_e=1glsMv8sF9r-hn77qJvD_CVeNMLd3i_qP4w5IkYnAgIH9ceAF3LpZskMknJNXM8iNiSt1sFhZkhW9UQI17HwMv4EGsJu4Nssz2tpNPJBSc8H3BefjhsRDkkxhafSO21VuoIrXDnRzVHKLF_oVajvKy1PUuo2T8OIs7-sxOQ8JKv_PFcXzZRQ7DctlDPbmnQuO6l73-Ft7uTSYnV0efiAlcEVCByV4IZ-yxHTD8TXQw5x_vmyoBmE4B5DzLHor2mtE_lf8GEO5sLTsdV4VJ0j50Pw057-zt2ypiCgkIjFMj8ausBRKAwGdv2P2dc0uKFbfUHjuFzldTNxpLLWDLfNyZuRgYeQkbr34cZTduTu6jav0gpN_NFqzIurZ2w-zVwgnOa2hwM13oci-pd_U2QPIhFakBABpLrQ8AfWJzvGj6U%3D) Folks, Now that Thanksgiving is over, we’ve got to make sure we don’t fall off track on our November fundraising! So, we set a goal to raise another $6,000 for John’s campaign by the end of the month. subject: My biggest piece of advice…
body:
Go outside and touch some grass | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74094121/440557585/1530338443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwNDUxNTgxLTc2OGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8UCYGXOV33PiRRuVHEA_U6kvwOr-W2jr3G84PFsYrCs=) | Peter – If there was one thing I wish I could tell the politicians, pundits, and the DC politics-bros obsessed with the political hot potato of the day, it would be to go outside and _touch some grass. _ Seriously. From some of the outrageous things I’ve seen and heard in Congress – like spending more time voting on _hyperbolic censure resolutions and doomed-to-fail candidates for Speaker_ than actual policy – it’s crystal clear that a lot of the career politicians serving in Congress spend more time caring about petty BS on Capitol Hill than they do actually visiting their communities or talking to the people that they claim to work for. It’s ridiculous, and it’s why I decided to do something about it by becoming a co-chair of the Blue Dog Democrats. Our message is pretty simple – we’re the adults in the room who care more about getting stuff done than about what a _pollster_ or a _pundit_ says about it. But here’s the thing – there aren’t a lot of us in Congress right now. Of those of us who ARE here, we’re going to have to fight some of the toughest fights in the country to keep our seats against the extremist Republicans. [**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in today. Peter, your donation goes directly to electing Democrats in some of the closest races across America.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74094122/440557586/155191372?&refcode=E5141-20231127-TouchGrass-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwNDUxNTgxLTc2OGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8UCYGXOV33PiRRuVHEA_U6kvwOr-W2jr3G84PFsYrCs=) I ran for Congress against an extremist weirdo that no one thought I could beat. I’m here because I believe in fixing the things that keep Americans up at night. The Blue Dogs do too. You don’t need any messaging poll or pundit to tell you that sometimes you should set aside partisanship and do what’s right for real people. [**Help us get things done, help us elect more Blue Dog Democrats.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74094123/440557587/155191372?&refcode=E5141-20231127-TouchGrass-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwNDUxNTgxLTc2OGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8UCYGXOV33PiRRuVHEA_U6kvwOr-W2jr3G84PFsYrCs=) [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74094124/440557588/155191372?&refcode=E4825-20231104-RoadMap-SB-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwNDUxNTgxLTc2OGQtZWUxMS04OTI0LTYwNDViZGQ0NzExMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8UCYGXOV33PiRRuVHEA_U6kvwOr-W2jr3G84PFsYrCs=) In the meantime, DC, go outside and touch some grass. – Marie
Co-chair of the Blue Dog PAC
---

Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sh*t done. We believe in freedom and we’re fighting to protect yours. _**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8fb771759c6242629c85e87c2ae956b2&_e=mk-s4vq20L_aCSO5zwMDZxfMI_2wbGupoqFFi6pYiGygMyWvuDeLG0c349BsEVNNWu-cavEEL9OqYuHxV-NG2ubqtDJmxz8PuZtUrUDSbmhnTVkePSmLtoEwaEyC3cX9BUK-c6RdKeYWjcCRk_1FUQmwXvqVkcO_D8lfC_Bn69S1SAh-Gy1_SPK9Ezqo-mT7hIvSyA8rP_CebMNHLYkOB2XvKyCA4AIuDJ3cQJOYywKJEgNFElom317v4tbSdnN_FwQ68fpD19_w29QGEjatMqQiwOGni8ZIxbnCbi_-6-jfqy1lAnDQW3ECV_dbmV5f5gez2szP2sS_WRHdDC9igUiSh3QBA7faZjHZ-1lVv1ENoRNNIsNghnTjvuXY56LKXFP7SrB2S5D0IVV1qiaQ0QqafZGZwNxrui9MOAGq7f8S0Vajf-J2KqVCtD_tYOFW)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=8fb771759c6242629c85e87c2ae956b2&_e=mk-s4vq20L_aCSO5zwMDZxfMI_2wbGupoqFFi6pYiGygMyWvuDeLG0c349BsEVNNWu-cavEEL9OqYuHxV-NG2ubqtDJmxz8PuZtUrUDSbmhnTVkePSmLtoEwaEyC3cX9BUK-c6RdKeYWjcCRk_1FUQmwXvqVkcO_D8lfC_Bn69S1SAh-Gy1_SPK9Ezqo-mT7hIvSyA8rP_CebMNHLYkOB2XvKyCA4AIuDJ3cQJOYywKJEgNFElom317v4tbSdnN_FwQ68fpD19_w29QGEjatMjHfSbZ3EWY__6MDo3yLi8x9-W2KZccWkmNLDr6nz-ay41V9xmUqG2D49fIihO269kLEd8G2pFv4IIvqm7wsR8o1nuulUlXmu_YU2zFv5FYuiqG-4PlGe3Bcm0sL3QbapaVHQNiS182OKEGwN0xydw6RsBq6tNE-FF0Zm68-RYew)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

subject: Political Correctness Has No Place in National Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Nixon for Congress 2024
body:
Keep Our Borders Secure from Biden and Mayorkas | | | | | |
---
[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=63ff360603&e=cc1921084c)
|
---
Friend, In a world that is increasingly at threat of large scale attacks by rogue states, terrorist groups, and lone wolves, it is imperative that we do everything we can to secure America’s national security. But recent developments by the Biden Administration and Secretary Mayorkas have, once again put our security at risk to play politics.
The Department of Homeland Security recently released a memo called: **“Guide to Facilitating Effective Communication with Individuals who Identify as LGBTQI+.”** Forcing our Border Patrol agents to ascertain the **“gender identity”** and **“preferred pronouns”** of any illegal immigrants they catch crossing our borders.
**KEEP YOUR WOKE AGENDA OUT OF OUR NATIONAL SECURITY!**
The forced application of these radical “woke” policies, drafted by out-of-touch quacks who have never served or worked in the national security sector, have already destroyed our military’s readiness. It’s time we elect leaders who will work to secure our nation’s security before securing their donor dollars.
| [SECURE OUR BORDERS](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=996c8c6660&e=cc1921084c)
---
For a Better, Brighter Future
[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=a11dc92b77&e=cc1921084c)

body:
During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74094380/440558569/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTMyNDZiNi03NzhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoyG1BXCuRtBrkzQSUSckmssJ4L5CAjm00GO9_D0mvk=&emci=d7142e98-768d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&emdi=313246b6-778d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74094381/440558570/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTMyNDZiNi03NzhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoyG1BXCuRtBrkzQSUSckmssJ4L5CAjm00GO9_D0mvk=&emci=d7142e98-768d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&emdi=313246b6-778d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
After the 2022 election, my husband Adam Frisch and I went to Washington for “freshman orientation” for new members of Congress.
We still didn’t know whether or not Adam had defeated Lauren Boebert. We were in the middle of a recount – and Adam was down by only a few hundred votes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74094382/440558571/1610638071?refcode=em20231127pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=313246b6-778d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTMyNDZiNi03NzhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoyG1BXCuRtBrkzQSUSckmssJ4L5CAjm00GO9_D0mvk=)
Ultimately, though, after all the votes were counted, Adam came up short. We lost to Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
Now, Adam’s running again in 2024 – and this time, I know he can win. But first, we have to fix the reason he so narrowly lost in 2022.
**During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars.** It wasn’t that we didn’t put in the work (we did). It wasn’t that Adam didn’t have a positive vision for the district (he does). We were just drowned out in millions of dollars of lie-filled attack ads.
You see, Lauren Boebert is one of the best fundraisers in Congress. Her extreme, far-right base funnels millions to her campaign. But Adam doesn’t take money from corporate PACs – never has, never will.
**If Adam’s going to be able to finish the job and defeat Lauren Boebert this time, we cannot afford to get out-spent again – and we’re counting on your help now.**
**We’ve set a goal to raise another $150,000 before our end-of-November deadline, but right now, we still have $115,187 left to raise.**
[**Please, can my husband Adam Frisch count on you to chip in $5 or more right now to his campaign – every dollar you can afford before our end-of-November deadline – and help him finally defeat Lauren Boebert?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74094383/440558572/1610638071?refcode=em20231127pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=313246b6-778d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTMyNDZiNi03NzhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoyG1BXCuRtBrkzQSUSckmssJ4L5CAjm00GO9_D0mvk=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars. Hello, After the 2022 election, my husband Adam Frisch and I went to Washington for “freshman orientation” for new members of Congress. We still didn’t know whether or not Adam had defeated Lauren Boebert. We were in the middle of a recount – and Adam was down by only a few hundred votes. = Ultimately, though, after all the votes were counted, Adam came up short. We lost to Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. Now, Adam’s running again in 2024 – and this time, I know he can win. But first, we have to fix the reason he so narrowly lost in 2022. During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars. It wasn’t that we didn’t put in the work (we did). It wasn’t that Adam didn’t have a positive vision for the district (he does). We were just drowned out in millions of dollars of lie-filled attack ads. You see, Lauren Boebert is one of the best fundraisers in Congress. Her extreme, far-right base funnels millions to her campaign. But Adam doesn’t take money from corporate PACs – never has, never will. If Adam’s going to be able to finish the job and defeat Lauren Boebert this time, we cannot afford to get out-spent again – and we’re counting on your help now. We’ve set a goal to raise another $150,000 before our end-of-November deadline, but right now, we still have $115,187 left to raise. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ll admit, the first campaign was hard – for the whole family. But we’re all-in to kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress next November. Thank you for being on this journey with us, Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: Can you please make today the day you make your first donation to reelect President Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
As tough as 2020 was, this race will be even harder. | | |
---
$25. That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today to help reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. During our first campaign, millions of people made small, individual donations to help us take back the White House, protect our democracy, and begin the process of moving our country forward. So far in this race, hundreds of thousands of people have given to help us defeat Donald Trump or whoever the Republicans nominate in this race. We need you to join them. Let us explain: MAGA Republicans and their allied organizations are spending millions and millions of dollars to attack Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. They are doing it on television, online, and more. And they’re building organizing infrastructure that they’ll be able to use in 2024. That gives them a bit of a head start, and we need to catch up. Like last campaign, the single greatest source of individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this one. Now, we don't expect you to donate to each and every one of our emails. But fundraising really slows around Thanksgiving, so we hope you'll choose to give to this email. It will give the president and our entire campaign considerable peace of mind going into the holiday. [Can you please make a $25 contribution to help President Biden defend the White House? clean_body: As tough as 2020 was, this race will be even harder. | | | $25. That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today to help reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. During our first campaign, millions of people made small, individual donations to help us take back the White House, protect our democracy, and begin the process of moving our country forward. So far in this race, hundreds of thousands of people have given to help us defeat Donald Trump or whoever the Republicans nominate in this race. We need you to join them. Let us explain: MAGA Republicans and their allied organizations are spending millions and millions of dollars to attack Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. They are doing it on television, online, and more. And they’re building organizing infrastructure that they’ll be able to use in 2024. That gives them a bit of a head start, and we need to catch up. Like last campaign, the single greatest source of individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this one. Now, we don't expect you to donate to each and every one of our emails. But fundraising really slows around Thanksgiving, so we hope you'll choose to give to this email. It will give the president and our entire campaign considerable peace of mind going into the holiday. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. As difficult as the 2020 race was, this one will be even harder. That's why your help is so important. Team Biden-Harris

It’s more clear than ever that we need to flip the House and elect leaders who prioritize the needs of the people before petty partisanship | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74094494/440559001/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDlkZmRhNy03ODhkLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m3-8ckG5M9b9L3AytJd_u2apjasSRGrN7AfLVjhJwG0=&emci=bd3ad0db-708d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&emdi=d49dfda7-788d-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=15529135) | Team, after months of dysfunction in the House, it’s more clear than ever that we need to flip the House and elect leaders who prioritize the needs of the people before petty partisanship. My opponent is cut from the same cloth as Mike Johnson – meaning that if he were in the House today, he would have engaged in the same dysfunctional behavior that almost led us to a government shutdown – twice. Remember he said he would not have voted for the American Rescue Plan which has helped our communities recover from COVID. He also said he would not vote to codify Roe vs. Wade - a dream for Speaker Johnson. Thanks to Democrats, we narrowly avoided a shutdown, but we can’t let this extremism continue. That’s why it’s essential that we take back the House – and doing so requires keeping CT-05 blue. You see, this district has historically been a toss-up, and this year is no different. _**This race will be one of the most closely watched and influential House races in the country.**_ That’s where our grassroots movement comes in. National Republican groups have already been spending hundreds of thousands of dollars attacking me and propping up my extreme opponent, so my team and I need to keep hitting our fundraising goals to keep up with small-dollar donations.
