clean_body: It’s more clear than ever that we need to flip the House and elect leaders who prioritize the needs of the people before petty partisanship | | Team, after months of dysfunction in the House, it’s more clear than ever that we need to flip the House and elect leaders who prioritize the needs of the people before petty partisanship. My opponent is cut from the same cloth as Mike Johnson – meaning that if he were in the House today, he would have engaged in the same dysfunctional behavior that almost led us to a government shutdown – twice. Remember he said he would not have voted for the American Rescue Plan which has helped our communities recover from COVID. He also said he would not vote to codify Roe vs. Wade - a dream for Speaker Johnson. Thanks to Democrats, we narrowly avoided a shutdown, but we can’t let this extremism continue. That’s why it’s essential that we take back the House – and doing so requires keeping CT-05 blue. You see, this district has historically been a toss-up, and this year is no different. This race will be one of the most closely watched and influential House races in the country. That’s where our grassroots movement comes in. National Republican groups have already been spending hundreds of thousands of dollars attacking me and propping up my extreme opponent, so my team and I need to keep hitting our fundraising goals to keep up with small-dollar donations. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = This campaign is about more than just one person against another. It’s about moving forward, or more of the same inaction. It’s about putting people before extreme partisanship. Your support now will ensure we can go toe-to-toe with the outside money flowing into our district hoping to sway voters with lies about my record. = – Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. | | **We Need You!**
---
| | In order to win next year, Mike will need to spread his message from Detroit to Marquette, Saginaw to Kalamazoo, and everywhere in between! Fellow American - I have a lot of competing priorities that come across my desk each and every day.

**But at the forefront of my responsibilities, I am a public servant.**

I work for you, _I serve your interests,_ not the interests of the establishment, lobbyists, or anyone else.

**_I work for the American people._**

This is why it is _**so important**_ that I am constantly hearing from you about what your top priorities are.

Today, I’m looking for your opinion – [**would you take a moment to launch my _**Official Team Johnson Speaker’s Survey?**_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=dcfe4859a4c6489b85185896aa1e219b&_e=xLSvenxeVJKkr5cVMFEqoZggL3flZdWf_2m1x2ZLPXjNsk6t8tp3Uf7teDpNsnxbIN52M-o6vsSrwimTdFP_qRpP8NtybLRqSnM7CKVy4CK-IKUrwKEdYirZeChzIuh_sxn3h2BKbuqg8yuPtZIQgNjGQ_1QCfQRJSfMFcWCcsXI7RZBLIY8W6V91eGJ9QUpOG7gg5ZQ3JqcLiHKw25mdFfBCFwHeUPPIniY4oacR23il3kMy7Kcow7__gVDfKhGybjX5imLtC47pZ5-PbzVqQy-X5qedAY9l0cEMwXS8ikWSGnlfqfWD_4U9EnHk5YIly6xSu5-UAVGkicHc6jrHHlkhszWbtyPYpkq8r1Vc5vHszb8Rzb8kdUuHkcq0kVAQXZOU1mvP1qahLb-4C7Cew-5oiAxU7K1JYgovTcnLl4jIm6_UwvkcvOQ3MTkZ4t9)

[**Please, let me hear from you today.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=dcfe4859a4c6489b85185896aa1e219b&_e=xLSvenxeVJKkr5cVMFEqoZggL3flZdWf_2m1x2ZLPXjNsk6t8tp3Uf7teDpNsnxbIN52M-o6vsSrwimTdFP_qRpP8NtybLRqSnM7CKVy4CK-IKUrwKEdYirZeChzIuh_sxn3h2BKbuqg8yuPtZIQgNjGQ_1QCfQRJSfMFcWCcsXI7RZBLIY8W6V91eGJ9QUpOG7gg5ZQ3JqcLiHKw25mdFfBCFwHeUPPIniY4oacR23il3kMy7Kcow7__gVDfKhGybjX5imLtC47pZ5-PbzVqQy-X5qedAY9l0cEMwXS8innD7FUCjD065oI-kOR2OJxw1hs_E39E3huxdNsTmmG0RQRya80mTQiA8yo1dga-ZDYGXd74uFIuOWHQu9nrVnvDFPxZloJa-fzLVzH3X7gePHDswWK4NUDw4OAymrBZPCE9mI2J4OKgC49X18sSbFx)

Together, I know we will advance a comprehensive conservative policy agenda, combat the harmful policies of the Biden administration, and support our allies abroad – and we will restore sanity to a government desperately in need of it. I appreciate your feedback greatly. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House Are you looking to rock some We’ve got you covered! | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: Just got another endorsement... ☑️
body:
We're building momentum!

Happy Monday Peter! I have some exciting news ... our campaign for Congress just received a STRONG ENDORSEMENT from the Drain The Swamp PAC!

They support conservative, America First candidates that are fighting to shake up the corrupt, failing status quo in Washington.

Candidates who will protect our National Security, keep our Communities safe, grow our American economy ...

... and defend the U.S. Constitution to protect our individual liberties!

They recognize that we have a chance in this election to send a conservative to Washington who won't be a part of the establishment's business-as-usual.

Can you help us keep up the momentum for our fight to DRAIN THE SWAMP by donating $25, $50, or even $100 TODAY? (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/drain-the-swamp?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=DraintheSwamp_112723&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=3eeca58c1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
DONATE (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/drain-the-swamp?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=DraintheSwamp_112723&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=3eeca58c1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
We can shake things up, Peter

I won't sit quietly while our Border is overrun and Congress lights our fiscal house on fire; I won't stand down while the Biden Administration pushes failed, Leftist policies on everything from crime to education and energy.

There's just too much at stake. We need to send people to Washington who understand just how dire these crises are ... and willing to do something about it.

If you're ready to join our fight, please contribute whatever you can TODAY to help us keep up up the momentum. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/drain-the-swamp?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=DraintheSwamp_112723&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=3eeca58c1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Thank you,

Max Ukropina

name: Team Eppler HQ
subject: A peek behind the scenes just for you 📷
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress
body:
Before I hit the road to deliver supplies across the district to our network of volunteers & field staff, I wanted to reach out on behalf of Sam and our team to thank you for making this possible!

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: It’s weird, it’s creepy, and I just don’t get it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Josh Hawley wants to control every aspect of our lives. |
---
Peter,

Josh Hawley wants to control what happens in your bedroom, in your doctor’s office, and what you do with your own body. He’s so obsessed with telling all of us that the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him — he's even got a whole book about it!

**It’s weird, it’s creepy, and I just don’t get it.**

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: re: The latest poll in Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Just in case you missed it just before Thanksgiving: The latest poll in the Michigan Senate race shows a dead heat between me and a couple of our potential opponents. This affirms what we have known: Michigan is NOT a solid blue state, and we can’t take anything for granted.
Look, I’m a *bit* of a data nerd, so my team and I have been digging into the numbers of this poll, along with every other poll so far in this race. We pair the knowledge we get from this with what we know it takes to win in Michigan and use it as the foundation for how we build our campaign.
We will use this poll, and a bunch of other data points, to make sure we’re being smart and strategic about how and when we’re talking to voters. But we also know that polls like this indicate an expensive showdown, with control of the Senate on the line. [**That’s why I would really love to earn your support today, so we continue running a campaign that will make Michiganders proud and win this competitive open seat.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231127-2-tt&t=1&akid=855%2E135344%2EKBsXRc)
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231127-2-tt&t=2&akid=855%2E135344%2EKBsXRc)**
Thank you,
Elissa
_\---------- Begin forwarded message ---------
From: ElissaSlotkin.org
Subject: New poll: Elissa has a slight lead in the Michigan Senate race
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com _

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231127-2-tt&t=3&akid=855%2E135344%2EKBsXRc)
We just got big news in the Michigan Senate race, team: A new poll shows that our general election race is a DEAD HEAT against two of our Republican opponents.
**Elissa Slotkin** : 39%
**Mike Rogers** : 37%

**Elissa Slotkin** : 40%
**James Craig** : 38%
We have a slight edge, but this poll makes it clear that no matter who our Republican opponent is, there is a lot of work to do in order to take Elissa’s positive, affirmative message to undecided voters across the state next year. [**Will you chip in to help us make the important investments we’ll need to win this race?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231127-2-tt&t=4&akid=855%2E135344%2EKBsXRc)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231127-2-tt&t=5&akid=855%2E135344%2EKBsXRc)**
With the retirement of Joe Manchin in West Virginia, we know that Michigan’s open Senate seat will be even more critical in determining whether or not Democrats maintain control of the Senate next year. And this poll makes it clear that, as a swing state, nothing in Michigan is ever guaranteed.
The Detroit Free Press said:_”But it's such a small lead — well within the margin of error — that it could indicate trouble for Democrats in retaining the seat...Such large numbers of undecided voters make it clear that all of the candidates still have a lot of ground to make up in introducing themselves to voters.”_
So, what does this mean? The big takeaways for our race in this open seat are that while this is a two-point margin, over 20% of voters are undecided. We’ve been doing everything we can to take our message directly to voters early by visiting cities and towns all over Michigan and meeting with folks to talk about the issues that matter to them. In addition, we know that millions of dollars from Republican mega-donors and conservative Super PACs are on the way to prop up our eventual opponent.
Elissa is a data nerd, so this kind of poll really does guide our decisions about TV ads, digital outreach, hiring staff early, and building a ground-game that meets folks where they are. That’s why the most important time to donate is now. **Contributions a year from now, when we’re in the home stretch are helpful. But everything we raise now will help us be strategic and intentional about how -- and when -- we’re reaching voters.**

clean_body: Just in case you missed it just before Thanksgiving: The latest poll in the Michigan Senate race shows a dead heat between me and a couple of our potential opponents. This affirms what we have known: Michigan is NOT a solid blue state, and we can’t take anything for granted. Look, I’m a bit of a data nerd, so my team and I have been digging into the numbers of this poll, along with every other poll so far in this race. We pair the knowledge we get from this with what we know it takes to win in Michigan and use it as the foundation for how we build our campaign. We will use this poll, and a bunch of other data points, to make sure we’re being smart and strategic about how and when we’re talking to voters. But we also know that polls like this indicate an expensive showdown, with control of the Senate on the line. Thank you, Elissa \---------- Begin forwarded message --------- From: ElissaSlotkin.org Subject: New poll: Elissa has a slight lead in the Michigan Senate race To: dpwillis67@gmail.com We just got big news in the Michigan Senate race, team: A new poll shows that our general election race is a DEAD HEAT against two of our Republican opponents. Elissa Slotkin : 39% Mike Rogers : 37% Elissa Slotkin : 40% James Craig : 38% We have a slight edge, but this poll makes it clear that no matter who our Republican opponent is, there is a lot of work to do in order to take Elissa’s positive, affirmative message to undecided voters across the state next year. With the retirement of Joe Manchin in West Virginia, we know that Michigan’s open Senate seat will be even more critical in determining whether or not Democrats maintain control of the Senate next year. And this poll makes it clear that, as a swing state, nothing in Michigan is ever guaranteed. The Detroit Free Press said:”But it's such a small lead — well within the margin of error — that it could indicate trouble for Democrats in retaining the seat...Such large numbers of undecided voters make it clear that all of the candidates still have a lot of ground to make up in introducing themselves to voters.” So, what does this mean? The big takeaways for our race in this open seat are that while this is a two-point margin, over 20% of voters are undecided. We’ve been doing everything we can to take our message directly to voters early by visiting cities and towns all over Michigan and meeting with folks to talk about the issues that matter to them. In addition, we know that millions of dollars from Republican mega-donors and conservative Super PACs are on the way to prop up our eventual opponent. Elissa is a data nerd, so this kind of poll really does guide our decisions about TV ads, digital outreach, hiring staff early, and building a ground-game that meets folks where they are. That’s why the most important time to donate is now. Contributions a year from now, when we’re in the home stretch are helpful. But everything we raise now will help us be strategic and intentional about how -- and when -- we’re reaching voters. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for your support, Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

| | Friend,

---
As my campaign attorney just shared this past week, judges rightfully rejected the vicious Soros-funded attempts to _**REMOVE**_ my name from the 2024 ballot.
---
_But the Democrats ruthlessly tried to attack us over the Thanksgiving holiday with an appeal to OVERTURN these rulings._
---
Now, on December 6, the Left will make yet _another_ serious attempt to disenfranchise the more than 74 MILLION American patriots who make up our beautiful movement by **ERASING YOUR VOTE!**
---
Never have the stakes of an end-of-month deadline been this high...
---
When we close the books on November - _right before our December 6 court date_ - we'll have the chance to show that no amount of witch hunts against us or schemes to try and strike us from the ballot will _ever_ stop our movement.
---
**With a SURGE of grassroots donations alongside our double-digit LEAD over Crooked Joe, we will PROVE beyond all doubt that we will NEVER,****_EVER_****SURRENDER America to the Radical Left!**
---
As our country barrels down the path of Third World Marxist tyranny, I'm more committed than _ever_ to SAVING AMERICA. _**_Are you, Friend?_**_
---
**_If you 're equally as committed, then all I ask is that you take just a moment to watch this special video I recorded just for YOU ahead of November's critical end-of-month deadline:_**

clean_body: My end-of-month message ahead of our day in court... My end-of-month message ahead of our day in court... | | | | | Friend, As my campaign attorney just shared this past week, judges rightfully rejected the vicious Soros-funded attempts to REMOVE my name from the 2024 ballot. But the Democrats ruthlessly tried to attack us over the Thanksgiving holiday with an appeal to OVERTURN these rulings. Now, on December 6, the Left will make yet another serious attempt to disenfranchise the more than 74 MILLION American patriots who make up our beautiful movement by ERASING YOUR VOTE! Never have the stakes of an end-of-month deadline been this high... When we close the books on November - right before our December 6 court date - we'll have the chance to show that no amount of witch hunts against us or schemes to try and strike us from the ballot will ever stop our movement. With a SURGE of grassroots donations alongside our double-digit LEAD over Crooked Joe, we will PROVE beyond all doubt that we will NEVER,EVERSURRENDER America to the Radical Left! As our country barrels down the path of Third World Marxist tyranny, I'm more committed than ever to SAVING AMERICA. Are you, Friend? If you 're equally as committed, then all I ask is that you take just a moment to watch this special video I recorded just for YOU ahead of November's critical end-of-month deadline: | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. subject: A better future within reach

body:
| | |
---
Here at Their Future. Our Vote., our goal is quite simple: _to create a future where children can thrive._ From protecting the planet, to reducing child hunger, **we know that achieving these goals will allow ALL children to reach their full potential.**

**This Giving Tuesday, we’re asking our grassroots supporters to help us fulfill our mission. This is a marathon, not a sprint, and it’ll take all the grassroots support we can get._[So we’re aiming to raise $4,800 into our non-profit before the end of the month–will you help us get there?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yydMUN1nt5thY_dWpLP_JnxhsxMbVw2WtM2RHvAFHhih-wFSBbpy9GkDAHH66IifcnSlgxV5Lbk37h4wSs58_maFrMybVYnIZkOATjew9PssdRzNDZgXpK-8dC4lBfVrOVoHYQ9-LUfrB2CytjH3wgC5d_a56WWaDEgIz102uWg0Nt80YX5-Bv4SR1674ABqLo_ETK45GspUhXJ7-im_3g30VMdP1YeqIWigjVqHrGpJ0hOlf19zbilYybIUSfgxTtioAjH3EkUwPxyCHeStRS6L-W62BS1NyJEnFmXETwnGtioFvxTs6TBVX7iiO6M0iQXzXtpoOC-2o0JIqAoO6MO_T9oJBXDbBb--zOAJoqFSKyDNQeRE287m-5wJF3SZY/41n/g7gAtla6Qsy-cYv9wVmXig/h0/1f7UvJSHj-aIdJe-RR8TKPajjzi9iwrunphUmHIZxgc)_**

* Sensible gun legislation
* Quality education for everyone
* Accessible healthcare

How do those sound to you? If you’d like to see policies in place that support these efforts, **_[please consider donating to our Giving Tuesday Fund today. In Idaho, we pride ourselves on our steadfast values of freedom and individual rights. As a State Senator and member of the [Idaho Freedom Caucus](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2810b2c6-c1d3-44a3-a4f9-e237a54f013d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I'm committed to ensuring these values aren't just slogans, but living principles. That's precisely why, in 2024, I'll be introducing critical anti-SLAPP legislation.
Because standing idly by while our rights are under threat is not an option.
Thanks for reading Nampa's No-nonsense Senator Brian Lenney! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..B0C0wb6CcCLSJ44BhF_iu-wCxmxcEOIEFYKWDXj57cs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=139214631)
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/accf2569-251e-4295-a270-d8bc03251749?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **SLAPP: The Silent Enemy of Free Speech**
SLAPP suits, manifesting as a form of legal "lawfare," are strategically deployed to suppress dissenting voices through the burdens of costly and lengthy litigation. Their primary aim? To exhaust someone's resources and time in court, effectively using the legal process as a weapon of distraction. This underscores the pressing need for anti-SLAPP legislation in Idaho, which transcends mere urgency - it's pivotal in safeguarding our fundamental freedoms.
As one of only 18 states lacking anti-SLAPP protection, Idaho faces a troubling reality. _**Plaintiffs use these suits not to seek justice but to punish individuals for exercising their First Amendment rights.**_ In a state that cherishes liberty as deeply as Idaho, the absence of safeguards against such tactics is both disappointing and utterly unacceptable.
Earlier this year, Utah took a
decisive step by passing similar legislation, protecting their citizens and sending a strong message: In the Mountain West, we defend our freedoms. Idaho cannot afford to fall behind in this critical pursuit.
## **The Necessity of Anti-SLAPP Legislation**
Without anti-SLAPP laws, Idahoans remain vulnerable to legal intimidation and financial ruin. This issue transcends politics - it's about safeguarding the bedrock of our republic. Every Idahoan, from small business owners to journalists and everyday citizens, should have the right to speak freely without the looming threat of baseless lawsuits.
This isn't about proposing a bill -_it's about championing a cause._
As Idahoans, we have always stood firm for what's right, even against formidable odds. This legislation is our opportunity to reaffirm our unwavering commitment to the freedoms we hold dear.
The beauty of this bill lies in its ability to bridge political divides, winning support from groups as diverse as the left-leaning ACLU to more conservative entities like the Institute for Free Speech. It demonstrates our collective capacity to unite in defense of shared principles and liberties, especially when confronting issues that deeply resonate across the political spectrum.
## **The UPEPA Model: Learning from the Best**
Drawing inspiration from the Uniform Law Commission's model legislation, my bill incorporates elements from successful anti-SLAPP statutes in states like California, Texas, Georgia, and Tennessee. Tailored to address Idaho's specific needs, it provides a robust framework for enhancing our state's legal protections for free speech.
By allowing defendants to file an anti-SLAPP motion early in court proceedings, this new law promises to expedite the dismissal of groundless lawsuits, thereby safeguarding the First Amendment rights of all Idahoans.
## **Conclusion: A Hopeful and Resolute Future**
Let Idaho be a state that doesn't just wait for change but drives it. As we advance this legislation, I urge all Idahoans to grasp the importance of this issue. We're not merely enacting legal reform; we are fortifying our most treasured liberty.
We must prevent the wealthy and powerful from misusing the legal system to silence our citizens. In 2024, I hope to see Idaho join other states in protecting the fundamental right to free speech, ensuring our state remains a bastion of liberty and justice.
Thanks for reading Nampa's No-nonsense Senator Brian Lenney! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.

clean_body: Upholding Liberty in the Gem State: The Essential Fight Against Legal Intimidation | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Upholding Liberty in the Gem State: The Essential Fight Against Legal Intimidation | | | Nov 27 | | | | | | | | | | | | In Idaho, we pride ourselves on our steadfast values of freedom and individual rights. As a State Senator and member of the , I'm committed to ensuring these values aren't just slogans, but living principles. That's precisely why, in 2024, I'll be introducing critical anti-SLAPP legislation. Because standing idly by while our rights are under threat is not an option. Thanks for reading Nampa's No-nonsense Senator Brian Lenney! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. | | ---|---|--- SLAPP: The Silent Enemy of Free Speech SLAPP suits, manifesting as a form of legal "lawfare," are strategically deployed to suppress dissenting voices through the burdens of costly and lengthy litigation. Their primary aim? To exhaust someone's resources and time in court, effectively using the legal process as a weapon of distraction. This underscores the pressing need for anti-SLAPP legislation in Idaho, which transcends mere urgency - it's pivotal in safeguarding our fundamental freedoms. As one of only 18 states lacking anti-SLAPP protection, Idaho faces a troubling reality. Plaintiffs use these suits not to seek justice but to punish individuals for exercising their First Amendment rights. In a state that cherishes liberty as deeply as Idaho, the absence of safeguards against such tactics is both disappointing and utterly unacceptable. Earlier this year, Utah took a decisive step by passing similar legislation, protecting their citizens and sending a strong message: In the Mountain West, we defend our freedoms. Idaho cannot afford to fall behind in this critical pursuit. The Necessity of Anti-SLAPP Legislation Without anti-SLAPP laws, Idahoans remain vulnerable to legal intimidation and financial ruin. This issue transcends politics - it's about safeguarding the bedrock of our republic. Every Idahoan, from small business owners to journalists and everyday citizens, should have the right to speak freely without the looming threat of baseless lawsuits. This isn't about proposing a bill -it's about championing a cause. As Idahoans, we have always stood firm for what's right, even against formidable odds. This legislation is our opportunity to reaffirm our unwavering commitment to the freedoms we hold dear. The beauty of this bill lies in its ability to bridge political divides, winning support from groups as diverse as the left-leaning ACLU to more conservative entities like the Institute for Free Speech. It demonstrates our collective capacity to unite in defense of shared principles and liberties, especially when confronting issues that deeply resonate across the political spectrum. The UPEPA Model: Learning from the Best Drawing inspiration from the Uniform Law Commission's model legislation, my bill incorporates elements from successful anti-SLAPP statutes in states like California, Texas, Georgia, and Tennessee. Tailored to address Idaho's specific needs, it provides a robust framework for enhancing our state's legal protections for free speech. By allowing defendants to file an anti-SLAPP motion early in court proceedings, this new law promises to expedite the dismissal of groundless lawsuits, thereby safeguarding the First Amendment rights of all Idahoans. Conclusion: A Hopeful and Resolute Future Let Idaho be a state that doesn't just wait for change but drives it. As we advance this legislation, I urge all Idahoans to grasp the importance of this issue. We're not merely enacting legal reform; we are fortifying our most treasured liberty. We must prevent the wealthy and powerful from misusing the legal system to silence our citizens. In 2024, I hope to see Idaho join other states in protecting the fundamental right to free speech, ensuring our state remains a bastion of liberty and justice. Thanks for reading Nampa's No-nonsense Senator Brian Lenney! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. Nampa's No-nonsense Senator Brian Lenney is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell Nampa's No-nonsense Senator Brian Lenney that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Brian Lenney ? ?

clean_body: Here's the deal. | We’ve got some news, team. = – PBS News, 11/9/23 The impact of Senator Manchin’s decision cannot be overlooked. Manchin giving up his seat has officially opened up the floodgates to a GOP Senate takeover. Our efforts to defend access to abortion care, affordable healthcare, and keep the middle class afloat is now hanging by a thread – even more than it was before. In Ohio and across the nation, Democrats in swing states are already deep in battle against their Republican opponents,and losing any seat could further tip the scales against our Democratic Senate majority. This isn’t about one state falling behind, it's about the real risk we’re facing of losing all the hard-fought progress we've achieved. **= Thank you, Team Ohio Dems | Control of the House and Senate in 2024 runs right through Ohio. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to hold on to the Senate and flip the House? → | ******= ************ | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

Hi Peter, it’s Sara Busse here. I have a question for you: **Should the next governor of Montana protect reproductive freedom?** Ryan and I say YES, but on a radio show recently **Greg Gianforte discussed his plans for the “next chapter” of the anti-choice movement.**

He’s already signed a 15-week abortion ban and a handful of other anti-choice bills. Make no mistake — Greg Gianforte won’t stop until he’s in total control of every single Montana woman’s most personal decisions.

[If you believe in personal liberties and the right to control your own body, will you take 30 seconds to donate to Ryan’s campaign for Governor now? If you’re thinking about donating, the time is NOW because Ryan is up against his Thursday end-of-month deadline. Pitch in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74096049/440564527/1684620444?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_112723_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ1NWU1MTYtN2Q4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4Gbth6ogcUEE39efRZleTqXHSouJ9DXkpkh_hqbKVr4=)

Another four years of Gianforte as Governor just ensures more erosion of our rights to privacy and bodily autonomy. And we just can’t afford to take that chance. With Ryan at the helm, he’ll fight to protect reproductive freedom and your right to make your own choices about your body. (A right that the majority of Montanans support, by the way!)

[Will you pitch in just a few dollars to help elect a governor who will protect reproductive freedom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74096050/440564528/1684620444?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_112723_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ1NWU1MTYtN2Q4ZC1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4Gbth6ogcUEE39efRZleTqXHSouJ9DXkpkh_hqbKVr4=)

Team, **the holidays are just around the corner, and we have so much to be grateful for!**

Since the Bidens walked into the White House, they have restored dignity to the office and fought for the American people by strengthening our economy, combating climate change, lowering prescription drug costs -- and so much more!

To thank the President and First Lady for all they’ve done, we’re collecting signatures from 15,000 Democrats on our holiday card for them. But we can't send it until we hit our goal, and **as of 11/27/2023 we don’t have your signature on file! So please, before midnight:**

[**Sign the card to wish the Bidens Happy Holidays!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/16578?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231127-SignTheCard-BidenHolidayCard-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231127-SignTheCard-BidenHolidayCard-ETG-sl1&akid=12731%2E9716520%2Ey0gFdY)

| | Patriot,

---
Can you believe it? _There are**LESS THAN 50 DAYS LEFT** until the very first vote is cast in the 2024 election._
---
If we completely DOMINATE the Iowa Caucus, then we can emerge as the Presumptive Nominee for President on January 15, 2024.

---
_That would give us a FULL 10 MONTHS 100% dedicated to firing Crooked Joe as a _UNITED_ Party._

---
With 50 days to go, you may be thinking I would set a goal of 50,000 donors. But your favorite President has a reputation for going BIG! So between now and midnight, I’ve set a goal of _**500,000 grassroots donors.**_

---
With 500,000 donors giving $1, $5, $24, or perhaps $50 for 50 days out – we can post a MASSIVE HAUL by midnight tonight and begin the final 50-day stretch as strong as possible!

---

Iowa Caucus polls show that our competitors – if you can even call them that – are dropping like rocks.

---
Unfortunately, RINOs don’t just play by the rules. They are vicious, and will try any dirty trick they can in an attempt to rig the Iowa Caucus in their favor.

---
That’s why I’m working to ensure we win the Iowa Caucus by such massive numbers that the RINOs are so overwhelmed in defeat that they have no choice but to drop to their knees in complete and total surrender – as they are so accustomed to doing.

---
And when we set a goal like 500,000 donors, it reminds you that your donation of even just $1 is never on its own.

---
_499,999 donors just like YOU are also stepping up._

---
But, of course, it only works if _YOU_ take a stand, Patriot.

---
_Will you?_

---

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | | | Patriot, Can you believe it? There areLESS THAN 50 DAYS LEFT until the very first vote is cast in the 2024 election. If we completely DOMINATE the Iowa Caucus, then we can emerge as the Presumptive Nominee for President on January 15, 2024. That would give us a FULL 10 MONTHS 100% dedicated to firing Crooked Joe as a UNITED Party. With 50 days to go, you may be thinking I would set a goal of 50,000 donors. But your favorite President has a reputation for going BIG! So between now and midnight, I’ve set a goal of 500,000 grassroots donors. With 500,000 donors giving $1, $5, $24, or perhaps $50 for 50 days out – we can post a MASSIVE HAUL by midnight tonight and begin the final 50-day stretch as strong as possible! | | Iowa Caucus polls show that our competitors – if you can even call them that – are dropping like rocks. Unfortunately, RINOs don’t just play by the rules. They are vicious, and will try any dirty trick they can in an attempt to rig the Iowa Caucus in their favor. That’s why I’m working to ensure we win the Iowa Caucus by such massive numbers that the RINOs are so overwhelmed in defeat that they have no choice but to drop to their knees in complete and total surrender – as they are so accustomed to doing. And when we set a goal like 500,000 donors, it reminds you that your donation of even just $1 is never on its own. 499,999 donors just like YOU are also stepping up. But, of course, it only works if YOU take a stand, Patriot. Will you? Thank you, Donald J. name: Team Pramila
subject: Have you finished your Cyber Monday shopping?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
With a rocky political landscape and impending chaotic election season, we need to be prepared.
#
Peter, have you finished your Cyber Monday shopping?
If not, we have one more gift to add to your list: **a contribution to Team Pramila!**
Tonight is a perfect time to make an online gift to our campaign, because we're launching our end of the month fundraising push. So your donation will set the stage for our campaign to round out the 2023 fiscal year!
Our finance team went over the numbers and found that **if we raise an additional $7,883 before midnight on Thursday, we'll be in the strongest position to protect our campaign.**
With a rocky political landscape and impending chaotic election season, it's crucial that we have the tools, resources, and confidence to continue running a strong campaign.
[**Can we count on you to kick off our end of month fundraising campaign with a donation of $3 or anything you can contribute today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47818?refcode=em20231127-2-3211&t=1&akid=3211%2E420207%2EZ0q5Dc)

Together,
Team Pramila

name: Team Cori
subject: We cannot bomb our way to peace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We must continue to vigorously push for a permanent ceasefire that ends this violence, protects and saves lives, and ensures the safe return of all hostages | |
---
Peter, ******** We are relieved by the recent temporary pause in violence in Gaza and reunification of Palestinian, Israeli, American, Thai & Filipino families. All hostages, including those arbitrarily detained, must be released. **This temporary ceasefire is a welcome and necessary start.** It proves the effectiveness of de-escalation and diplomacy—not military force—as a means of saving lives and affirms why we must keep up our push for a permanent ceasefire. We cannot bomb our way to peace—**we must keep pushing for diplomatic solutions. We need a permanent ceasefire NOW.** [**Peter, add your name to our petition demanding a ceasefire now so that we can continue to save lives and de-escalate**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgI_oGsDcfdqMXqfb4_khRd6bmqq6DdunkysRCsFwguDw4Nf94B9LZdM0nCBUGON_9qh3mBNiW9cWjji-8h4gItT_2NVVLfeXxbzSvlkfIxLR4bS4LoEiO8iuwUCnCSs7sN8bAnusl1SuzZ71HcqHiMkAgtlXiCSf270OheWz5JgOyA-jd7oKZhlb_FgnGYKIC2HP3xqhwkMV1MADvWWa8WobiCdFEv7YpKHsL92drLOODkzFAEDFwxXTPSLDV0PT4A/41n/kDThjTqATnSeDLCgRSbCtQ/h0/WtAezg625MjFUQE9kYNDWTJugGmYIXKVroBq5UYiW-U) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgI_oGsDcfdqMXqfb4_khRd6qYKjRyW9W8PF2Dqacua6L-gJOO2I474YteIiKmYAqMvDPalDAUeC8w79Pt98DxUqAbEVhyI4PLW748_ocL-r2yAu5wUwGksXTpqZ1IAu0e-QUwqsgHM48h0YHfwtZpaTxw6hyCNOZVW2E1ZwyDri05cEqy2T3uTinhHQCaR0TEudGIgNGmBQfRZ7D6skPFzowZUsr5r374sGYQloek5J3m19LzQ9HdVIjaqaqseBbfQ/41n/kDThjTqATnSeDLCgRSbCtQ/h1/3gTDUAemQ-MpDBqWc3mOrmEEN2Y4acTsKTD4R3FPYcI) **[ADD YOUR NAME TO THE CEASEFIRE RESOLUTION >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgI_oGsDcfdqMXqfb4_khRd4_kOZ1AeLN551cQdMxtaxR14SwN7IjMw1ffOif77NN21q-e4g4QA6BZkcBMvmyofkmZeLS1xIwgLbY2_Hyn_Fj3EJFRKnwz9elzbu3a-VsrmIMnturi4NvazPez69lzQsgp_FLyXDFzbfhWF3dYXHGRnQS5DtwGtp44C1GzLHkanFNUbllBdzuwUztsWc0VMBekgpR8avH2iAq-h9hoMCyrYgTnqEz-wjSTF9qQBN_zQ/41n/kDThjTqATnSeDLCgRSbCtQ/h2/QauP4y3l1Rl0ly95Ysklvzgzb_U84iTeGpZNp2KNepA) **
